Folks, I am FUMING—
I need Democrats to WAKE UP and take a look at what’s happening in Montana!!
Mitch McConnell has handpicked a candidate to run against Jon Tester. Tim Sheehy is nothing but a wannabe cowboy who lies almost as much as he breathes. **He’s a snake and we can’t trust him.**
Jon Tester is a third-generation dirt farmer with a proven track record of winning tough fights and trust me, he’ll do anything to deliver results for the folks back home.
**But here’s what’s got me F*@%ING TERRIFIED:**
McConnell is slinging mud to the tune of $65 MILLION. His slimy attacks against Jon are working and now the polls are tightening. This race is wayyyyy too close for comfort!
The Senate majority will come down to Montana, so I need you to GET OFF YOUR YOU-KNOW-WHAT and help keep Jon Tester in the Senate.
**Jon told me that his next fundraising deadline is hours away, but he’s falling behind. WTF? He NEEDS a surge in grassroots donations RIGHT NOW to keep up with Mitch McConnell and his lame opponent.**
**[Will you URGENTLY split $10 to help Jon Tester defy the odds and win the most important race on the map? Friend,

My faith has always been a core part of my values and my work in the Senate. I'm guided and motivated by the Jewish principle of "Tikkun Olam," which means to repair the world and leave it in a better place than where we found it.
It’s why I ran for office, becoming the first former synagogue president and third Jewish woman ever elected to the U.S. Senate. And it’s why I'm proudly fighting to bring positive change to communities in Nevada and across the country. **But right now, I need your help.**
National Republicans are doing everything in their power to flip my seat red: **Mitch McConnell handpicked my opponent to run against me, and he's being propped up by a shady GOP billionaire. Now, polling shows me neck and neck in a race that experts say could decide Senate control.**

I'm relying on your immediate grassroots support to defend this seat so I can keep up the fight for our shared values. **[That's why I'm humbly asking: Please, will you chip in $5 or more today to help me win in Nevada, defend the Senate, and continue this critical work?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/91030061/492483389/1398942472?amounts=250,100,50,25,5&amount=5&refcode=jtk4569-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1M2I5NTc4Ny1mNTVjLWVmMTEtOTkxYS02MDQ1YmRkYmZjNGIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Pxt4szN9QnSR2-69S4tesMoQmb5X5wYt82tnIlYEur4=)**

clean_body: | | | Friend, My faith has always been a core part of my values and my work in the Senate. I'm guided and motivated by the Jewish principle of "Tikkun Olam," which means to repair the world and leave it in a better place than where we found it. It’s why I ran for office, becoming the first former synagogue president and third Jewish woman ever elected to the U.S. Senate. And it’s why I'm proudly fighting to bring positive change to communities in Nevada and across the country. But right now, I need your help. National Republicans are doing everything in their power to flip my seat red: Mitch McConnell handpicked my opponent to run against me, and he's being propped up by a shady GOP billionaire. Now, polling shows me neck and neck in a race that experts say could decide Senate control. I'm relying on your immediate grassroots support to defend this seat so I can keep up the fight for our shared values. = If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | = | | = | | = | | = Thank you for your support. It’s such a blessing to have you on my team. Jacky | | = A note from Sen. Jacky Rosen:** Friend, I’m fighting tirelessly in the Senate to deliver progress for people across Nevada and our country. But experts say I’m one of the most vulnerable senators up for reelection, and the GOP is zeroing in on me as a top target for defeat. That’s why I’m counting on your critical grassroots support to fight back and win. Senate control will all come down to Nevada – and I need to know you’re with me. = You can also to become a core member of our team and receive exclusive updates from my campaign. Thank you, Jacky By entering your mobile number, you agree to receive periodic text messages from Rosen for Nevada. Message and data rates may apply. Text STOP to quit or HELP for help.

name: Monica Tranel
subject: I’m running for Congress — can I count on your support?
disclaimer_text: paid for by the elite, not Montana — are helping them do it
body:
\-- |
#
---
It's Monica Tranel. I’m running for Congress to represent working Montanans against giant corporations that are making record profits, and shifting costs to everyday Montanans and small businesses. Ryan Zinke has done nothing to keep money in Montanans’ pockets — by working for corporate interests, he’s part of the problem. **[Will you split a donation of $10 between my campaign and Fight Like Hell PAC today?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/91030573/492495153/-1322866025?amount=10&refcode=AU_FLHP_FR_TAN_GEN_AC90_20240817_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDY0NjIiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNjZmZmE2MTgtZjk1Yy1lZjExLTk5MWEtNjA0NWJkZGJmYzRiIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=fuiykhDxwGrDqCMUvnXYrGnOjlrgqmzKUshvD0JouUA=)** | [DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/91030574/492495154/-1322866025?amount=10&refcode=AU_FLHP_FR_TAN_GEN_AC90_20240817_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDY0NjIiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNjZmZmE2MTgtZjk1Yy1lZjExLTk5MWEtNjA0NWJkZGJmYzRiIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=fuiykhDxwGrDqCMUvnXYrGnOjlrgqmzKUshvD0JouUA=)
---
My commitment to the Montana I grew up in and love continues. As a 2-time Olympian, I know what it means to go to the starting line. I am choosing to be at the starting line of this race, because our democracy, and our Montana, are on the line.
But the Montana we love is slipping away. Out-of-state billionaires and corporate monopolies are turning Montana into a playground for the rich and making it unaffordable for working families to live here. Politicians like Ryan Zinke — bought and paid for by the elite, not Montana — are helping them do it.
It’s time to dust off the purple DNA of our state and fight for a Montana that will restore a strong middle class, with economic security for all.
Whether it was rowing in the Olympics, or fighting against powerful corporations, it was the hard work of growing up on a ranch in Eastern Montana that prepared me for tough challenges.
So now, I’m running to bring that Montana work ethic to Washington to fight for the hard-working folks who have been left behind as a result of the Republican economic policies of the last forty years.
**[In 2022, I defied all odds and came within 3 points of beating Ryan Zinke — and this time, I know we can win. But I need you on my team. Will you split a donation of any kind today between my campaign and Fight Like Hell PAC to help me defeat Ryan Zinke once and for all?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/91030575/492495155/-1322866025?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=AU_FLHP_FR_TAN_GEN_AC90_20240817_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDY0NjIiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNjZmZmE2MTgtZjk1Yy1lZjExLTk5MWEtNjA0NWJkZGJmYzRiIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=fuiykhDxwGrDqCMUvnXYrGnOjlrgqmzKUshvD0JouUA=)**

So now, I’m running to bring that Montana work ethic to Washington to fight for the hard-working folks who have been left behind as a result of the Republican economic policies of the last forty years. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation to Monica Tranel and Fight Like Hell PAC will go through immediately: | = = | = = | = = Thank you, Monica Tranel Fight Like Hell PAC PO Box 15093 Lansing, MI 48901 United States ** | mailto:info@fightlikehellpac.org| | Paid for by Fight Like Hell PAC

body:
urgent
| | |

Friend, do you have a quick moment to spare?
With so much at stake in Florida's race, I need all hands on deck to stay competitive from now until November.
That's why I've set a flash goal to collect 50,000 grassroots endorsements from Democrats across the country by midnight — **and friend, I'm counting on seeing your name on the list.[If you're with me in the fight to flip Florida and keep the Senate blue, will you please sign by 11:59 p.m.?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/91030828/492504422/896007309?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=34223&amounts=10,25,50,100,250&code=jtk1740-su-nd-v2&refcode=jtk1740-su-nd-v2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS8xMDc1MjUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYzliMDJhZDEtZmI1Yy1lZjExLTk5MWEtNjA0NWJkZGJmYzRiIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=KYTwXhRmky7KWdRsspDzvUwpRea4kqnHtUveakvyMJo=&emci=747c49da-775a-ef11-991a-6045bddbfc4b&emdi=c9b02ad1-fb5c-ef11-991a-6045bddbfc4b&ceid=3969733)**
| | [Endorse My Campaign](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/91030830/492504424/896007309?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=34223&amounts=10,25,50,100,250&code=jtk1740-su-nd-v2&refcode=jtk1740-su-nd-v2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS8xMDc1MjUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYzliMDJhZDEtZmI1Yy1lZjExLTk5MWEtNjA0NWJkZGJmYzRiIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=KYTwXhRmky7KWdRsspDzvUwpRea4kqnHtUveakvyMJo=&emci=747c49da-775a-ef11-991a-6045bddbfc4b&emdi=c9b02ad1-fb5c-ef11-991a-6045bddbfc4b&ceid=3969733)
---
Let's face it: Extremists like my opponent aren't in politics to represent the interests of working families or fight for Florida's future.
Republicans like Rick Scott are in this to _rule_ us — and they bet on voters to back them just for having an (R) by their name. **That's why I'm determined to make sure Florida knows that a vote for Rick Scott is a vote for:**
* **Higher taxes** for everyday Americans

* The **END** of Social Security, Medicare, and other vital benefits

* A nationwide **BAN** on abortions

* The enactment of Trump’s **cruel, extremist agenda**

* **A GOP-controlled Senate with Rick Scott at the driver's wheel**

And friend, that's only the tip of the iceberg.
**In fact, he just voted _against_ the bipartisan bill to protect access to contraception — even though eight in ten polled voters, including SEVEN in ten GOP voters, support it.**
**_That's_ why I'm in this race. **And if we succeed at the ballot box, I will not rest until reproductive rights, including access to birth control, are reinstated across the land.
**But I can't make that happen, or stop a future where Rick Scott runs the Senate, without your urgent support tonight.**[**Please, friend — will you sign now to be one of the 50,000 grassroots voters I'm counting on to endorse me by midnight? I really can't flip Florida blue without you.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/91030832/492504426/896007309?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=34223&amounts=10,25,50,100,250&code=jtk1740-su-nd-v2&refcode=jtk1740-su-nd-v2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS8xMDc1MjUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYzliMDJhZDEtZmI1Yy1lZjExLTk5MWEtNjA0NWJkZGJmYzRiIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=KYTwXhRmky7KWdRsspDzvUwpRea4kqnHtUveakvyMJo=&emci=747c49da-775a-ef11-991a-6045bddbfc4b&emdi=c9b02ad1-fb5c-ef11-991a-6045bddbfc4b&ceid=3969733)
Thank you so much for your support,

Debbie

name: Rebecca Cooke
subject: Election results are in. We won!

body:
| Hi friend, Rebecca Cooke – daughter of dairy farmers and the newly-elected Democratic nominee in Wisconsin's 3rd District!

I JUST won the primary, and am now working to unseat Derrick Van Orden in this key battleground race for House control. To kick off our General Election push, I wanted to re-introduce myself:

A lot of folks are surprised to learn that while I’m running a full-fledged campaign by day, I’m waiting tables at night to help pay the bills. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/91030968/492511182/459690421?amount=10&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,250,500&refcode=NDCAF_20240817_EMSPL_E2_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84Mjc1NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3ODhiOTVhMS1mZDVjLWVmMTEtOTkxYS02MDQ1YmRkYmZjNGIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=4bZapKJOO-f6Tg0mNOV2MvYLYjJmHN_WsJfM2iLtBQQ=) I grew up in a working-class family, and we weren't strangers to taking on extra work when things got tough. I know for a fact I’m not the only person in WI-03 wearing multiple hats to make ends meet -- which is a big reason why I’m running.

The way I see it, the ultra-rich have enough advocates in Washington. It’s the folks working two jobs to pay for groceries and make rent who need help. I know what working families need, because I’m part of one.

[**We’re officially on to November, but we have to act fast to make up the special interest money Derrick Van Orden has banked. Can you split a donation of $10 between me and NewDems to help flip WI-03 blue? »**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/91030969/492511183/459690421?amount=10&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,250,500&refcode=NDCAF_20240817_EMSPL_E2_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84Mjc1NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3ODhiOTVhMS1mZDVjLWVmMTEtOTkxYS02MDQ1YmRkYmZjNGIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=4bZapKJOO-f6Tg0mNOV2MvYLYjJmHN_WsJfM2iLtBQQ=) If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation between Rebecca Cooke and NewDems will go through immediately: | [CONTRIBUTE $10 »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/91030970/492511184/459690421?amount=10&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,250,500&express_lane=true&refcode=NDCAF_20240817_EMSPL_E2_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84Mjc1NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3ODhiOTVhMS1mZDVjLWVmMTEtOTkxYS02MDQ1YmRkYmZjNGIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=4bZapKJOO-f6Tg0mNOV2MvYLYjJmHN_WsJfM2iLtBQQ=)

clean_body: | Hi friend, Rebecca Cooke – daughter of dairy farmers and the newly-elected Democratic nominee in Wisconsin's 3rd District! I JUST won the primary, and am now working to unseat Derrick Van Orden in this key battleground race for House control. To kick off our General Election push, I wanted to re-introduce myself: A lot of folks are surprised to learn that while I’m running a full-fledged campaign by day, I’m waiting tables at night to help pay the bills. = I grew up in a working-class family, and we weren't strangers to taking on extra work when things got tough. I know for a fact I’m not the only person in WI-03 wearing multiple hats to make ends meet -- which is a big reason why I’m running. The way I see it, the ultra-rich have enough advocates in Washington. It’s the folks working two jobs to pay for groceries and make rent who need help. I know what working families need, because I’m part of one. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation between Rebecca Cooke and NewDems will go through immediately: | = = = = = This is a campaign by and for the hard working people of Wisconsin. We’re not funded by family inheritances or wealthy donors. It’s grassroots contributors like you who power this movement. # UCP Meet Up | August 18th

Dear United College Park Community, We want to thank everyone who came out today to support our pop-up sale! The response was incredible, and it’s clear that our movement is gaining momentum. Seeing so many of you proudly wearing the United College Park t-shirts is a testament to the strength of our community.

| | [ Learn more about United College Park ](https://exeprx.clicks.mlsend.com/tf/cl/eyJ2Ijoie1wiYVwiOjEwNTM2NTUsXCJsXCI6MTI5OTY1OTY3NDk1MTM2NDY4LFwiclwiOjEyOTk2NTk2ODA0NTYzODg3OX0iLCJzIjoiNGQ0MDRmMzY3NzhkNGYxYyJ9)
---
|
---
|
---
|
---
But we’re not stopping there! Tomorrow, we’re hosting a community meetup, and we’d love for you to join us. This is a great opportunity to connect with fellow neighbors, discuss the future of our city, and learn how you can be more involved in making College Park the community we all deserve. **Meetup Details:** 🗓 **Date:** Sunday, August 17th 🕒 **Time:** 3:00 p.m. – 4:00 p.m. 📍 **Location:** Restoration Christian Fellowship Center, 2451 Roosevelt Hwy, College Park, GA 30337 Whether you’re new to the movement or have been with us from the start, your voice and your presence make a difference. Let’s come together to continue the important work we’ve started. See you tomorrow!

|

|
##### United College Park
1596 West Cleveland Ave, Unit 103, East Point
United States of America |

# UCP Meet Up | August 18th

Dear United College Park Community, We want to thank everyone who came out today to support our pop-up sale! The response was incredible, and it’s clear that our movement is gaining momentum. Seeing so many of you proudly wearing the United College Park t-shirts is a testament to the strength of our community.

| | [ Learn more about United College Park ](https://exeprx.clicks.mlsend.com/tj/c/eyJ2Ijoie1wiYVwiOjEwNTM2NTUsXCJsXCI6MTI5OTY2MjE3NTMyMjc4MjM3LFwiclwiOjEyOTk2NjIxNzk0MDE3NDc5M30iLCJzIjoiODQ4NGU2YjlmOWJjMmQzZiJ9)

body:
[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/62?t=1001&akid=7269%2E5257348%2ETBulNc ]Adam Schiff for Senate

“A sick person” “Freakish” “A b-tch”

Derek — These
are some of the insults Donald Trump has thrown at Adam, Governor Tim
Walz, and Vice President Kamala Harris in the last week.

As you well know, these attacks are nothing new.

But as we get closer to Election Day, and as the pressure on Donald mounts
as he falters in the polls and sees his rival’s campaign rallies grow
larger in size, the former president is ramping up his insults and
attacks. And we have to respond. Today.

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=aug2024_abs_em.nPj3QZ&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_RES_AC90_20240817_PM2_V1_S1&email=&t=1004&akid=7269%2E5257348%2ETBulNc ]Derek,
will you rush in a contribution of any amount to help our campaign reach
our $50,000 rapid response goal before midnight to respond to Trump’s
dangerous lies and attacks on Democrats’ records? With less than 12 weeks
until the election, we need to respond — now.

If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your
donation will go through immediately:

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/2142?c0=aug2024_abs_em.ioBfWL&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_RES_AC90_20240817_PM2_V1_S1&email=&amount=5&t=1005&akid=7269%2E5257348%2ETBulNc ]EXPRESS DONATE

Donald Trump is back on Twitter and buddying up to Elon Musk, the
wealthiest person on earth.

For Trump, Musk is just another rich buddy who Trump can use for free
advertising and campaign donations.

But it’s more than just Musk: a pro-Trump super PAC is spending $100
million on ads in the next 3 weeks, smearing Kamala Harris and Democrats’
record across the airwaves during the Democratic National Convention.

Trump is feeling the pressure. He’s fixated on Democrats’ momentum in
swing states across the country, and he’s lashing out the only way he
knows how: with insults and personal attacks.

And there is big money backing him up.

We’re only going to hear more from Donald Trump in these final 12 weeks.
He will become more vicious.

Adam is preparing to respond to these attacks and hold Trump accountable
for his terrible record — just as he has for the last several years.

The last place Trump wants Adam to be is the United States Senate, which
is why he continues to bring up Adam’s name and tries to sully it.

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=aug2024_abs_em.nPj3QZ&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_RES_AC90_20240817_PM2_V1_S1&email=&t=1011&akid=7269%2E5257348%2ETBulNc ]Derek, we
need to make sure that we reach our $50,000 rapid response goal by
midnight tonight. We need these resources to send Adam to the Senate and
elect Vice President Harris to keep Trump away from the White House. Pitch
in by midnight tonight.

name: Team Lucas Kunce
subject: Does Josh Hawley know the Olympics are over?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Lucas Kunce for Missouri
body:
Someone’s gotta tell him...
#
Peter,
**From the way Josh Hawley is running from having a televised debate with Lucas, he must think he’s in Paris and not Missouri.**
[](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/67133?refcode=em20240817-7365&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=7365%2E614464%2ENRWHN7)
**[DEFEAT JOSH HAWLEY](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/67133?refcode=em20240817-7365&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=7365%2E614464%2ENRWHN7)**
Just moments after Lucas won the official Democratic nomination in Missouri’s U.S. Senate race, he challenged Hawley to a series of five televised debates — with one even on Fox News. **Hawley refused.**
[](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/67133?refcode=em20240817-7365&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=3&akid=7365%2E614464%2ENRWHN7)
Maybe he’s afraid of Lucas’ unifying message, or his own abysmal record when it comes to actually delivering for Missouri in the Senate. Maybe he knows that he’s the most vulnerable GOP Senator up for re-election this November. Or maybe he really believes the Olympics are still going on, and his sprint out of the Capitol on January 6th was enough to qualify for the 100-meter dash.
[](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/67133?refcode=em20240817-7365&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=4&akid=7365%2E614464%2ENRWHN7)
**[Will you stand with Lucas in Missouri’s U.S. Senate race this year by donating any amount to his campaign today? Real people like you, not corporate PACs, are going to help us deliver Lucas’ message to voters, fight back against Hawley’s weird false attacks, and defeat Hawley this November. Are you in?](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/67133?refcode=em20240817-7365&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=5&akid=7365%2E614464%2ENRWHN7)**
If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly:
[Contribute $10](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/67134?refcode=em20240817-7365&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=10&t=6&akid=7365%2E614464%2ENRWHN7) [Contribute $25](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/67134?refcode=em20240817-7365&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=25&t=7&akid=7365%2E614464%2ENRWHN7) [Contribute $30](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/67134?refcode=em20240817-7365&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=30&t=8&akid=7365%2E614464%2ENRWHN7) [Contribute $50](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/67134?refcode=em20240817-7365&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=50&t=9&akid=7365%2E614464%2ENRWHN7) [Contribute $100](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/67134?refcode=em20240817-7365&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=100&t=10&akid=7365%2E614464%2ENRWHN7) [Contribute $250](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/67134?refcode=em20240817-7365&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=250&t=11&akid=7365%2E614464%2ENRWHN7) [Give another amount](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/67133?refcode=em20240817-7365&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=12&akid=7365%2E614464%2ENRWHN7)

name: Illinois Review
subject: BREAKING: DNC Attendees to Receive Free Abortions and Vasectomies
body:
In what seems like a headline out of the Babylon Bee, one of the perks being offered to DNC attendees is free abortions and vasectomies.

view in browser (https://mailchi.mp/37f8f0b0f3da/exclusive-donald-trump-jr-draws-large-crowds-receives-lifetime-membership-10345978?e=1cb5fdae9e) | update preferences (https://illinoisreview.us14.list-manage.com/profile?u=811d47b3c0783e80274d515f7&id=1a5a561027&e=1cb5fdae9e&c=00dcd07691) | unsubscribe (https://illinoisreview.us14.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=811d47b3c0783e80274d515f7&id=1a5a561027&t=b&e=1cb5fdae9e&c=00dcd07691)
https://www.illinoisreview.com/?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=00dcd07691-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_10_30_09_24_COPY_02&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-8b40ac336f-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D
This IR e-Blast Powered By:
https://www.bestdental.org/?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=00dcd07691-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_10_30_09_24_COPY_02&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-8b40ac336f-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D

Dear Peter,

We thought you may be interested to read this BREAKING news from Illinois Review, the largest conservative media source in Illinois, and the only source that has been shared by President Donald Trump.
Chicago DNC Convention Attendees to Receive Free Abortions, Vasectomies as Men Face Wait List (https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2024/08/chicago-dnc-convention-attendees-to-receive-free-abortions-vasectomies-as-men-face-wait-list.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=00dcd07691-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_10_30_09_24_COPY_02&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-8b40ac336f-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)
https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2024/08/chicago-dnc-convention-attendees-to-receive-free-abortions-vasectomies-as-men-face-wait-list.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=00dcd07691-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_10_30_09_24_COPY_02&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-8b40ac336f-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D
As seen from an aerial view people enter the United Center in preparation for the Democratic National Convention on August 16, 2024 in Chicago, Illinois. (Photo by John Moore/Getty Images)
By Illinois Review

Official attendees at the Democratic National Convention in Chicago are set to receive a unique perk this week: free abortions or a vasectomy as Planned Parenthood Great Rivers in Missouri is deploying a mobile health center just blocks from the convention site.

Vasectomies will be offered on Monday only, and the wait list is growing according to the
New York Post (https://nypost.com/2024/08/17/us-news/free-abortions-vasectomies-will-be-available-to-dnc-attendees/?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=00dcd07691-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_10_30_09_24_COPY_02&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-8b40ac336f-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D) and the New York Times. Medication abortions will be available on Monday and Tuesday.
CLICK TO READ FULL ARTICLE (https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2024/08/chicago-dnc-convention-attendees-to-receive-free-abortions-vasectomies-as-men-face-wait-list.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=00dcd07691-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_10_30_09_24_COPY_02&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-8b40ac336f-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)
An appointment reservation form (https://docs.google.com/forms/d/1s1fPZo5AE5LOjtPvMahHVgwJP86a8RTk-U5GU8nyJ8g/viewform?edit_requested=true&utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=00dcd07691-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_10_30_09_24_COPY_02&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-8b40ac336f-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D) indicates that “Services will be provided on a sliding-fee scale – pay what you can get the health care you need.” The form then concludes with, “Please complete this interest form and we will follow up with you to book an appointment.”

The City of Chicago and Democratic National Committee officials are expecting
mass protests (https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2024/08/over-150-anti-israel-pro-communist-groups-join-nationwide-coalition-to-march-during-dnc-convention-in-chicago-next-week.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=00dcd07691-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_10_30_09_24_COPY_02&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-8b40ac336f-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D) during the convention, as more than 150 groups (https://www.marchondnc2024.org/join?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=00dcd07691-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_10_30_09_24_COPY_02&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-8b40ac336f-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D) have formed a nationwide coalition to march down city streets leading to the United Center – the site where delegates are expected to officially nominate Vice President Kamala Harris as their Democratic nominee for president.
CLICK TO READ FULL ARTICLE (https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2024/08/chicago-dnc-convention-attendees-to-receive-free-abortions-vasectomies-as-men-face-wait-list.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=00dcd07691-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_10_30_09_24_COPY_02&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-8b40ac336f-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)

clean_body: In what seems like a headline out of the Babylon Bee, one of the perks being offered to DNC attendees is free abortions and vasectomies. view in browser () | update preferences () | unsubscribe () This IR e-Blast Powered By: Dear Peter, We thought you may be interested to read this BREAKING news from Illinois Review, the largest conservative media source in Illinois, and the only source that has been shared by President Donald Trump. Chicago DNC Convention Attendees to Receive Free Abortions, Vasectomies as Men Face Wait List () As seen from an aerial view people enter the United Center in preparation for the Democratic National Convention on August 16, 2024 in Chicago, Illinois. (Photo by John Moore/Getty Images) By Illinois Review Official attendees at the Democratic National Convention in Chicago are set to receive a unique perk this week: free abortions or a vasectomy as Planned Parenthood Great Rivers in Missouri is deploying a mobile health center just blocks from the convention site. Vasectomies will be offered on Monday only, and the wait list is growing according to the New York Post () and the New York Times. Medication abortions will be available on Monday and Tuesday. CLICK TO READ FULL ARTICLE () An appointment reservation form () indicates that “Services will be provided on a sliding-fee scale – pay what you can get the health care you need.” The form then concludes with, “Please complete this interest form and we will follow up with you to book an appointment.” The City of Chicago and Democratic National Committee officials are expecting mass protests () during the convention, as more than 150 groups () have formed a nationwide coalition to march down city streets leading to the United Center – the site where delegates are expected to officially nominate Vice President Kamala Harris as their Democratic nominee for president. name: The Federalist Wire
subject: Republicans are stunned as massive shakeup hits the Trump campaign
body:
DAILY NEWS | August 18, 2024

Republicans are
stunned as massive shakeup hits the Trump campaign
The race
for the White House has gotten much tighter. But that could
change very soon.

Because the Trump campaign was
hit with a massive shakeup that's stunned Republicans.
➞ Continue Reading

TRENDING NEWS

Harris campaign website
exposed for one disturbing thing you have to see to believe

Kamala Harris and her
team have some crazy ideas posted on their website. But none as
insane as this.
➞ Continue Reading

Democrats' latest efforts
to ban presidential candidate from ballot has voters fuming

The Left are
desperate. They want to win the 2024 election even if it means
trying to bend the rules in their favor.
➞ Continue Reading

Leftist judge hands down
catastrophic decision that could be the death blow to Trump's
campaign

Donald Trump's legal
woes continue. The Left will do their best to make sure that
he'll never see light at the end of the tunnel.
➞ Continue Reading

ABOUT
US
The
Federalist Wire brings you dependable news that highlights the US
political landscape as well as the economy. We're here for
citizens who want to stay in the know. If you're particularly
interested in politics or economics, our regular news updates
will help keep you informed. If you're not especially interested
in the topics but know it's important to keep up, then our
reports will be simple to understand.

You know that the political and
economic worlds often collide, and that's why we provide you with
specific coverage. Our news team strives to pinpoint and report
the stories that interest you most. We keep our eyes on domestic
and international matters, both political and financial, so we
can help you stay on top of the latest happenings.

DISCLAIMER
Your privacy is important to us.
It is The Federalist Wire's policy to respect your privacy and
comply with any applicable law and regulation regarding any
personal information we may collect about you, including across
our website, and other sites we own and operate.

name: Mayra Flores
subject: Conceded my election.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Service and Honor
body:
This is probably the hardest email I’ve ever written.

| |
---
| | | | | | | | Friend \--
I wish things would have gone a different way... | **_Democrat Vicente Gonzalez holds back Republican surge, returns 34th Congressional District to Democratic control._**
---

This is probably the hardest email I've ever written.

**I 'm Mayra Flores, the America First Hispanic woman running in the biggest race in the nation.**

After we made history and flipped a blue seat red for the first time in 100 years, the Democrats threw the kitchen sink at me, **and I had to concede my race. **

[](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zeomvogmdppdtln895dbsr1kmempaulafr6nut8g_rp22sh2s8i6eoj6cjjmaoj6cph2bs)

---
Everyone expected me to just walk away - _but I 'm not someone who ever, ever gives up._

I'm taking a leap of faith here and have thrown my name on the ballot once again.

The Democrats overpowered us in this race before - _and now all indicators are pointing toward this election being a complete toss-up._

My stomach is in knots - **the Democrats have already raised an astonishing $30 MILLION, and Kamala Harris just raised $100 million bucks**(I know, I can't believe anyone would give her money either...but they do).

**That 's why I'm humbly asking for your help: _[Will you step up and chip in just a few bucks in the next hour to help us counter this massive Left-wing onslaught?](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zms76askftlkp576da0qonuqbj7mn0mq5bbjld5g_rp22sh2s8i6eoj6cjjmaoj6cph2bs "Will you step up and chip in just a few bucks in the next hour to help us counter this massive Left-wing onslaught?")_**

I'll just tell you: I'm afraid to see what happens if this email doesn't work.

**The Democrats & the media hacks are terrified of me - that's because as a young Hispanic female, I obliterate every woke narrative they push. So, they will truly do anything to destroy me.**

The Democrats know that if they lose the Hispanic vote, it's over for them. _Forever._

I'm opening my heart to you here: Please, please help out:
| | | [**CONTRIBUTE**](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zlhnvn55ruqjol72n0o109d6akhpmh8sdee2qnh0_rp22sh2s8i6eoj6cjjmaoj6cph2bs)
---
God bless you, and God bless America.

**Mayra Flores**
America First Candidate
Texas Congressional District 34

|
---
| | Paid for by Service and Honor
A joint fundraising committee established by Jake Ellzey for Congress and 31 Days PAC

Bethesda, MD 20824

body:
DAILY NEWS | August 18, 2024

Biden humiliated
during campaign rally after Kamala Harris and Leftist allies
abandon him
Joe Biden
has had a rough few months. And there doesn't seem to be any
light at the end of the tunnel for him.

As Biden was humiliated during a
campaign rally after Kamala Harris and Leftist allies abandoned
him.
➞ Continue Reading

TRENDING NEWS

Republicans are stunned as
massive shakeup hits the Trump campaign

The race for the
White House has gotten much tighter. But that could change very
soon.
➞ Continue Reading

Harris campaign website
exposed for one disturbing thing you have to see to believe

Kamala Harris and her
team have some crazy ideas posted on their website. But none as
insane as this.
➞ Continue Reading

Democrats' latest efforts
to ban presidential candidate from ballot has voters fuming

The Left are
desperate. They want to win the 2024 election even if it means
trying to bend the rules in their favor.
➞ Continue Reading

ABOUT
US
The
Federalist Wire brings you dependable news that highlights the US
political landscape as well as the economy. We're here for
citizens who want to stay in the know. If you're particularly
interested in politics or economics, our regular news updates
will help keep you informed. If you're not especially interested
in the topics but know it's important to keep up, then our
reports will be simple to understand.

You know that the political and
economic worlds often collide, and that's why we provide you with
specific coverage. Our news team strives to pinpoint and report
the stories that interest you most. We keep our eyes on domestic
and international matters, both political and financial, so we
can help you stay on top of the latest happenings.

_**3 minutes.**_
_**That’s all the time I’m asking for.**_
Patriot, this is Tulsi Gabbard, and your response right now is critical!
With the most critical election of our lives coming up in just a few short months, __**I’d like to know what’s on your mind and where you stand.**__
The political battle lines for 2024 have been drawn - and the freedoms and liberties we as Americans cherish are on the line.
__**Could you answer #4 for me?**__
I promise it will be a quick one!

clean_body: Friend, Right now, my father and our Republican Senate candidates are going up against a Dark Money Democrat war chest the likes of which our country has never seen before. " Harris announces record-breaking $310 million July fundraising haul" [NPR] " Money is flowing into down-ballot races, too" [Politico] And as we speak, the Left is preparing to use their war chest for an all-out blitz of vicious attack ads against four of our incredible candidates who all served in the military to keep our country SAFE: is a Purple Heart recipient and IED blast survivor who was willing to risk his life for the sake of our country. Talk about a patriot who puts America FIRST. legally came to the United States as a refugee in search of the American Dream. He chose to give back to our country by attending the U.S. Naval Academy and served for 25 years as a Navy Special Operations Officer, retiring as a Captain. That 's a man who will help SAVE AMERICA. is a former Navy SEAL officer who completed hundreds of missions, earning multiple combat decorations, including the Bronze Star with Valor for Heroism in Combat and the Purple Heart Medal. Now that 's an America First warrior. is a West Point graduate, combat veteran, and a Bronze star recipient. He's a national security expert and an experienced voice for how to overcome the threat from China. That 's who I trust to help keep us safe. Remember friend, while Kamala and the Democrats may be spending hundreds of millions of dollars, for us, it 's not about the money... ...Because money will NEVER be the singular factor that determines the STRENGTH of a movement like ours. And now more than ever, we need to show these four incredible Senate candidates just how many patriots are standing by their side. So please, take just a moment to answer this one question for me: ********** ******** Thank you, Donald Trump Jr. ********** | Paid for by the NRSC. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. Full Mag News PO Box 1177 Fort Collins, CO 80522 | _

This word stems from the Latin "humectant-," meaning "moistening," from "humēre," which means "to be moist." As a noun, "humectant" refers to a substance that reduces loss of moisture...

name: The Flyover
subject: Home-Buying Upheaval, Skills to Build Luck, and the Perfect Owl Selfie
body:
New residential real estate rules stemming from a 2023 legal decision [went into effect](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxs0DGPtCAQxvFPg51mGFCwoHgbun3bKw3qsMsFYYPsGr_9xa2uuGoyya_45_m6TTcXYkj3_24jU32e3FLDmybdct2inGSzGk-EJBoyXKEYtVZCNg8zovZSKupxmYXyvQI5CL7QCDMI7pcmGASUoLnmAEM_drLv-UzAZ1phVYNiEmgNNZfuO4dUH-Tjmd9UuiVvTTSPWp87E_8YWob2OI7utbuaV3degKHday4nQ7vlRNd9UtlzctGH5NJCDG0hF1vaq6vXd-UwtKAZWq4Y2kRH-4u07k6ptuUVL62kxn6QEuCiTTHr8wgxhv0Tft9ciJ_Q-vdsb4M_AQAA__9xwWys) across the nation yesterday.

| | |
---
| [](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskD2PozAQhn-N6YLsMR-mcBFdji53zUlXIoMH4pWNI3tgk3-_Ikq12mqkZ16N5nn_X4ercd6tyx8TUNMcBzOR23FQJ6FOUA1VYfWMCCgL1KIF2SnVyqq4adUBB8HHulFGgh1rUGCVHK0w0BmcC6eBQ8WVUILzpu7Kqq7FiFyMaLltm5ZVHK2jmMqP6Fa64eyfccdUTjEUXt-I7pnJM4OeQW8eLpcxLQz6afO0JTxRMmv2hmI6IrLfKAyTCXfjlpXJy_nhMoMa-Nm-xu9gnM8MmiOX45YmZPKCB33DgNZt4RskTAd6_xaMW9-LKa6EKzF56f3z747p178iaXv_dN67_NJbjjsvHfq53F3DVwAAAP___LN9XA)| |
# SUNDAY, AUGUST 18, 2024
---|---
**Good Morning**! On this date in 1920, a single vote in the Tennessee legislature ratified the 19th Amendment to the Constitution, giving women the right to vote across the United States. ([See Details](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxs0L1urDAQQOGngW6Q_wBTuLgN3d42JTLrYT2JsVd4BNq3j7JKmfo0n87Hbbl5SpQf__2Ojrey-DvTiYsFaUGZxbTBbYgKdYtOjkpP1o7atNHpcR1GP6DZ1kErnEJv9WbXVaOx1g6iJaeEMsJKK4UY-qkzfS9XFHLFIMI4jI0RGIjL0X0WyhxxS69y4tHdy94mF5mftdH_GjU3ar6uq4tUuRyvn96omSNVCP4FlOG3NGqWE0fwO-awY2Y4PNNGGIAxZ6wVETj6_FWBC5SMcBbG9nDheVFKVN-qx-4pvRX895PTqe8AAAD__5ogZhM))We're excited to announce the launch this Wednesday of _Flyover North Carolina,_ a daily newsletter to keep you up to date on events in the Tar Heel state. [Click here](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxs0DFPxCAUwPFPA9td4EELHRhMLh2MdTVODYXX9iktFw5r_PbG6HCD8_83_V-GcfCUaF-e_Yauznn0odKBoz1JewI9ah7djAioODppQHXWGqX56mLUE6CW0sRumnUwVtrowXdGhiBC4ORAgBZWWilE23Rn3TRyQiEnjCKa1jAtMFLN5fyWaa8rzukrH1jOIW88ubXW642pBwY9g_6v7bnUNfiSE-3-BzLoB79QeKL9nakembrE6yelRLfWMGi0WDZP6Ze2H3Vj6vL4you7U3eG1_8vHA6-AwAA__8P2F87) to automatically subscribe. Did you find something surprising in today's _Flyover?_ Let us know how we're doing by replying to this email. We're sponsored this weekend by [Axis](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskD2PozAQhn-N6YLsMR-mcBFdji53zUlXIoMH4pWNI3tgk3-_Ikq12mqkZ16N5nn_X4ercd6tyx8TUNMcBzOR23FQJ6FOUA1VYfWMCCgL1KIF2SnVyqq4adUBB8HHulFGgh1rUGCVHK0w0BmcC6eBQ8WVUILzpu7Kqq7FiFyMaLltm5ZVHK2jmMqP6Fa64eyfccdUTjEUXt-I7pnJM4OeQW8eLpcxLQz6afO0JTxRMmv2hmI6IrLfKAyTCXfjlpXJy_nhMoMa-Nm-xu9gnM8MmiOX45YmZPKCB33DgNZt4RskTAd6_xaMW9-LKa6EKzF56f3z747p178iaXv_dN67_NJbjjsvHfq53F3DVwAAAP___LN9XA), a Christian newsletter to help you stay informed about culture trends impacting your teenager's world.
|
---
## New Rules Upend Home Buying
New residential real estate rules stemming from a 2023 legal decision [went into effect](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxs0DGPtCAQxvFPg51mGFCwoHgbun3bKw3qsMsFYYPsGr_9xa2uuGoyya_45_m6TTcXYkj3_24jU32e3FLDmybdct2inGSzGk-EJBoyXKEYtVZCNg8zovZSKupxmYXyvQI5CL7QCDMI7pcmGASUoLnmAEM_drLv-UzAZ1phVYNiEmgNNZfuO4dUH-Tjmd9UuiVvTTSPWp87E_8YWob2OI7utbuaV3degKHday4nQ7vlRNd9UtlzctGH5NJCDG0hF1vaq6vXd-UwtKAZWq4Y2kRH-4u07k6ptuUVL62kxn6QEuCiTTHr8wgxhv0Tft9ciJ_Q-vdsb4M_AQAA__9xwWys) across the nation yesterday.The policies move away from the traditional 6% commission for realtors drawn from the sale price. [Sellers must now decide](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxs0LFuwyAUheGnsTci4GIDA0OXbOna0QJzbd8WmwiIo759lcwdj87y6f-6TTdPiY710-_o2pInPzc6cTJMGCbVpProFkSJ0KMTWoI1RoPqN2etneOijdE2ROSD4nEE4GZUSiwhYE9Ocqm4EUZwPg72ooZBBOQiYORRj7pTHCO1XC7fmY624ZJ-84nlMue9T25r7V47-OjktZNXfz_wWV_Xa5RGc8JOXgv6xLA235CFkn-wML_i0dic951qpXxUVh4JK9vyo9KxMggYJXihrfABFglgECIXg5jBjtr0xcX7k1Ki-jauu6f0NrX_C51O_gUAAP__mVJn7w) whether and how much to pay the buyer's broker.On the other side, buyers must enter into a contractual agreement with a realtor before home showings, potentially having to pay their agent the agreed-upon commission themselves.While giving more control to sellers, critics argue the new rules add [another layer of complexity](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskLuO6yAUAL8GOiyehhQUt3GX225pYXwwJ4shskmi_P1qU28_0ozm6zpfAxas2_-wg--pzSF2fMLsmHBM6lnT1ScACYqCF1aqi3NWaZq9ddaGMAZtNBcqiphGa51NF-OWGOJC0UsuNXfCCc5Hcxm0MWIBLhZY-WpHSzSHFXs7hlvD2jOk8m5POIbYdlp87v1-EvWPyInIKWENNcLwDrm1X4LIqcLrJHJaHm-sGwsst8cJ7PY4O9taZ_3A-I1wMCEUN8oINeS-F3r49f7CUvD8NGx7wPJx9r8PPL38CQAA__8PBl2K) to the home-buying process.
## Fire Closes Historic Somerset House
[A fire at Somerset House](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxsj72OgzAQBp_G7oLsxYBduLiGLtdeifyzDhsZnIAFytufkjrdJ33SjObvOl0dZVpvv25BW1OZXKh04KQvUl9ATYpHmxABW45WDtAarYdW8dmaXnmtTQDtTJ-MSsaHDqUMKZg29o6TBQFKaKmlEH1nGtV10qOQHqOIQz8wJTBSLVtzL7TWGVN-lQO3JpSFZzvX-thZ-8NgZDCe59l4H94fg3HFc2cwuq1SyPie4XnPg1hfIj8L32x8nJQz7R_LbXGUP9T6vfGw8B8AAP__rf9Tlg) in London forced the historic landmark to close Saturday as 125 members of the London Fire Brigade fought to contain the blaze.[No works of art were damaged](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskLHOpCAURp8GOwxcULGg2IZutt3SoFyUHZQJ4JjZp9849d9--ZJzcv48pocNMRzrb7ujrj5NdqnhjZOiXFGQk2yc9oiAokHNBxCjUoOQzaZn0SmhGI6i65XgY8_Be1BqZlY61_kmaGAgmeKKM9Z3Yyu7js_I-IyOuaEfiGToQk25_ZvCUTf08ZPemNsl7U3UW62vQsQvAoaAua6rrRuup80u2OP-EDDnkx54FQLG5hqWiATMTb2HcyVg-EDAlLRjLljpls6ClDNGfcjow7pVzIVWuzzvCHSO9h9SW2lMh0sHXW2MmD9N1u51hRhD-Vqvuw3xa1l_bvbW8D8AAP__hspuzg), and no injuries were reported, in the palace, which now serves as an arts venue.Somerset House was [built in 1547](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskDGTpCAQRn8NZj0FLSoGBJeY7aUXWiitcoe0BYxbs7_-aife5Eu-5L3352P-cCGGtP92J9m68ezWGm6aDSgDqGfdeLsRIbUNWTVgOxoztLo5rNI9-pFapZ1Bh2pBPWopjeuNIXTUBIsStTTKKCn7bnzorlMLSbWQl37oB6El-VA5P_5ySPWgLb74pvxY-WyiPWq9imh_CZwETm5Zh_T6vgROF5cqcCp8Ui5U4eBnIdhCJlii-yKg_LxqgSOUyjmsEDl5TrA8Q_Qh7XDwSbC7GCm_wOX6yfkf3C7BzvsBJyeqcLrvXenLpUQCJ9Wpse9GI3BqsvXXZ4gxlLfGfroQ39j154i3xf8BAAD__3SadjM), then demolished and rebuilt in the 1700s. It contains works by Van Gogh, Monet, and Cezanne, among others.
## List: Most In-Demand U.S. Destinations
The beach community of Destin, Fla., [tops a new ranking](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskL2O6yAQRp8Gd1gw4BgXFLdxl9tuaREYx6z4iczE1r79Kq63-6QjfTo6X_fl7mKK5fnfZbS01sV5igcuhkvDQS-6C3ZFBFQdWjmCmowZle426zxInAajjPFO6ckBgh-NWJVAMdzWLloQoIWRRgpxG6ZeD4N8oJAPDCKMt5FpgSFS3fvvGgttuKafeuDe-5q7ZDeiV2PqH4OZwXyeZ-_Lw38gg_lzzWAWhsEsRwbzVjNSfVaeayMeCw-YXQn83Xh754w7P5x3FOuHNIrl2q3fKKdut-F1xpRiu6ye2cV0WdDfTQ4LvwEAAP__Qoljow) of the most in-demand affordable summer destinations in the U.S.The list is dominated by Southeastern destinations, with Myrtle Beach, S.C., and Gulf Shores, Ala., in the top three, along with Destin. The only West Coast representative is San Diego, at number 10.The rankings considered searches with check-in dates from June 20th to September 22nd and only destinations with a median price per night of less than $200. We have never seen anything like what we are seeing today in America!

This sponsored message from Reclaiming American Freedom is on behalf of Hillsdale College

| | | [](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=816873b4e48347578098320d2cac2494&_e=EB0hgWnXwgmQrXL_ex6_jCKyqqB82IfENQKp3_dsT2g_9k-r9wFQnbTJG5nQnoerIGNrv94GFbfvKLnXg6MRG0R9F7iC1hefngi2D0F8qshyfXB2G-AhxQskFJwwcE06jeutvtAs5VOFI7wdwNUzCjMrDHm217r6xC7ptmF5f-Sbe7nJVWF3kt3S7Mt-KnTF9fcTcQhCH8ogYBDY2kCRuZD6ku2z8XxJ3yEQWqUHyYTqZSfPE9PtnTvgQG6eg-YAvedcXbAOFl-fw23Gurk9bvnskJkYYNCfYig9d24a6noh9e9XSgSHWmJqZaA78XsYQwSyGRMQxt3aElow7pJPOCg38U5WyMHqFhc97mjDA_WEBvnRSWQ26rA3glpTVJSmOILnbG-Jv5QTA_16EyAelQ%3D%3D)
---
| | Fellow American,

Over the last year, the agenda of the far Left, along with its media and Big Tech allies, has become all too clear.

Together, these forces want to **circumvent the First Amendment, suppress conservative speech and political activity** , and push their own **false** and **dishonest** narrative about American history and about what's happening today.

More and more, stories that question the far-Left's narrative are dubiously "fact-checked" or censored outright, while conservative opponents of the Left are "de-platformed."

**We have never seen anything like what we are seeing today in America!**

The roots of our current crisis can be traced to the late 1960s when radicals who scorned America and its way of life began taking over our colleges and universities.

It took them several decades to cement their dominance over American higher education, but we are seeing the fruits of their labors today: we see it in the media, and we see it in Silicon Valley.

We are also seeing it in professional sports, in corporate America--much of which is now capitulating to far-Left demands--and increasingly in K-12 education.

**Liberty in America is under serious threat. As I travel around the country, worried citizens ask me if there is a way to meet this crisis. I never hesitate to say there is, despite how uphill the fight may seem.**

A vital part of the fight--and one in which Hillsdale College is uniquely able to lead--is to reach and teach additional millions of citizens with the TRUTH about America's great heritage of liberty.

**You are making that fight possible by supporting our educational outreach efforts, such as _Imprimis_ , America's leading digest of liberty.**

Hillsdale launched _Imprimis_ over 50 years ago to promote limited government, free enterprise, individual rights, personal responsibility, and a strong national defense. Each issue covers a timely political, economic, or cultural issue from a constitutional perspective.

Today, with the far Left's dramatic escalation of its assault on free speech and informed patriotism, _Imprimis_ is more critical than ever.

Think of what we have seen in the last few years: unprecedented and unconstitutional lockdowns, lawless violence in our cities, and even the destruction of historical monuments.

On top of this, we are now seeing an escalation of the effort to shut off any debate about these issues--an effort to limit or curtail speech that is **simply** and **clearly un-American**.

There is a good reason that conservative radio and TV host Mark Levin says _Imprimis_ is the publication he most looks forward to reading each month.

You'll be pleased to know that its circulation has grown this year to more than 6.6 million. That's 6.6 million paper copies that are **mailed to homes and businesses** ten times per year.

Our research also shows that _Imprimis_ subscribers share their copy with two to three other people on average, giving _Imprimis_ even greater reach and influence.

And while a circulation of more than 6.6 million is undoubtedly impressive--_Imprimis_ has a greater circulation than the _Wall Street Journal_ and _The New York Times_ --we are determined to do more.

Since _Imprimis_ launched in 1972 with a circulation of about 1,000, **Hillsdale College has never charged for a subscription.**

**But the fact that we offer _Imprimis_ free of charge does not mean that producing and mailing _Imprimis_ is without cost. **

Even using non-profit postage rates, the price for printing and mailing each issue of _Imprimis_ to so many subscribers ten times a year is a significant financial undertaking.

**Our immediate goal is to increase the circulation of _Imprimis_ to over 7 million American households and businesses this year. To do so, we must address the question of production and mailing costs.**

Your generous support today will help us reach our _Imprimis_ goal and expand our other successful educational outreach efforts.

You know that education is liberty's surest defense--and that education is needed now more than ever!

That's why, in addition to _Imprimis_ , we are investing in our other educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty. We're doing this through our **[Project to Defend Liberty Nationwide by Reaching and Teaching Millions](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=816873b4e48347578098320d2cac2494&_e=EB0hgWnXwgmQrXL_ex6_jCKyqqB82IfENQKp3_dsT2g_9k-r9wFQnbTJG5nQnoerIGNrv94GFbfvKLnXg6MRG0R9F7iC1hefngi2D0F8qshyfXB2G-AhxQskFJwwcE06jeutvtAs5VOFI7wdwNUzCjMrDHm217r6xC7ptmF5f-Sbe7nJVWF3kt3S7Mt-KnTF9fcTcQhCH8ogYBDY2kCRuZD6ku2z8XxJ3yEQWqUHyYTqZSfPE9PtnTvgQG6eg-YAarbkMNYxTIwo_Vs-_m4IxAcqAA0GlqWpxH2DheTVgQ9-cUvc4cJFm3dirxZxAJ1VhfTbuw_tX9fvbtv5txmWRFgChdYPdmMvIBAHduF0UGPlmtYR7hfpm2S4ItU7Olt4-6HQWHdAgv_cMzbssSVRcg%3D%3D).**

These efforts include:

* **Educating millions of Americans, especially younger Americans, through free online courses** --on topics including the Constitution, American history, and free-market economics.

* **Providing hundreds of thousands of young Americans with free copies of the Declaration of Independence and Constitution** --Hillsdale has already distributed over 600,000 free copies of these founding documents, and we receive more requests every week.

* **Educating thousands of K-12 students** in Hillsdale-affiliated classical K-12 public and private schools--there are already more than 90 such schools across the country, each having a strong curricular component in American civics.

I hope you'll agree that after everything we've seen in the last few years, the need for _Imprimis_ and Hillsdale's other educational outreach efforts is undeniable.

Hillsdale is the only college in America equipped to **reach** and **teach** increasing millions of Americans about our nation's great heritage of liberty and about the need to defend freedom and limited government.

Almost unique among American colleges and universities, Hillsdale refuses to accept ONE PENNY of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants and loans. This frees us from much burdensome and corrupting federal regulation.

**This independence from the government also means that our work is entirely dependent on the generous support of private citizens, like you, who understand the importance of education to liberty.**

[ Will you give generously to our **Project to Defend Liberty Nationwide by Reaching and Teaching Millions** --which includes expanding the reach and influence of _Imprimis_](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=816873b4e48347578098320d2cac2494&_e=EB0hgWnXwgmQrXL_ex6_jCKyqqB82IfENQKp3_dsT2g_9k-r9wFQnbTJG5nQnoerIGNrv94GFbfvKLnXg6MRG0R9F7iC1hefngi2D0F8qshyfXB2G-AhxQskFJwwcE06jeutvtAs5VOFI7wdwNUzCjMrDHm217r6xC7ptmF5f-Sbe7nJVWF3kt3S7Mt-KnTF9fcTcQhCH8ogYBDY2kCRuZD6ku2z8XxJ3yEQWqUHyYTqZSfPE9PtnTvgQG6eg-YAE9-RnK3JF-BfEcWShGdGRz62M3Kf86mdGZclnDI-Jy4CfIL0PvQC8Bk3B9gZ_KdUZIBhMDom72JQR1HjkZtXXZ0u6k7Tw7ZJBCDn485ovbfIgyDIHzGT0WIkQVB9a1XnKQsLbvFqT1nwSLc7gVs7lg%3D%3D)?

If you agree that we are now seeing an unprecedented assault on American principles and the American way of life, please show your support for Hillsdale College with a generous tax-deductible gift today.

I hope you will stand with us as we engage the far Left, along with its media and Big Tech allies, on the battlefield of education.

Warm regards,

Larry P. Arnn
President, Hillsdale College
Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844

P.S. Liberty in America is under threat, and education is the only long-term solution. That's why we are greatly expanding our national educational outreach, such as _Imprimis_ , free online courses, K-12 curricula and support, and much more. And we need your help to do so! Please make a generous, tax-deductible gift in support of liberty and education at this secure link: **[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/defend-liberty](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=816873b4e48347578098320d2cac2494&_e=EB0hgWnXwgmQrXL_ex6_jCKyqqB82IfENQKp3_dsT2g_9k-r9wFQnbTJG5nQnoerIGNrv94GFbfvKLnXg6MRG0R9F7iC1hefngi2D0F8qshyfXB2G-AhxQskFJwwcE06jeutvtAs5VOFI7wdwNUzCjMrDHm217r6xC7ptmF5f-Sbe7nJVWF3kt3S7Mt-KnTF9fcTcQhCH8ogYBDY2kCRuZD6ku2z8XxJ3yEQWqUHyYTqZSfPE9PtnTvgQG6eg-YAecjmRy8A-6NLchpxA4HN7j4BAG4lZI_FkfK_DAf0bidWNC6muATJ0PbcqlR8SX3ipiIVXiwfECyn3APnmylCKKGwCqdO7UcvbFf6LKeid5H78_wfdAGpr5bFC4atJlNpld_z0kfaDh6bgVvCeFPF_w%3D%3D)**.

Thank you again for saving young people through education.
---
| |
---

Reclaiming American Freedom
---
_PO Box 461 Fort Collins, CO 80522_

name: Mayra Flores
subject: Conceded my election.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Service and Honor
body:
This is probably the hardest email I’ve ever written.

| |
---
| | | | | | | | Friend --
I wish things would have gone a different way... | **_Democrat Vicente Gonzalez holds back Republican surge, returns 34th Congressional District to Democratic control._**
---

This is probably the hardest email I've ever written.

**I 'm Mayra Flores, the America First Hispanic woman running in the biggest race in the nation.**

After we made history and flipped a blue seat red for the first time in 100 years, the Democrats threw the kitchen sink at me, **and I had to concede my race. **

[](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=60f5e2a864c74cd0bd1e22c2b85416fa&_e=Fmf2srA01ey4bvPOUBbdnv_Ct-vMSTVLqvyz4vYtt3xb-5LOCHuXlFQ8svYwVEK7vfe44Wg1QYuSHmLJA3uQjhdbQ86B5PvWYPGi9lscsNhpVQWfHOW3j44-Oo-6E1Hpigibsoy8rH1A-i1UX7U8DCe13SCZG1ZKl-8YQNr8XZaYDeBUXkFTY2naOz-eR0btBbS_aIH0eJJVW_XQ8AMAu-jbGMGvMexX0_xsPIRGWSlyU2iK7w8gGkBgxtpVRJgy8HJnzZLOVftZI0_wuhdAicHiAqqhG_AxM3Nt_LAL1HgnhsuvlFtPyYajJ0OcsYC22stI8VO26ydK7bi7l6krGAHqPEuOkiAFlzUPNLgEAGtz__tW8Fk1CjnLZByDJLKff1hrMd7FhO1y8pfM0rozyZ3ombkngN9NkJinHME214YQO_dulSTRCIB-O8buS2q9xQOYFjps_vuZcGQfHa0icT8-qDJSzVt9gu8xagNqCVE%3D)

---
Everyone expected me to just walk away - _but I 'm not someone who ever, ever gives up._

I'm taking a leap of faith here and have thrown my name on the ballot once again.

The Democrats overpowered us in this race before - _and now all indicators are pointing toward this election being a complete toss-up._

My stomach is in knots - **the Democrats have already raised an astonishing $30 MILLION, and Kamala Harris just raised $100 million bucks**(I know, I can't believe anyone would give her money either...but they do).

**That 's why I'm humbly asking for your help: _[Will you step up and chip in just a few bucks in the next hour to help us counter this massive Left-wing onslaught?](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=60f5e2a864c74cd0bd1e22c2b85416fa&_e=Fmf2srA01ey4bvPOUBbdnv_Ct-vMSTVLqvyz4vYtt3xb-5LOCHuXlFQ8svYwVEK7vfe44Wg1QYuSHmLJA3uQjhdbQ86B5PvWYPGi9lscsNhpVQWfHOW3j44-Oo-6E1Hpigibsoy8rH1A-i1UX7U8DCe13SCZG1ZKl-8YQNr8XZaYDeBUXkFTY2naOz-eR0btBbS_aIH0eJJVW_XQ8AMAu-jbGMGvMexX0_xsPIRGWSlyU2iK7w8gGkBgxtpVRJgy8HJnzZLOVftZI0_wuhdAicHiAqqhG_AxM3Nt_LAL1HgnhsuvlFtPyYajJ0OcsYC29uv2IrO6TD8mpvjvEuIQ6bcIfXYF0QLDLgWwjP4oR_jwgzEWZQvQSjnvZvddEu552yUFrSxI8O2ItdDTEYoZdsPqTrW2DgX6OFM5s6AeEKaqB4gnXKOvdYDwIiUfJkG4lDWilPslV3k8PJQHtaZpn1GUPXf5jiFqfy-TS_n1Z8c%3D "Will you step up and chip in just a few bucks in the next hour to help us counter this massive Left-wing onslaught?")_**

I'll just tell you: I'm afraid to see what happens if this email doesn't work.

**The Democrats & the media hacks are terrified of me - that's because as a young Hispanic female, I obliterate every woke narrative they push. So, they will truly do anything to destroy me.**

The Democrats know that if they lose the Hispanic vote, it's over for them. _Forever._

I'm opening my heart to you here: Please, please help out:
| | | [**CONTRIBUTE**](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=60f5e2a864c74cd0bd1e22c2b85416fa&_e=Fmf2srA01ey4bvPOUBbdnv_Ct-vMSTVLqvyz4vYtt3xb-5LOCHuXlFQ8svYwVEK7vfe44Wg1QYuSHmLJA3uQjhdbQ86B5PvWYPGi9lscsNhpVQWfHOW3j44-Oo-6E1Hpigibsoy8rH1A-i1UX7U8DCe13SCZG1ZKl-8YQNr8XZaYDeBUXkFTY2naOz-eR0btBbS_aIH0eJJVW_XQ8AMAu-jbGMGvMexX0_xsPIRGWSlyU2iK7w8gGkBgxtpVRJgy8HJnzZLOVftZI0_wuhdAicHiAqqhG_AxM3Nt_LAL1HgnhsuvlFtPyYajJ0OcsYC2wlQIKcP-VfGo7572C3xypfz7Lu8jw2y6LMwlzTzXng9DJUB2tILffVw-leS4v9f4YVvcRHmdkKYo05LGwkYLQYU_9OvJAcP7hx33yDA5DohlZ6Y0tghqjO5HruyYi63zmH5YU-VPCRdPmYP8QmfWwsyyjGo8HDzo7Kt0wlAVgmY%3D)
---
God bless you, and God bless America.

**Mayra Flores**
America First Candidate
Texas Congressional District 34

name: Rebecca Cooke
subject: It’s official. I’m the Democratic nominee in WI-03
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Blue Amp Action PAC
body:
| | | |
---
| | | | |
---
| _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T32a988e6-2564-4430-adfe-c028f1145082/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
---
| Hi Peter, Rebecca Cooke – daughter of dairy farmers and the newly-elected Democratic nominee in Wisconsin's 3rd District!
I JUST won the primary, and am now working to unseat Derrick Van Orden in this key battleground race for House control. To kick off our General Election push, I wanted to re-introduce myself:

A lot of folks are surprised to learn that while I’m running a full-fledged campaign by day, I’m waiting tables at night to help pay the bills. [](https://default.salsalabs.org/T059b8a00-12e7-4ead-b5f0-dfbdc6bdfa84/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) I grew up in a working-class family, and we weren't strangers to taking on extra work when things got tough. I know for a fact I’m not the only person in WI-03 wearing multiple hats to make ends meet -- which is a big reason why I’m running. The way I see it, the ultra-rich have enough advocates in Washington. It’s the folks working two jobs to pay for groceries and make rent who need help. I know what working families need, because I’m part of one.

[We’re officially on to November, but we have to act fast to make up the special interest money Derrick Van Orden has banked. Can you split a donation of $10 between me and Blue Amp Action to help flip WI-03 blue?](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tace73fdb-f777-45dc-a733-ca5b996c0f85/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | [Donate Here >>](https://default.salsalabs.org/T52a1bf26-bb14-427f-a053-92a7ae09713e/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| This is a campaign by and for the hard working people of Wisconsin. We’re not funded by family inheritances or wealthy donors. It’s grassroots contributors like you who power this movement. Thank you for your support, Rebecca
---

| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tf30bc973-6682-4417-8440-6f893b84b936/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

**Projection** is a psychological defense mechanism where a person avoids recognizing their own faults by projecting them onto someone else. This literally defines Democrats today. Consider this... 1) Kamala Harris says Donald Trump is **_"afraid"_** to debate her despite the fact she can't speak off the cuff for more than 30 seconds before she spirals into a circular word salad of meaningless nonsense or erupts into a fit of obnoxious cackling. It's why Harris won't do interviews and why she is "afraid" to debate Donald Trump. 2) Tim Walz says JD Vance is _**"weird"** _despite the fact that Walz, as governor, put tampons in boys' bathrooms and went to Communist China for his honeymoon. Now, that's weird. 3) And now the Harris-Walz campaign is accusing Donald Trump and JD Vance of being **"_weak on border security"_ **despite Harris vowing to eliminate ICE and Walz vowing to start a "ladder factory" to help illegal immigrants invade our country. The Democrats have officially become the **Party of Projection**. And now, with the support of the legacy media, America will become the victim of their evil PSYOP unless we fight back! Here's how ... Democrats pushed Joe Biden out of the race to achieve one primary goal – to protect their Senate candidates in down-ballot races. You see, Democrats believe they must have a "Senate firewall" to stop President Trump's second-term agenda if he wins the White House. **Therefore, there is no better way to make them pay than to DEFEAT the very Senate candidates they seek to protect.** **[**Please take action to help defeat liberal Senate candidates and elect strong conservatives!**](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=4bb0c3e3c43945419eb24d6934edd932&_e=gdGIRfYzLS13JKdSEFUsb04etcXHE-BMUM8CYQs-OjihjBnNvsHY6LXbNvucb3gI4KUXCMJhCA8g3hetP-vbd5tx3Q2fA4fmx5gV6l25bVWmePKoeOPi9L9iLWCYW10bXkvfSNxCt_lD6uAquN4x-QGOARKj0Mr5iLkjZjhDkHwbT474mUKQ-idSVh1HxsZuCjVg5quqfdFe_7XXn4LeTNY12dNWz_7MreA1vMOfLDTCdroXYqt93J5Ov3VTWUv9)** We have identified eight battleground Senate races where your help is urgently needed.

Peter,

Yet _another poll_ is out on the New Mexico Senate race that shows us **closing in on Martin Heinrich.**

Here’s what the latest poll shows:
* We’re only six points down
* Heinrich polling his lowest ever at only 40%
* 21% of voters are undecided!

Remember, this is a seat that the mainstream media is telling us was _supposed_ to be safe blue, and the Democrats NEVER thought would be in danger.

It is telling that a career politician like Heinrich— _who has been in the Senate for over a decade_ —has 60% of voters in his “safe blue” state not ready or willing to vote for him!

This is a clear sign that voters in New Mexico are **fed up** with the radical and destructive agenda he and the Biden-Harris regime have been pushing on us.

_**It’s no wonder we outraised Heinrich last quarter and continue to close in on him!**_

We have put New Mexico in play, Peter—something the Left never saw coming. **Nella Domenici**
Republican for Senate

| **ABOUT NELLA**
**New Mexico is Nella Domenici’s home. She was born in Albuquerque and lived for most of her childhood in a home near the intersection of Lomas and Monroe with her seven siblings, and her parents - Pete and Nancy Domenici. Nella began her education at Our Lady of Fatima, where she learned the values she holds today. Nella is a proud third-generation New Mexican, devoted mother of two, step-mom of four, and the wife of a Navy Veteran. Nella’s family’s roots run deep in New Mexico and she and her husband Pat enjoy their family home in New Mexico that they have owned for nearly twenty years.

Like most New Mexicans, Nella Domenici understands the importance of hard work. She waited tables to help pay for her undergraduate degree from Georgetown University, and worked her way through night school at Georgetown Law while holding down a full time job. She then graduated from Harvard Business School as a Baker Scholar, top 5% of the class, while 9 months pregnant.

Nella began her career at the bottom and worked her way up through the complex finance world, eventually serving as CFO for one of the world’s largest, most successful investment firms. In her career, Nella advised, invested in, grew, and led many companies, and served on public company boards. The industries she has worked in are vast and include areas such as health care, AI, food service, lodging, commercial real estate, mortgage lending, and consumer products. These companies have ranged from small family-owned businesses, to rapidly growing venture backed enterprises, to a Fortune 200 company. Several of these have been headquartered in New Mexico. Collectively, the companies Nella has been heavily involved with have employed thousands of Americans.

Like her father and mother, Nella has been a warrior for those who most need an advocate: for women competing in academics or business, for families dealing with mental illness, and for those without access to quality healthcare or education. **

[ ** JOIN NELLA **](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=793668a864974389941d74a6d214423a&_e=x0KYKXC72JW30r_0mP-QT3FolBSC5jU3LfpZ2GDlMUUQdVYSGWYZNtKfmAukLNZ708R_zXtX9I8SGCbLZMww9PK1eZRrT-giB3xXAlKVtWLKWL73ZIdhS7XiYjOJ3k_51U2agHTvITUy1RdqN2g65CDdv7Boj3Jgkm2Ohffo6JWTsNVWvBfUWlX72fb1eX_f0KQ34Ax5PSeo97_-pkYN7vEWrPFVVo1Lfbj1ZYGpuFvOPqYD2lKwW8o6oQ4UpxSBf-3Er2sGTPnzIQ7cSReSNFwNeowFKOoX8JjRgNwXD3p8_KjRu7Z4bUaao5VSXa8yszYn7Ci2WrMYPavheVi7tcxc-H7gDZcfpLDPNplD_NDhvoEw77KmEgsq7C7d1y9vbMC0I-Pv4iUyqj9a3bbDNU6bs_pKaItNA1Kgi33TJSw%3D)

Collectively, the companies Nella has been heavily involved with have employed thousands of Americans. Like her father and mother, Nella has been a warrior for those who most need an advocate: for women competing in academics or business, for families dealing with mental illness, and for those without access to quality healthcare or education. Follow Nella Online** Checks can be made payable to Nella for Senate and mailed to PO Box 92918 | Albuquerque, NM 87199 | Paid for by Nella for Senate Don't want to receive any more of our emails? We hate to see you go: .

name: Dan Osborn
subject: why I was fired
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Adam for Colorado
body:
As president of our local union, I led the strike.
_[Click here to stop receiving emails about Dan Osborn's campaign in Nebraska from us.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/91037778/492525734/1647001491?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NjIxNiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkN2U2OWU2OS01OTVkLWVmMTEtOTkxYS02MDQ1YmRkYmZjNGIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=JtfLykEuZMBkI-Ff-NAR9DSCstP2IvFZRXH5LzuVHEI=&emci=e68df314-f55b-ef11-991a-6045bddbfc4b&emdi=d7e69e69-595d-ef11-991a-6045bddbfc4b&ceid=19445147)_
Hey there,
In October 2021, I had been an employee of Kellogg’s for almost 18 years.
I had dropped out of college and gone to work for the company after my wife got pregnant. Life’s easy when all you gotta do is take care of yourself – but we had diapers to buy and needed health insurance for our growing family.
When I applied in 2004, there were 6 positions and 600 applications. Working at Kellogg’s promised to be a lifelong career. A good-paying job that afforded me the opportunity to become a homeowner, let my wife stay home with the kids, live decently, retire some day, and hopefully live happily ever after.
But over the years, wages became a two-tier system. New workers were being paid less than workers had made decades earlier. Cost of living adjustments weren’t keeping up anywhere near inflation. Retirement and health insurance plans had been gutted. It just wasn’t right. They were making record profits – and doing it off the backs of workers.
**So in October 2021, we walked out. And as president of our local union, I led the strike.**
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/91037779/492525735/92586991?refcode=em20240818am-nd&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C35%2C50%2C100%2C250&refcode2=d7e69e69-595d-ef11-991a-6045bddbfc4b&recurring=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NjIxNiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkN2U2OWU2OS01OTVkLWVmMTEtOTkxYS02MDQ1YmRkYmZjNGIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=JtfLykEuZMBkI-Ff-NAR9DSCstP2IvFZRXH5LzuVHEI=)
It was the first time many of us had ever walked a picket line. It was cold, but we were determined to hold our lines even through the dead of the winter if we had to. Every worker knew we were a part of something bigger than ourselves. We were in a fight for the future of the American middle class.
After 11 weeks, and the company threatening to permanently replace every union worker, we reached an agreement. More importantly, we saved 500 good-paying jobs here in Nebraska alone.
It was one of the proudest moments of my life.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/91037780/492525736/92586991?refcode=em20240818am-nd&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C35%2C50%2C100%2C250&refcode2=d7e69e69-595d-ef11-991a-6045bddbfc4b&recurring=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NjIxNiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkN2U2OWU2OS01OTVkLWVmMTEtOTkxYS02MDQ1YmRkYmZjNGIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=JtfLykEuZMBkI-Ff-NAR9DSCstP2IvFZRXH5LzuVHEI=)
Following the strike, I was fired. The company has its version of events for why, but I believe it was because I was union president. Someone had to pay – and my head was on the chopping block.
It’s easy to let yourself get beaten down by life. To let big corporations and the politicians they own in Washington make all the decisions – and just accept that that’s how things will always be. But that’s not me.
**Instead, I’ve decided to run against one of the most corporate politicians – U.S. Senator Republican Deb Fischer – and with your help, we are going to defeat her.**
Three polls now show me neck-and-neck with Republican Deb Fischer, and in one poll, I am LEADING her by 2 points.
**I am ready to take on Republican Senator Deb Fischer just like I took on Kellogg’s. But I sure as hell am not going to take money from corporate PACs, so I need grassroots donors like you to give now if we’re going to win this Senate seat.**
**[Please, will you make a donation to my campaign for U.S. Senate right now – whatever you can afford – to help me defeat Republican Deb Fischer and win this Senate seat in November?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/91037781/492525737/92586991?refcode=em20240818am-nd&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C35%2C50%2C100%2C250&refcode2=d7e69e69-595d-ef11-991a-6045bddbfc4b&recurring=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NjIxNiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkN2U2OWU2OS01OTVkLWVmMTEtOTkxYS02MDQ1YmRkYmZjNGIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=JtfLykEuZMBkI-Ff-NAR9DSCstP2IvFZRXH5LzuVHEI=)**

The Joe Rogan Experience has been downloaded more than 200 million times per month. The podcast has over 1.9 billion lifetime downloads. Joe Rogan's podcast episodes have been downloaded over 100 million times per month...

_He’s the only one that makes sense to me._
_He’s the only one that doesn’t attack people._

_He’s much more reasonable and intelligent._
_The guy was an environmental attorney and cleaned up the East River._
_He’s a legitimate guy._
