name: Solar Go-Fridge
subject: ❄️Chill Out Anytime: Discover the Ultimate Cooling Solution!!
body:
I know you'll love it...
| | | Unsubscribe [here](https://links.nationalgunowner.org/a/1537/click/18460/6374453/8227c823ae6c05bc7559e091ec6638eb2326e33b/fd8c31b0af116dafc372c40dd6d8f036f2c7ba69). We'll miss you - so will great opportunities.
To view this email as a webpage, click [here](https://links.nationalgunowner.org/a/1537/click/18460/6374453/07c4f76fc501380345ea6aebc9884a7acef35d26/fd8c31b0af116dafc372c40dd6d8f036f2c7ba69?message_id=IjYwMmE1ZGIwLTNmYWMtMDEzZC03NjY2LTRlY2E2YmU0ODZhNUBuYXRpb25hbGd1bm93bmVyLm9yZyI=).
---
| | [](https://links.nationalgunowner.org/a/1537/click/18460/6374453/e98d9423212450cf401c2046371478193db7617a/fd8c31b0af116dafc372c40dd6d8f036f2c7ba69)
---
---
|
---
| | **NEW Solar-Powered
"King of Coolers"
Never Needs Ice!**
---
[](https://links.nationalgunowner.org/a/1537/click/18460/6374453/e98d9423212450cf401c2046371478193db7617a/fd8c31b0af116dafc372c40dd6d8f036f2c7ba69)
---
**No More Soggy Food!** This revolutionary fridge on wheels keeps your food and drinks ice cold... **But it NEVER needs ice!** It may look like an ordinary cooler, but you've never seen anything like this... Instead of ice, it uses advanced technology to keep all your important food and drinks ice cold. So you'll never have to stop for ice every couple of hours... And you'll never have to dip your hands into soggy food or gross puddles of water. And since you'll never need ice, you'll have all that precious cooler space available for MORE of your favorite food and drinks. **And it's super flexible.** This revolutionary Solar Go-Fridge is **not JUST a cooler – it's a refrigerator, freezer, and deep freezer** all in one! It can work as a fridge for hot dogs and drinks, or as a freezer for ice cream, popsicles and frozen meats... And it can even go down to subzero temperatures! **The Solar Go-Fridge
Charges For FREE With
The Power of the Sun!** Unlike other run-of-the-mill coolers, your Solar Go-Fridge... **Charges for FREE in the Sun!** Yes, you can recharge your Solar Go-Fridge using the FREE power of the sun. After all, we couldn’t call it a "Solar" Go-Fridge if it wasn't solar powered... And that's why... **You get a FREE 40-Watt Solar Panel with your Solar Go-Fridge.**
---
[](https://links.nationalgunowner.org/a/1537/click/18460/6374453/e98d9423212450cf401c2046371478193db7617a/fd8c31b0af116dafc372c40dd6d8f036f2c7ba69)
---
You can use your solar panel to power your Solar Go-Fridge on the go... So you can take it to campsites, sporting events, RV trips, tailgates, backyard BBQs, pool parties and so much more... Or use it to power your critical devices. It's like a mini power cell in its own right. It works with phones, tablets and your other critical electronic devices. Plus, if a tree falls on some power lines and cuts the power to your neighborhood, you don't have to worry about the food in your fridge spoiling. **Look What You Can Fit
In Your Solar Go-Fridge** Your Solar Go-Fridge can take any kind of frozen supplies with you. And when we say _any kind of supplies_ , we mean it. It has a small footprint, but has spacious capacity. **You get 42 quarts of space** for your critical items – that's like 46 cans or bottles of water. And no bulky ice bags!
---
[](https://links.nationalgunowner.org/a/1537/click/18460/6374453/e98d9423212450cf401c2046371478193db7617a/fd8c31b0af116dafc372c40dd6d8f036f2c7ba69)
---
Its compact size and all-terrain wheels make it easy to throw in the trunk. Or to bring with you to tailgates. It's truly small, but mighty. Drinks, hot dogs, medicine and more. It can all fit in your Solar Go-Fridge. **[Limited Time] Get
Exclusive Introductory
Pricing, Plus 11 Bonus
Gifts Worth $388 And
FREE Shipping!** Order now to take advantage of our special introductory pricing, 11 free bonus gifts worth $388, and free shipping. Your exclusive 11 FREE Bonus Gifts package includes:
* **FREE** 40-Watt Solar Panel
* **FREE** 72-Hour Survival Food Kit
* **FREE** Survival Coffee
* **FREE** Survival Cocoa
* **FREE** StarFire Camp Stove
* **FREE** Freedom Flame
* **FREE** Multi-Use Flashlight
* **FREE** Solar Power Digital Report
* **FREE** $25 Certificate
* **FREE** Shipping & Handling
* **FREE** VIP Phone Line

Plus there's an easy payment plan available with no credit check... [**Order Now To Lock In Your
Low Pricing, FREE Bonus
Gifts and FREE Shipping!**](https://links.nationalgunowner.org/a/1537/click/18460/6374453/e98d9423212450cf401c2046371478193db7617a/fd8c31b0af116dafc372c40dd6d8f036f2c7ba69)
---
[](https://links.nationalgunowner.org/a/1537/click/18460/6374453/e98d9423212450cf401c2046371478193db7617a/fd8c31b0af116dafc372c40dd6d8f036f2c7ba69)
---
**But Hurry... Last Time
The Solar Go-Fridge
SOLD OUT In 24 Hours** **There is one catch:** We can't reserve any Solar Go-Fridges or give out any IOUs. You'll need to ACT FAST... Because the last version of the Solar Go-Fridge sold out in 24 hours after only a couple of text messages... And that version couldn't do half the things this NEW model can. So when people find out about this space-age ice chest, there could be a mad rush. **So don't wait...** If you miss out on this special Introductory Pricing, there's nothing we can do. There's only one way to guarantee your Introductory Pricing, FREE gifts and FREE shipping... And that's by clicking the link below to grab your Solar Go-Fridge while they're in stock and ready to ship: [**Order Now To Lock In Your
Low Pricing, FREE Bonus
Gifts and FREE Shipping!**](https://links.nationalgunowner.org/a/1537/click/18460/6374453/e98d9423212450cf401c2046371478193db7617a/fd8c31b0af116dafc372c40dd6d8f036f2c7ba69) So make sure to grab yours now. **I know you'll love it!** Stay safe and have fun out there,

Frank Bates
Patriot Headquarters P.S. Thanks to your support, we're able to provide support to important charities that help American veterans and their families. Charities like Fisher House, A Soldier's Child Foundation, Team Rubicon and Operation Homefront. **Customers Are
Raving About Their
Solar Go-Fridge** **Kristen G.**
"It was super fun to use. We were gone for four nights, and didn't have to get ice at all. Not having to deal with ice the whole time was amazing. I was worried that it wasn't big enough. But it held absolutely everything I was planning to take because I didn't have to put any ice in there. It didn't have to be as big as my regular cooler." **Randy M.**
"You cannot beat it. It is awesome. No running around, looking for drinks. No more opening up your drink and setting it on the tractor and coming back 20 minutes later and it's warm. Everything's cold. Everything's cold all the time. Just a wonderful, wonderful unit. I am a Type 1 diabetic. It's been keeping my insulin cold to the point where I don't worry about my insulin. I know it's good." **Damon H.**
"We all have lots of coolers. But this is a cooler extraordinaire. Not only is it a cooler, it's a fully-functioning refrigerator. It's great for me being a fisherman and an outdoor guy. I can put a bunch of fish in here and set it at freezing temperatures. And when I get home, my fish will stay frozen and I don't need any ice. It's a great tool. It's absolutely a must for campers and fisherman. It looks like a cooler, but it's actually a refrigerator which makes it a really special thing." **Lisa W.**
"You don't have to stop and get ice anymore. That was one thing I hated to do early in the morning when we had to leave to go out of town to play in a baseball tournament. We had to leave at 5 or 6 or sometimes 4:30 in the morning and had to stop to get ice for our cooler. So this is nice because you just have to set it on refrigerator mode and you get your cold drinks or whatever you put in your cooler. People are already taking pictures with it, trying to find out more information so they could get their own." **Lou H.**
"Please get one or two of them like I did. They will come in handy next time you have a power failure or going on a trip. I use mine whenever we travel or recently when we had a power failure a few weeks ago. You won't be sorry." [**Order Now To Lock In Your**
**Low Pricing, FREE Bonus**
**Gifts and FREE Shipping!**](https://links.nationalgunowner.org/a/1537/click/18460/6374453/e98d9423212450cf401c2046371478193db7617a/fd8c31b0af116dafc372c40dd6d8f036f2c7ba69)

To view this email as a webpage, click =. | | | | | NEW Solar-Powered "King of Coolers" Never Needs Ice! No More Soggy Food! This revolutionary fridge on wheels keeps your food and drinks ice cold... But it NEVER needs ice! It may look like an ordinary cooler, but you've never seen anything like this... Instead of ice, it uses advanced technology to keep all your important food and drinks ice cold. So you'll never have to stop for ice every couple of hours... And you'll never have to dip your hands into soggy food or gross puddles of water. And since you'll never need ice, you'll have all that precious cooler space available for MORE of your favorite food and drinks. And it's super flexible. This revolutionary Solar Go-Fridge is not JUST a cooler – it's a refrigerator, freezer, and deep freezer all in one! It can work as a fridge for hot dogs and drinks, or as a freezer for ice cream, popsicles and frozen meats... And it can even go down to subzero temperatures! The Solar Go-Fridge Charges For FREE With The Power of the Sun! Unlike other run-of-the-mill coolers, your Solar Go-Fridge... Charges for FREE in the Sun! Yes, you can recharge your Solar Go-Fridge using the FREE power of the sun. After all, we couldn’t call it a "Solar" Go-Fridge if it wasn't solar powered... And that's why... You get a FREE 40-Watt Solar Panel with your Solar Go-Fridge. You can use your solar panel to power your Solar Go-Fridge on the go... So you can take it to campsites, sporting events, RV trips, tailgates, backyard BBQs, pool parties and so much more... Or use it to power your critical devices. It's like a mini power cell in its own right. It works with phones, tablets and your other critical electronic devices. Plus, if a tree falls on some power lines and cuts the power to your neighborhood, you don't have to worry about the food in your fridge spoiling. Look What You Can Fit In Your Solar Go-Fridge Your Solar Go-Fridge can take any kind of frozen supplies with you. And when we say any kind of supplies , we mean it. It has a small footprint, but has spacious capacity. You get 42 quarts of space for your critical items – that's like 46 cans or bottles of water. And no bulky ice bags! Its compact size and all-terrain wheels make it easy to throw in the trunk. Or to bring with you to tailgates. It's truly small, but mighty. Drinks, hot dogs, medicine and more. It can all fit in your Solar Go-Fridge. [Limited Time] Get Exclusive Introductory Pricing, Plus 11 Bonus Gifts Worth $388 And FREE Shipping! But Hurry... Last Time The Solar Go-Fridge SOLD OUT In 24 Hours There is one catch: We can't reserve any Solar Go-Fridges or give out any IOUs. You'll need to ACT FAST... Because the last version of the Solar Go-Fridge sold out in 24 hours after only a couple of text messages... And that version couldn't do half the things this NEW model can. So when people find out about this space-age ice chest, there could be a mad rush. So don't wait... If you miss out on this special Introductory Pricing, there's nothing we can do. There's only one way to guarantee your Introductory Pricing, FREE gifts and FREE shipping... And that's by clicking the link below to grab your Solar Go-Fridge while they're in stock and ready to ship: So make sure to grab yours now. I know you'll love it! Stay safe and have fun out there, Frank Bates Patriot Headquarters P.S. Thanks to your support, we're able to provide support to important charities that help American veterans and their families. Charities like Fisher House, A Soldier's Child Foundation, Team Rubicon and Operation Homefront. Customers Are Raving About Their Solar Go-Fridge Kristen G. "It was super fun to use. We were gone for four nights, and didn't have to get ice at all. Not having to deal with ice the whole time was amazing. I was worried that it wasn't big enough. But it held absolutely everything I was planning to take because I didn't have to put any ice in there. It didn't have to be as big as my regular cooler." Randy M. "You cannot beat it. It is awesome. No running around, looking for drinks. No more opening up your drink and setting it on the tractor and coming back 20 minutes later and it's warm. Everything's cold. Everything's cold all the time. Just a wonderful, wonderful unit. I am a Type 1 diabetic. It's been keeping my insulin cold to the point where I don't worry about my insulin. I know it's good." Damon H. "We all have lots of coolers. But this is a cooler extraordinaire. Not only is it a cooler, it's a fully-functioning refrigerator. It's great for me being a fisherman and an outdoor guy. I can put a bunch of fish in here and set it at freezing temperatures. And when I get home, my fish will stay frozen and I don't need any ice. It's a great tool. It's absolutely a must for campers and fisherman. It looks like a cooler, but it's actually a refrigerator which makes it a really special thing." Lisa W. "You don't have to stop and get ice anymore. That was one thing I hated to do early in the morning when we had to leave to go out of town to play in a baseball tournament. We had to leave at 5 or 6 or sometimes 4:30 in the morning and had to stop to get ice for our cooler. So this is nice because you just have to set it on refrigerator mode and you get your cold drinks or whatever you put in your cooler. People are already taking pictures with it, trying to find out more information so they could get their own." Lou H. "Please get one or two of them like I did. Non-Contribution Account (For TTPAC, Inc.'s Expenditures Other Than Direct Contributions to Federal Committees)

As permitted by law, TTPAC, Inc. maintains a non-contribution account for the purpose of influencing federal, state, and local elections. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, address, occupation, and employer of individuals whose contribution exceeds $200 in an election cycle. For contributions from federal committees, corporations, and labor unions - regardless of contribution amount - federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the committee's name and address. State and local law may require us to collect and report additional information.

Contributions to this account may be used to influence federal elections by making independent expenditures in support of or in opposition to federal candidates. Additionally, in state and local jurisdictions that permit non-individual type (e.g., corporate) contributions directly to candidates and/or committees, contributions to this account may be used for both independent expenditures and direct contributions to candidates and/or committees, as permitted by state and local law.

Individuals, federal committees, corporations, and labor unions may contribute to TTPAC, Inc.'s non-contribution account without limit. Contributions by national banks, foreign nationals (without lawful permanent resident status), and other foreign entities (e.g., foreign corporations) are prohibited. Contributions to TTPAC, Inc.'s non-contribution account are not tax deductible for federal income tax purposes.

For Freedom, Charlie Kirk Turning Point PAC Non-Contribution Account (For TTPAC, Inc.'s Expenditures Other Than Direct Contributions to Federal Committees) As permitted by law, TTPAC, Inc. maintains a non-contribution account for the purpose of influencing federal, state, and local elections. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, address, occupation, and employer of individuals whose contribution exceeds $200 in an election cycle. For contributions from federal committees, corporations, and labor unions - regardless of contribution amount - federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the committee's name and address. State and local law may require us to collect and report additional information. Contributions to this account may be used to influence federal elections by making independent expenditures in support of or in opposition to federal candidates. Additionally, in state and local jurisdictions that permit non-individual type (e.g., corporate) contributions directly to candidates and/or committees, contributions to this account may be used for both independent expenditures and direct contributions to candidates and/or committees, as permitted by state and local law. Individuals, federal committees, corporations, and labor unions may contribute to TTPAC, Inc.'s non-contribution account without limit. Contributions by national banks, foreign nationals (without lawful permanent resident status), and other foreign entities (e.g., foreign corporations) are prohibited. Contributions to TTPAC, Inc.'s non-contribution account are not tax deductible for federal income tax purposes. Paid for by Turning Point PAC, Inc. (www.tppac.com) and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.

name: The Editors at Broad + Liberty
subject: Thousands in IBEW Campaign Cash Unreported
body:
News + editorial to start your week | Broad + Liberty Weekly Reads | | | |
---
| | | Good morning and welcome to _Broad + Liberty_ 's Weekly Reads.

[Subscribe to our daily email list](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=11af6f52fe&e=b7b3eddce2) and get the best of _Broad + Liberty_ delivered straight to your inbox.
---
|
---
|
### **1.[Falls supervisors fail to report thousands in IBEW campaign cash](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=bf7b8946d0&e=b7b3eddce2)**
_By Bradley Vasoli_
For years, thousands of dollars have flowed from a federal union PAC to two Falls Township supervisors, massive amounts of which they apparently failed to report. Pennsylvania breaks the campaign year into cycles and requires political committees to report their receipts, expenditures or liabilities if any of those exceed $250 in one cycle. But Falls Supervisor Jeff Dence (D) received $18,500 from the International Brotherhood of Electrical Workers Political Action Committee since 2022 and recorded no such donations on his “Friends of Jeffry Dence” reports. And Dence’s fellow Democratic Supervisor Jeff Boraski has yet to file publicly accessible “Friends of Jeff Boraski” reports reflecting any of $38,850 in IBEW PAC contributions. As Broad + Liberty[ reported](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=6de717e967&e=b7b3eddce2) last September, Boraski merely filed a report covering a 35-day period in November and December 2019 that showed none of IBEW’s largesse. **Why It Matters.** Special-interest influence, Philadelphia-based Republican election lawyer Matt Wolfe told _Broad + Liberty_ , is a major reason why financial openness is a key responsibility campaigns bear. Failure to report data, especially when candidates conceal contributions from powerful entities, hinders citizens’ ability to understand the pull those groups may enjoy with their beneficiaries. "That’s exactly why the legislature has deemed it important to report these contributions,” he said. “So that the public has an opportunity to judge what interests the candidate might have....” **[Continue Reading](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=704b85c6d1&e=b7b3eddce2)**
---
|
---
|
### **2.[The fight for girls’ rights continues with Title IX stalemate](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=37a0719e81&e=b7b3eddce2)**

_By Beth Ann Rosica_
A federal court ruling last month prevents the US Department of Education from enforcing the new Title IX rules in many schools across the region and state, which is expected to impact almost every school district in southeastern Pennsylvania. **[Moms for Liberty](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=e34a7b5a6c&e=b7b3eddce2)** joined two other national organizations and four states in filing the lawsuit against the US Department of Education challenging the Biden administration’s rewrite of the Title IX regulations. The groups were successful in prohibiting the Department from enforcing the changes in the four states and at the schools attended by the children of Moms for Liberty members. For now, the ruling is a huge victory for Moms for Liberty, which describes itself as “an organization dedicated to fighting for the survival of America by unifying, educating and empowering parents to defend their parental rights at all levels of government.” **Why It Matters.** Why is this such a big deal? As I[ explained](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=622096c3c0&e=b7b3eddce2) earlier this summer, the new Title IX regulations basically strip rights away from girls and women. For example, if a biological boy decides he identifies as a girl on a certain day, he can use the girl’s bathroom. The school is not required to notify the boy’s parents of his change in gender or that he is using the girl’s bathroom. If a girl complains about seeing a penis in the girl’s bathroom, she can be investigated for “sex-based harassment.” Additionally, students and teachers may also be subject to investigations for either intentionally or unintentionally referring to someone by the wrong pronoun. The injunction now prevents the US Department of Education from enforcing these new regulations in schools where parents are members of Moms for Liberty. Despite the injunction, or perhaps in spite of it, Pennsylvania’s Attorney General is[ vowing](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=40be0cdcb3&e=b7b3eddce2) to” ensure the new regulations under Title IX go into effect as intended.” **[Continue Reading](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=3e105d3ffc&e=b7b3eddce2)**
---
|
---
|
# **3\. Lightning Round**
* **[Thom Nickels: Mayor Parker is right to call city workers back to the office](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=a5fd04cbfc&e=b7b3eddce2)**
* **[Michael Thomas Leibrandt: Madam Mayor, keep the flexibility.](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=5f41e7c9db&e=b7b3eddce2)**
* **[Guy Ciarrocchi: Democracy is dying in the media’s darkness](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=0d93663fbc&e=b7b3eddce2)**
* **[Rep. Seth Grove: Deficits have consequences](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=8cfc674b00&e=b7b3eddce2)**
* **[Frank Ryan: Tim Walz’s conduct unbecoming](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=13d91131e5&e=b7b3eddce2)**
* **[Christine Flowers: Dodging the truth](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=4c88ac1724&e=b7b3eddce2)**
* **[Guy Ciarrocchi: Fracking bans are dangerous and harmful](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=a846ea3579&e=b7b3eddce2)**

---
|
---
|
# **4\. What we're reading**
Josh Shapiro had an impressive victory in a swing state and an appeal to moderates along several axes. Tim Walz had a progressive record, a riot torn city, and a meme. How did he come out on top in the 2024 veepstakes? Salena Zito looked at the contest in [an article for the _Free Press_ this week](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=6e852f6210&e=b7b3eddce2).
---
|
---
| **_Broad + Liberty_ is funded exclusively by readers like you.**

Your generous support ensures that _Broad + Liberty_ can bring you stories and opinions that Pennsylvania’s mainstream media would rather leave unheard. Please consider making a contribution today. If you would like your gift to be used to help us cover a specific story or subject, please let us know in the contribution form or at [editors@broadandliberty.com](mailto:editirs@broadandliberty.com).

As always, gifts made to _Broad + Liberty_ are 100% tax deductible!

Thank you, dear reader, for your steadfast support of our independent, broad-minded brand of local journalism. We could not do this without you.

With gratitude,

— The Editors at _Broad + Liberty_

name: Roger Ream
subject: Riots on Campus
body:
They're coming back
| Friend, I experienced the left’s radical gender ideology firsthand.
**When I was in college, I was forced to compete against a man at the NCAA Women’s Swimming Championships.** But instead of staying silent,**I spoke louder**. And I’m still speaking out, Friend. Men and women are different -- equal, but different. No matter how much the gender radicals demand otherwise. That’s why I’m fighting back, with the**Riley Gaines Center at the Leadership Institute. ** Through the Riley Gaines Center, my team of Ambassadors and I spearhead a growing nationwide movement to defend women, common sense, and free speech. This isn’t just a women’s issue. _It’s a humanitarian issue_. It affects men and women, girls and boys. Because men don’t want to see women robbed of their opportunities or put in danger. And every person has the right to speak the truth. Will you help me speak louder and strengthen this movement? [Your gift of $25, $50, or $100 will help have an immediate impact. ](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=c904659855ff451fa9483cdfd1633347&_e=5fyRTA2079nSKu0SLcAGXoodKKFejmbLKSi21W8BkaeRfd4bBJJnV8KBD1G3aOwltee5oqocDv5sycsXFqiC-Bann8fRdFNghAkjIKl4XcGI440xDDjiFjF0Ag8pSdtNq2Jtq_OUVAdp3YA5lGaqgArS4U6SqtxDo8snjPQpi-AissVCTXDdho3i-4oZaO5SIe1g88S3p5EolR0iHpQZUJ3SAlukW8q2SF5GpJZwO-v094bRlcy_oJsBB6A8RX_9tA86p2bseewHnP0vPML0W-7SYvTuoyLfUQ3ocO9HPU1HhHkhXdHfU6hNMPU5EqsXgUouAp0AwjowbUGWv10_O1W9fp99z_g0cIJ_M0tULD1SYN9h_6Sf7zFFsQyR4297jw4_IgDE68hthdSc8lpHJ9ZkUeJuWLq98FoqgKFvqg1DTst8xdVC5Bp-AnyMUz0k3OxdVASHrM-leeAkaaVP7VF7oW9fSpK_xa6QBxqUnqzKnVd6vLoDRLU2Qi9ksntaIOhZOPWdXsROFmuekeJjVw%3D%3D) Leftist schools intimidate America’s daughters. Sports leagues like the NCAA let men into women’s sports. But now my Riley Gaines Center Ambassadors and I are here to lead the charge to protect our hard-earned rights as a woman. [Please join the fight today, Friend. ](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=c904659855ff451fa9483cdfd1633347&_e=5fyRTA2079nSKu0SLcAGXoodKKFejmbLKSi21W8BkaeRfd4bBJJnV8KBD1G3aOwltee5oqocDv5sycsXFqiC-Bann8fRdFNghAkjIKl4XcGI440xDDjiFjF0Ag8pSdtNq2Jtq_OUVAdp3YA5lGaqgArS4U6SqtxDo8snjPQpi-AissVCTXDdho3i-4oZaO5SIe1g88S3p5EolR0iHpQZUJ3SAlukW8q2SF5GpJZwO-v094bRlcy_oJsBB6A8RX_9tA86p2bseewHnP0vPML0W-7SYvTuoyLfUQ3ocO9HPU1HhHkhXdHfU6hNMPU5EqsXgUouAp0AwjowbUGWv10_O1W9fp99z_g0cIJ_M0tULD2vzMd1f08oPH7jTskJS79JB4vkTtjoMA1XoCQSCCj0h33bVzlUB8vwZBQHev59EkvqV5KVzfOIxfuaLrlf6sSIpoKqdpe4acBRLUOxt_fsCoaPup93aS4YV1MLgnOmm_56RQjCHDAty8pvTq-kF6FCMC6b-d0pHNobDPaDbENDyw%3D%3D) I look forward to welcoming you to our team! Stand bravely with me, Riley Gaines Director of the Riley Gaines Center at the Leadership Institute

A single seat in the Minnesota Senate is a must-win to maintain the state’s Democratic trifecta, and the DLCC is working around the clock to ensure our candidates have what they need to secure victory in states like Minnesota. [Read more about the DLCC’s work in Minnesota → ](https://an.dlcc.org/ss/c/u001.yjJN_MEbNx94PLaWzZ6hW5urRMpuKreY0_4KS0xJ1pCpx9JomkvOn616WDhqZUssuUIHfroKmAS4B6zu9gFI7JH7wyg5tDDT0dAJh9DauhFfuK4N3jf1NiTivZ6LDo3HfImtcBqsNimOXwbuRSSUHgrKjcR6B2lGyR-ARhaUupgZvCPRovslOFP_LvaH-UhhAwFx0YKqFb-Zct2NhUEq-kwpzPI3Vrg33TqRE7wLY1OXr8sJIws0nkImhMpdke2Lxfjcu6tP6YljavMiSdJW5wvZkY-V7yYGiK9MHq0aS5CttH55IwEqRa4nMNjJqRC8DPXZUyD3tut9NhCZyXRI7hBXhF7W3liOq7gR-MaJuGQewXcsbo8h7HZLDlKP45ksT40ENzuIe7W8NR0Eq7QemGnSdy20F3PbMWu5lcIFFD6xn7gfGp5ml88h7sWilXqlDxts4PaiBv6BhtAT8jeQmg08vqx_1c9oGwzMqQsFRbdp-k87PQAXX_gDHyuSrhqfTAGMF5jFw0CtpzyqRIxjAqdq2KSJxYr-SBAXCX6TwDM57nLDFA2PultX_QuqIUa5v4UX8Q_83x-PU770YBV95EE_GonsChUzT048AuEIxUlV_bKHx1SubbujOSVW27rYaue9V_YjN5QTKS_UhKEhdw/490/0WIQ1T_rTWyNycrX8M7o0g/h1/h001.6dYNItrU6ZlUyj6dBiJdBW3GXKl4kEUQEyhJi4CBukY)
2️⃣ **_Wisconsin:_ Republicans tried to upend the Democratic Gov’s power **
Ahead of an ultra-competitive election with newly drawn maps, Wisconsin Republicans were pushing last-minute power grabs trying to maintain as much control as possible. [**Learn more about the GOP’s attempts to subvert Democratic power →**](https://an.dlcc.org/ss/c/u001.XaF8mXqsA6b2dSPmhsleMbHQPX4zlW5LTF7Twtz6WVJW6vH3rUoMo_AA_JErmGQ8PsLuJGut4SpUuDBIaTds_0037u_m3sfu-_ayOEyCl32wmhb6OwpFXnC5-ecOgNYxTMFuJ8kum3be82e5KE-EjVqTZAXjpJr43TDnT85qy0QCz-vGldVtj0c64zxcpyrzINrUI5UofpPVVs8V3kLMLC64g51Kt76lsaCF_MmuP3VkNBeIaReyPGw_ClT_nfaz_DcOroxFOwQe4Ch3jU7teu6vvEfhmAXOFOX4lSYrD36iTEo-AdqafCKohp-PIjEti9kZ84t_vQnvC5bZR8n_-whjUh4qIcZZNrsKasTpIwL-Go2oYWGPbsMN-epHDP5GeiyTjU-thzSpz3j6ziiN3Rwo-SYh4FSnyXKRT5lhH1vwzSGJnf1Ddub2d4br35VvqfDmUkVUgHKkOT218nuCRY7ZKb8CvPt_aEdY9HRJLvJ-kd5pK3WU8UXcc7oJWvZqbyHIzNix34RDefd_YgNfMFixWtS_jkozJ30QzbMBBZjRmvzVt45FBIeKb1jiH1eUV0uzufiqbtmBAAd1glTbsSUI40tkXzc2BFIBzRBQ5Xs/490/0WIQ1T_rTWyNycrX8M7o0g/h2/h001.LjV9WmKmWOYnlL1KQ34gLRAvGhjhe7sWWLxCdVBbGSE)
3️⃣ **_Response Requested:_ Are you planning to watch the DNC convention? **
Next week, Democrats are gathering in Chicago for the Democratic National Convention. President Biden, Vice President Harris, Gov. Walz and others are set to take the stage, and we want to know if you’re planning to tune in. [**Let us know if you plan to watch the DNC →**](https://an.dlcc.org/ss/c/u001.yjJN_MEbNx94PLaWzZ6hW5Lkp5lOCwikP-XCX5D9XT302jBwftuEOOnOxNYWPAf5Ka57WZrCnlmooeBZT70XgNxQfJmj0T0JTigpnXFlAsQ5uBBBgJEp4Hi-l-c-BrEhCy-1DpUpVHTJ7ibWouj_6f1B2lZCelqjrh5U4PGv86Z6T26VyJJ3TVN7-uNU0NuKF5AAKgvClvJmPNcRCKOGsR7km7nAeoBS7WsbCFsTlhyKUvX7Gya4hs8XXR9HZszbV7fCLebgl3ADDPdLbWi8kvmGidKPXFpFypoG-OIVDNRf4lOO8fNF_S8513ly00BmIyrYdJX2SSyMNxBxJHquRS250Q5jECgYbmCH42Ni2OwDfdlA4xYb_Mmr4IXFcunFTXmd2_l1JRiqsjBTYdKddSTqPX2AX8KqKucsWWyjcOKZ3RAP3oFVgWMNQQTXhqk92CQgGxbfK8u0DlEu_QncNPcOkCa8a-X2P4EIbME03chNODgkEUAfT4U0rYsLbie9moZkpxzgB1kveaJKk2fPVA/490/0WIQ1T_rTWyNycrX8M7o0g/h3/h001.QdoJ4HklXE0ZaNbDKOzeeDO8eFy9K_dBdwLP8nbvnJ4)

name: Bernie Moreno
subject: Asking for your endorsement
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bernie Moreno for Senate
body:
They’ve signed onto this race ... will you? |
---
Donald Trump.
JD Vance.
Marco Rubio.
Vivek Ramaswamy.
Tim Scott.
Jim Jordan.
Ric Grenell.
John Kennedy.

Peter, these are just some conservative patriots who have signed on to my campaign for the United States Senate.

As a political outsider and first-time candidate, I am proud to have earned the endorsement of some of the biggest names in conservative politics, but I would like to secure YOURS today.

[**Can I count on you to join Donald Trump, JD Vance, and others and send in your personal endorsement of this critical Senate Race, Peter?**](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=82603b1f2c3a4debae853d6cb5d2cd67&_e=LMijFwixSeqXC6DRBWUfMLoxm2MFJpXb9pdDlKl_QFAteBnhyAG_fGqvpuqRqjrRjsQktxAiLtalmc84_dwnA1jqK8PUfuyds4-NAGUGTdkSVBcnmUwVaVD57VKC1P6jAZlywPo3Ehehr8pqg4S7uvXmz7Tx1CUMrUS1DGgepLAeAMMY1wa8d5-PN3Gdqw4fRsFfq1jJG9c3eTe0CmBBfVpU5DmF49A0IFmsGFBLSG8m4suDFUR-7Xn4zrTfkxS4qwsIdr8u1EnyjMEwsAG7r45O945fpFyi8DJ8drqtrtlABzlZeO4J73NJtPBZjsyUgXhXdDDrOF5i1odStxmdmXn9H0Kuyvei4TgmagXbDAw0S670HAJfXBdODa3ciO2ZVXPKOMmb4U-6ZfLXzVGRcA%3D%3D)

[ **_SEND YOUR PERSONAL ENDORSEMENT »_** ](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=82603b1f2c3a4debae853d6cb5d2cd67&_e=LMijFwixSeqXC6DRBWUfMLoxm2MFJpXb9pdDlKl_QFAteBnhyAG_fGqvpuqRqjrRjsQktxAiLtalmc84_dwnA1jqK8PUfuyds4-NAGUGTdkSVBcnmUwVaVD57VKC1P6jAZlywPo3Ehehr8pqg4S7uvXmz7Tx1CUMrUS1DGgepLAeAMMY1wa8d5-PN3Gdqw4fRsFfq1jJG9c3eTe0CmBBfVpU5DmF49A0IFmsGFBLSG8m4suDFUR-7Xn4zrTfkxS4nh6K25AVSG2Wj3B4-0twz5zytgXJa3-Ff5XMEC7u70BhdFkL00bhsphdbIGgUKYHSeSc0f-TIfnGl0DfN0gZJUNECL721jpD4wlmxNtCyrEBtv4lnfdphpBFOL6obyO82IsUnnCOtKN325Y3nywHXg%3D%3D)
Here’s what’s at stake: **the Senate majority.**

The Senate majority runs through Ohio, and Democrats plan to spend $152 MILLION+ to protect my opponent, Sherrod Brown.

[](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=82603b1f2c3a4debae853d6cb5d2cd67&_e=LMijFwixSeqXC6DRBWUfMLoxm2MFJpXb9pdDlKl_QFAteBnhyAG_fGqvpuqRqjrRjsQktxAiLtalmc84_dwnA1jqK8PUfuyds4-NAGUGTdkSVBcnmUwVaVD57VKC1P6jAZlywPo3Ehehr8pqg4S7uvXmz7Tx1CUMrUS1DGgepLAeAMMY1wa8d5-PN3Gdqw4fRsFfq1jJG9c3eTe0CmBBfVpU5DmF49A0IFmsGFBLSG8m4suDFUR-7Xn4zrTfkxS41Y-Na2-6VedU91-QrT26V-5KzoponjAkUffO_gC5n3lC-BLlPHSKRfkyfy5O75HYlnYezupWy60lQmjWRPvzjilvTQlTmo07G99eGZRa9u3ezSJu3rumu_eUghJqVDQo3kp2DyuarVugZdX5trXPSQ%3D%3D)
He voted in lockstep with Joe Biden and Kamala Harris, but now that he is up for reelection, he’s trying to run away from his far-Left record.

Sherrod Brown is too radical for Ohio. It’s time to retire a man who has been in Washington for over 30 years.

name: Bernie Sanders
subject: Not normal
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Democratic National Committee, www
body:
As I’m sure you are aware, this is not a normal election.
---
Dear Friend, As I’m sure you are aware, this is not a normal election. It is not a normal election when we are running against someone who is a pathological liar. It is not a normal election when we are running against someone who has been convicted of 34 felonies. It is not a normal election when our opponent is a convicted sexual abuser and, as a private businessman, was involved in 4,000 lawsuits -- indicating a total lack of trustworthiness. But it’s even worse than that. When Donald Trump claims that “nobody” showed up at a 10,000-person Harris-Walz rally in Michigan that was live-streamed and widely covered by the media, that it was all AI, and that Democrats cheat all of the time, there is a method to his madness. Clearly, and dangerously, what Trump is doing is undermining American democracy and laying the groundwork for rejecting the election results if he loses. If you can convince your supporters that thousands of people who attended a televised rally do not exist, it will not be hard to convince them that the election returns in Pennsylvania, Michigan, and elsewhere are “fake” and “fraudulent.” It should be a secret to no one. Trump’s goal is to destroy faith in American institutions and the rule of law and move us toward an authoritarian society. But it’s not just Trump’s dishonesty and authoritarianism that must be defeated. We cannot elect someone who believes that, in the year 2024, women do not have the right to control their own bodies. For the sake of our kids and future generations, we cannot elect someone who believes that climate change is a “hoax.” This is why we must do everything we can to see that Trump is defeated and Kamala Harris is our next president. But we must do more. Not only do we have to defeat Trump, but we must build a strong grassroots movement that can confront the extraordinary greed of the big money interests that have so much power over the economic and political life of our country. Our goal: a government that works for all, not just the few. Yes. We need to overturn the disastrous Supreme Court decision on Citizens United and move toward public funding of elections. Billionaires should not be able to buy elections. Yes. We need to join the rest of the industrialized world and guarantee health care to all as a human right, not a privilege. Yes. We need to raise the minimum wage to a living wage and make it easier for workers to join unions. Yes. We need to address the unprecedented level of income and wealth inequality and demand that the wealthy and large corporations start paying their fair share of taxes. Yes. We need to build millions of units of low-income and affordable housing and cap rent increases. Yes. We must end the absurdity of having the highest rate of childhood poverty in almost any major country, make a strong child tax credit permanent, and invest heavily in childcare. Yes. We must strengthen public education in America, pay teachers the salaries they deserve, and make sure that every person, regardless of income, receives the higher education they need to pursue their dreams. Bottom line. We are living in a pivotal moment in American history. In the next three months let us roll up our sleeves, come together, and do the hard work that has to be done in order to defeat Trump and elect Kamala Harris as president. And let us also understand that there will be no progress on these issues or any others that the working people of this country care about if Republicans control the House or the Senate. So not only must we win the presidential race, but it is critical we fight and win races up and down the ballot. But no one person can do that alone -- not Kamala Harris, not Tim Walz, not any candidate running for office anywhere in the country. It will take all of us chipping in to help. **So I am once again asking for your financial support:** [**Can I count on you to make a $27 contribution (or whatever you can afford) to the Democratic National Committee today? They are hoping for a huge number of donations before the convention begins.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-august-elect-dems-2024?amount=27&refcode=em_20240818_931_fr&refcode2=931_22930333_4eVKTy&akid=931%2E22930333%2E4eVKTy) Our task is clear. In the next 78 days let us do all that we can to help the Harris-Walz ticket win a major victory. And, on the day following that win, let us continue our struggle to transform our country and create the kind of nation we know we can become. In Solidarity, Bernie **[CONTRIBUTE NOW](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-august-elect-dems-2024?amount=27&refcode=em_20240818_931_fr&refcode2=931_22930333_4eVKTy&akid=931%2E22930333%2E4eVKTy)**

**[CONTRIBUTE](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dnc-email-footer-button?refcode=em_20240818_931_fr&t=1&refcode2=931_22930333_4eVKTy&akid=931%2E22930333%2E4eVKTy)** **[VOLUNTEER](https://events.democrats.org/?utm_source=dnc_organizing&utm_campaign=em_an_mb_do_vol_vrec_2024EmailWrapper_vm_natl_na_na_na&link_id=8&can_id=c27908da8091781e35ea5e183e5f2d3e&email_referrer=email_2333413___subject_2864174&email_subject=our-commitment-to-electing-democrats-nationwide)** Text **JOIN** to 43367 Manage how often you receive DNC emails, by **[filling out this form](https://ak.democrats.org/signup/receive-less-email/?t=2&akid=931%2E22930333%2E4eVKTy)**. If you no longer wish to receive emails from the DNC, submit this form to **[unsubscribe.](https://ak.democrats.org/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?ak_proof=1&akid=%2E0%2EfyQypR&t=3&akid=931%2E22930333%2E4eVKTy)** If you're ready to elect Democrats in all 50 states, territories, and D.C., **[make a contribution today.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dnc-email-footer?refcode=email-template&t=4&refcode2=931_22930333_4eVKTy&akid=931%2E22930333%2E4eVKTy)** Contributions or gifts to the Democratic National Committee are not tax deductible. Paid for by the Democratic National Committee, www.Democrats.org, and not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee.

name: Elissa Slotkin for Senate
subject: We are being hammered.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ELISSA SLOTKIN FOR MICHIGAN
body:
# [](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/188?t=1&akid=1783%2E135344%2E2T_xsY)

One $3 donation.
That is what we are asking you to make today. We'll explain, but if you’re already sold on the importance of Michigan’s open race for Senate, especially in light of the historic nature of recent developments, and can make that $3 donation right now, please use this link:
**[https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ebs-em-aug24](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/9?c0=ebs-em-aug24._YMjeK&refcode=em240730-3-900&t=2&akid=1783%2E135344%2E2T_xsY)**
Otherwise, here's the deal:
If you ever have the misfortune of finding yourself in the most radical parts of the internet, you will see our campaign getting absolutely bombarded with attacks from Republican opponents.
They are as over-the-top as you would imagine, and we can absolutely expect they will become louder and louder as we get closer to the election.
We have to be prepared. Because it wouldn't be the first time a negative campaign successfully helped a Republican win statewide in Michigan.
If we're going to have a chance to keep the Senate — and if Elissa is going to win — we need your help to keep up the grassroots momentum we have seen over the last few days. This is a moment we need to make the most of. And right now, we're just a bit shy of where we need to be at this point in July.
One $3 donation. That's what we're asking for.
[**That is why I am asking you today: will you chip in $3 directly to my campaign today to help power us through this final sprint and keep Michigan blue? This would be an incredibly important moment for your support.**](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/9?c0=ebs-em-aug24._YMjeK&refcode=em240730-3-900&t=3&akid=1783%2E135344%2E2T_xsY)

clean_body: One $3 donation. That is what we are asking you to make today. We'll explain, but if you’re already sold on the importance of Michigan’s open race for Senate, especially in light of the historic nature of recent developments, and can make that $3 donation right now, please use this link: Otherwise, here's the deal: If you ever have the misfortune of finding yourself in the most radical parts of the internet, you will see our campaign getting absolutely bombarded with attacks from Republican opponents. They are as over-the-top as you would imagine, and we can absolutely expect they will become louder and louder as we get closer to the election. We have to be prepared. Because it wouldn't be the first time a negative campaign successfully helped a Republican win statewide in Michigan. If we're going to have a chance to keep the Senate — and if Elissa is going to win — we need your help to keep up the grassroots momentum we have seen over the last few days. This is a moment we need to make the most of. And right now, we're just a bit shy of where we need to be at this point in July. One $3 donation. That's what we're asking for. If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly: | | ** | | | | | | | ** Thank you, sincerely, for all you do for our campaign. It is because of your support that we have come this far. Elissa Slotkin for Senate PAID FOR BY ELISSA SLOTKIN FOR MICHIGAN P.O. Box 4145 East Lansing, MI 48826

Donald Trump and the extreme right are targeting Rust Belt states like ours because they know that everyday folks in the Midwest could decide this election. You know it, Sherrod knows it, Ohioans know it, and even _Rolling Stone_ knows it: **Our race in Ohio will determine Senate control – and with it, our ability to keep up our fight for the Dignity of Work.**

Well, this is unexpected.
There’s no great way to say this, so I’ll just get right to it: **We’re experiencing the worst fundraising slowdown since we started this race.** The summer is a notoriously difficult time for campaign fundraising – but between us, I didn’t expect the summer slump to hit us quite this hard.
This campaign can only succeed if we reach our fundraising goals, and we have quite a bit of catching up to do before midnight. That’s why I needed to reach out to you directly, team.

Jim Jordan really needs you to see this message!

| | |
Hey there,

Jim Jordan is working his tail off to get Donald Trump elected and grow our House Majority in November!

**So when he took time out of his day to craft this message to you, I knew it must be important!

Jim Jordan needs you to read this message, please take just a few minutes to hear him out.**

Best,
Tom

clean_body: Jim Jordan is working his tail off to get Donald Trump elected and grow our House Majority in November! Jim Jordan really needs you to see this message! | | | | Hey there, Jim Jordan is working his tail off to get Donald Trump elected and grow our House Majority in November! So when he took time out of his day to craft this message to you, I knew it must be important! Jim Jordan needs you to read this message, please take just a few minutes to hear him out. Best, Tom \---------- Forwarded Message --------- From: Jim Jordan Subject: Can I have a moment of your time? To: "<%%Emailc%%>" Can I have a moment of your time? I would really appreciate it. You see, Kamala Harris and her Radical Left base have now raised over $300 million since sending Joe Biden out to pasture! And to make matters worse, the polls are tightening too. "So Friend, will you come to House Republicans' defense TODAY and protect our America First Majority from the Radical Left’s money machine?" | | | "Generic Button" As I travel across the country on behalf of my friend President Trump and Republican candidates up and down the ballot, I have seen firsthand the incredible spirit and love that MAGA patriots like you have as we head closer to November. But the victory is far from guaranteed. We need to run through the finish line and keep this energy going all the way until November 5th. "Support House Republicans in the fight to save America and our conservative Majority." | | | "Generic Button" Look, President Trump will have a lot of work to do to get our nation back on the right track, and having an America First Majority behind him is essential to cleaning up the mess left by Joe Biden and Kamala Harris. "Chipping in $5, $10, or even $47 will go a long way toward making sure that House Republicans have the resources we need to keep Democrats locked out of power!" | | | "Generic Button" Best, | Jim Jordan | | | Paid for by the NRCC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. body:
#
Why can’t Josh Hawley just be normal, Peter?
[](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/67230?refcode=em20240818-7378&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=7378%2E614464%2EkqcI6c)
**[WATCH + CHIP IN](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/67230?refcode=em20240818-7378&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=7378%2E614464%2EkqcI6c)**
**I’m Lucas Kunce, the 13-year Marine veteran running to replace Josh Hawley and flip Missouri’s U.S. Senate seat.** I’m fighting to put everyday people in charge of their own bodies, families, and lives by taking back power from corrupt politicians like Hawley — and today, I’m asking for your help to get it done.
**[So Peter, will you chip in $10 or whatever you can to my grassroots campaign today? subject: BREAKING: Charlie Kirk, Mike Lindell, Stephen Moore Set to Take Stage in McHenry County
body:
Legendary Trump strategist Roger Stone and General Michael Flynn back out of rally, and Trump campaign declining to send video message.

Dear Peter,

We thought you may be interested to read this BREAKING news from Illinois Review, the largest conservative media source in Illinois, and the only source that has been shared by President Donald Trump.
Charlie Kirk, Mike Lindell, Stephen Moore Set to Take Stage at Save the American Dream Rally in McHenry Co. on Sunday (https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2024/08/charlie-kirk-mike-lindell-stephen-moore-set-to-take-stage-at-save-the-american-dream-rally-in-mchenry-co-on-sunday.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=398ed5795d-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_10_30_09_24_COPY_03&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-8b40ac336f-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)
https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2024/08/charlie-kirk-mike-lindell-stephen-moore-set-to-take-stage-at-save-the-american-dream-rally-in-mchenry-co-on-sunday.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=398ed5795d-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_10_30_09_24_COPY_03&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-8b40ac336f-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D
Charlie Kirk, left, Mike Lindell, center and Stephen Moore, far left. (Illinois Review)
By Illinois Review

Turning Point USA Founder Charlie Kirk, MyPillow CEO Mike Lindell and economist Stephen Moore are set to take the stage during the Trump Now Save the American Dream Rally (https://paradingfortrump.com/?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=398ed5795d-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_10_30_09_24_COPY_03&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-8b40ac336f-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D) on Sunday at the McHenry County Fairgrounds, a day before the start of the Democratic National Convention in Chicago.

The rally, hosted by former Republican candidate for governor and businessman Gary Rabine, is expected to draw Trump supporters from Illinois and Wisconsin as Chicago prepares to host the DNC starting on Monday. Other invited speakers include Tom Meredith, Kimberly Fletcher, Tiffany Justice, IL GOP chair Kathy Salvi, IL GOP co-chair Aaron Del Mar, RNC national committeeman Dean White, Tom Sodeika, Chuck Barham, Gary Franchi, Joco Booyens, former Chicago radio host Mancow and Pastor Corey Brooks. AM 560 radio hosts Amy Jacobson, Shaun Thompson, John Anthony and Republican state central committee member Jeanne Ives are also slated to speak.
CLICK TO READ FULL ARTICLE (https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2024/08/charlie-kirk-mike-lindell-stephen-moore-set-to-take-stage-at-save-the-american-dream-rally-in-mchenry-co-on-sunday.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=398ed5795d-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_10_30_09_24_COPY_03&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-8b40ac336f-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)
Retired U.S. Army Gen. Michael Flynn was originally scheduled to speak, but earlier in the week, he signaled that he was unable to attend. And late on Saturday, legendary political strategist and longtime Trump advisor Roger Stone, had to pull out at the last minute as well.
CLICK TO READ FULL ARTICLE (https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2024/08/charlie-kirk-mike-lindell-stephen-moore-set-to-take-stage-at-save-the-american-dream-rally-in-mchenry-co-on-sunday.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=398ed5795d-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_10_30_09_24_COPY_03&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-8b40ac336f-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)

Charlie Kirk, Mike Lindell, Stephen Moore Set to Take Stage at Save the American Dream Rally in McHenry Co. on Sunday () Charlie Kirk, left, Mike Lindell, center and Stephen Moore, far left. (Illinois Review) By Illinois Review Turning Point USA Founder Charlie Kirk, MyPillow CEO Mike Lindell and economist Stephen Moore are set to take the stage during the Trump Now Save the American Dream Rally () on Sunday at the McHenry County Fairgrounds, a day before the start of the Democratic National Convention in Chicago. The rally, hosted by former Republican candidate for governor and businessman Gary Rabine, is expected to draw Trump supporters from Illinois and Wisconsin as Chicago prepares to host the DNC starting on Monday. Other invited speakers include Tom Meredith, Kimberly Fletcher, Tiffany Justice, IL GOP chair Kathy Salvi, IL GOP co-chair Aaron Del Mar, RNC national committeeman Dean White, Tom Sodeika, Chuck Barham, Gary Franchi, Joco Booyens, former Chicago radio host Mancow and Pastor Corey Brooks. AM 560 radio hosts Amy Jacobson, Shaun Thompson, John Anthony and Republican state central committee member Jeanne Ives are also slated to speak. CLICK TO READ FULL ARTICLE () Retired U.S. Army Gen. Michael Flynn was originally scheduled to speak, but earlier in the week, he signaled that he was unable to attend. And late on Saturday, legendary political strategist and longtime Trump advisor Roger Stone, had to pull out at the last minute as well. subject: Help me speak louder
body:
Sports leagues like the NCAA let men into women’s sports.
| Peter, I experienced the left’s radical gender ideology firsthand.
**When I was in college, I was forced to compete against a man at the NCAA Women’s Swimming Championships.** But instead of staying silent,**I spoke louder**. And I’m still speaking out, Peter. Men and women are different -- equal, but different. No matter how much the gender radicals demand otherwise. That’s why I’m fighting back, with the**Riley Gaines Center at the Leadership Institute. ** Through the Riley Gaines Center, my team of Ambassadors and I spearhead a growing nationwide movement to defend women, common sense, and free speech. This isn’t just a women’s issue. _It’s a humanitarian issue_. It affects men and women, girls and boys. Because men don’t want to see women robbed of their opportunities or put in danger. And every person has the right to speak the truth. Will you help me speak louder and strengthen this movement? [Your gift of $25, $50, or $100 will help have an immediate impact. ](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=a69bbd044ff24dc896f017c0d7a61bb0&_e=cJTE4z45ZIhHNit6rDzX7iXY3T2PVBMotLr01k3CMpiaIS3BG1d6aYbaKdhj0Xeh6FdySVRJkHQEwxDBqb59SUj80sbH1VnT9xzPt2Zkw_nd0RurgdI8yA6ShsbevlNz3vDWydAKOf664cBHqtvDkNHqvDQ3-yCxfTG9MgRVQe0KO_f48ZohiY_1cyWzKPHx_ojq08X3ZrTxVFJpPBp-x4FiQUxcvTFNN3_CqV5jhp_VSiOQQoEHtxmUmIj7sddriqa8BskjwF6iwuA5SEoYcYydrbP0nHkSilWwCrjVWnpUDPoAP2lz-ZfBvk6ugCMjBRpiuvdLcfvxM5NbthNLQdG8AJ7kLpbgsW-fD51paAAKpHvVdZww6eaeH1yFmRLDgHf19L95VSFkD8oSH-6C5hkdJjiKGZIpQQEyCeeXvFE5PsXRHI6iB4zue8tohUwjQWEjXpXv8CXEOquP3lMNdp4bkvmIUkErOZSfEDfskUmhAgQn3DFKfTZmI4oNt9858B39e8PLfLnHfR-q124HKg%3D%3D) Leftist schools intimidate America’s daughters. Sports leagues like the NCAA let men into women’s sports. But now my Riley Gaines Center Ambassadors and I are here to lead the charge to protect our hard-earned rights as a woman. [Please join the fight today, Peter. ](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=a69bbd044ff24dc896f017c0d7a61bb0&_e=cJTE4z45ZIhHNit6rDzX7iXY3T2PVBMotLr01k3CMpiaIS3BG1d6aYbaKdhj0Xeh6FdySVRJkHQEwxDBqb59SUj80sbH1VnT9xzPt2Zkw_nd0RurgdI8yA6ShsbevlNz3vDWydAKOf664cBHqtvDkNHqvDQ3-yCxfTG9MgRVQe0KO_f48ZohiY_1cyWzKPHx_ojq08X3ZrTxVFJpPBp-x4FiQUxcvTFNN3_CqV5jhp_VSiOQQoEHtxmUmIj7sddriqa8BskjwF6iwuA5SEoYcYydrbP0nHkSilWwCrjVWnpUDPoAP2lz-ZfBvk6ugCMjBRpiuvdLcfvxM5NbthNLQdG8AJ7kLpbgsW-fD51paAAKpHvVdZww6eaeH1yFmRLD1GYdLtvI93FvpadjdUS8PUOT_te1Wf4mKu_E8OyatvuXvWtcLzaohGCIIP8ZlG6fRUscWgTTDN_iy9wcmu9VegXEsEGZbZ8dR8rG2ir6cu2a8lsLEa1obI3-6AYyROXKA1WuJfjETu0Jjmy0GQe2jQ%3D%3D) I look forward to welcoming you to our team! name: Roger Ream
subject: They're back
body:
These students are brave.
In the spring, Iranian-funded, radical, left-wing college students from America’s best universities seized control of their campuses.
| [ ](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=cde46274a2ca4774ac0e8df12cf79250&_e=NPhN1yRbS1fM9UNTmGwR-D6PYgJs6TU_l1AANWZxjkcPKewwEbX7BHRcZGLFVsF7PxUBdzzCva5PUt8WvR_76t2VAqY7lajMbDfSckexst48cxrM8vxoJPEcQVXr9_WJfFLZ8wqEqp4cvO6FuLiaDf3R8gtd-_9Oh4kIhWtQsqYliYTi0lcbG4FAgpPtB3HE8euuiPoumAG8Rlv-zzw-ZEN3x0Q8fyfPNS2FEcL8Quz8g_LtQmD3OBWdwo3I5RPSfLG-0LSxtLTj7-KXrqTGAl0za4tQcSZrg3TrQwz9ldUf2fGQluPn6tbXtLs9WLTxBqHbY_eKDYrXmQSbvDuESxn8okH6UWWs7K4fM9iMm9QCGKFbNlB3uPQJPXJfUhQ-)
---
Friend, In the spring, Iranian-funded, radical, left-wing college students from America’s best universities seized control of their campuses.

They destroyed property.

They physically intimidated Jewish students (once driving many to hide inside a library!). And, through it all, they chanted hateful calls for genocide. But, did anyone oppose them on campus?

Administrations largely cowered. And, at the start, the mainstream media largely ignored them. However, a few The Fund for American Studies (TFAS) student journalists said no. At Harvard, Stanford, Northwestern, the University of Chicago, and more, our students said no.

Student journalists, such as those at the _Harvard Salient_ , published op-eds denouncing their peers.
---
[ ](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=cde46274a2ca4774ac0e8df12cf79250&_e=NPhN1yRbS1fM9UNTmGwR-D6PYgJs6TU_l1AANWZxjkcPKewwEbX7BHRcZGLFVsF7PxUBdzzCva5PUt8WvR_76t2VAqY7lajMbDfSckexst48cxrM8vxoJPEcQVXr9_WJfFLZ8wqEqp4cvO6FuLiaDf3R8gtd-_9Oh4kIhWtQsqYliYTi0lcbG4FAgpPtB3HE8euuiPoumAG8Rlv-zzw-ZIoUpGhEfOCUBt_WLxxZd1u_SgynEZfrTtCdFGnt9_y5rJXhfG2fcnQ_96Bm87PhoWPNzlXdPAPkxC9OnRgncpuvRyjfDWTHysc5TR7xrqPNAscWFTpHT0bPLfc9E4lKHuUAtjJYZqzSeMEg6bNnskCMIocttkKpKrpv3MpTtNqA)
---
"There is no excuse for a Harvard Student--or any American--choosing to carry water for these groups." \- The Harvard Salient
---
These students are brave. And that’s why we are trying to raise $10,000 to fund these bold conservative student journalists at 18 different universities by August 31st. [Friend will you make the first donation to our campaign by donating $500, $250, $100, $50, or even just $25 right now?](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=cde46274a2ca4774ac0e8df12cf79250&_e=NPhN1yRbS1fM9UNTmGwR-D6PYgJs6TU_l1AANWZxjkcPKewwEbX7BHRcZGLFVsF7PxUBdzzCva5PUt8WvR_76t2VAqY7lajMbDfSckexst48cxrM8vxoJPEcQVXr9_WJfFLZ8wqEqp4cvO6FuLiaDf3R8gtd-_9Oh4kIhWtQsqYliYTi0lcbG4FAgpPtB3HE8euuiPoumAG8Rlv-zzw-ZBWzvIITR7sCBAS69RUe0U3UxlGo3zloJnrTpVWOmiWSzw_PsB7jG_P95_OhMOw0bpOH4_8JBe0hna9uft7MWmervLIFzdi3Meo2dVubxyVO7k6twj77is90Zwh-O38373qc3bVXs7nEcXGCNdhoNlhElYsCL2-exmuxb8eu2cM-)
---
When one-in-three college students deny that the Hamas attacks happened and thousands of masked student protestors proudly chant “Intifada Revolution,” can you imagine the bravery it takes to disagree with them? But, students like Columbia’s Jonas Du or UChicago’s Jahmiel Jackson do it every day. And unlike their peers, they’re not hiding their identity. They are proudly showing honorable leadership. Friend, these students cannot do it alone. That’s why TFAS is trying to raise $10,000 to keep their newspapers fighting on campuses. [Will you please step up and donate anything that you can right now to support these brave student journalists?](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=cde46274a2ca4774ac0e8df12cf79250&_e=NPhN1yRbS1fM9UNTmGwR-D6PYgJs6TU_l1AANWZxjkcPKewwEbX7BHRcZGLFVsF7PxUBdzzCva5PUt8WvR_76t2VAqY7lajMbDfSckexst48cxrM8vxoJPEcQVXr9_WJfFLZ8wqEqp4cvO6FuLiaDf3R8gtd-_9Oh4kIhWtQsqYliYTi0lcbG4FAgpPtB3HE8euuiPoumAG8Rlv-zzw-ZKTzkDFZIoOnbW9H9p3ZU-PhIwahIvpp77a6o175LccFRZKmdRhit30uyXipykufqWnLhWsRdxWysn4H1-sY_ZVgtEAtLNjOJy6B-8E9umH-3kWnJjx0D6mf0-hRXp3keLvgrVIfazGTkkVyVKBX_0r1dnoUWauIjTCt8vE0dLju)******

** Sincerely,
Roger Ream President The Fund for American Studies

clean_body: These students are brave. In the spring, Iranian-funded, radical, left-wing college students from America’s best universities seized control of their campuses. | - Friend, In the spring, Iranian-funded, radical, left-wing college students from America’s best universities seized control of their campuses. They destroyed property. They physically intimidated Jewish students (once driving many to hide inside a library!). And, through it all, they chanted hateful calls for genocide. But, did anyone oppose them on campus? Administrations largely cowered. And, at the start, the mainstream media largely ignored them. However, a few The Fund for American Studies (TFAS) student journalists said no. At Harvard, Stanford, Northwestern, the University of Chicago, and more, our students said no. Student journalists, such as those at the Harvard Salient , published op-eds denouncing their peers. "There is no excuse for a Harvard Student--or any American--choosing to carry water for these groups." \- The Harvard Salient These students are brave. And that’s why we are trying to raise $10,000 to fund these bold conservative student journalists at 18 different universities by August 31st. - When one-in-three college students deny that the Hamas attacks happened and thousands of masked student protestors proudly chant “Intifada Revolution,” can you imagine the bravery it takes to disagree with them? But, students like Columbia’s Jonas Du or UChicago’s Jahmiel Jackson do it every day. And unlike their peers, they’re not hiding their identity. They are proudly showing honorable leadership. Friend, these students cannot do it alone. That’s why TFAS is trying to raise $10,000 to keep their newspapers fighting on campuses. **** Sincerely, Roger Ream President The Fund for American Studies | | - | | | | | The Fund for American Studies (TFAS), 1706 New Hampshire Ave., NW, Washington, DC 20009, United States

subject: we're officially being outspent on TV ads
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TAMMY BALDWIN FOR SENATE
body:
| _Tammy Baldwin here — I wanted to make sure you saw this message from my colleague Sherrod Brown. Sherrod is running for reelection in Ohio to defend our Senate majority, so I hope you'll read his message and**[chip in if you can.](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/2155?c0=tbe-em-brown.JYBKxm&refcode=AU_STB_FR_TAN_GEN_AC_20240818_AM1_V1_S1&t=3&akid=3324%2E35263%2ESIobNP)**_
* * *
[](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/2155?c0=tbe-em-brown.JYBKxm&refcode=AU_STB_FR_TAN_GEN_AC_20240818_AM1_V1_S1&t=4&akid=3324%2E35263%2ESIobNP) Peter, I spoke last week with my campaign manager, and she broke some tough news: **We're officially being outspent on TV ads.** I know, friend, I almost spit out my coffee when she told me. But here's the deal: **The GOP is zeroing in on our race because they know control of the Senate hinges on what happens here in Ohio.** That's why they've named me a top target for defeat and why they're making record-breaking investments to defeat me. Let me make one thing clear, friend: The GOP might outspend us in this race, but they will not outwork us. If we can keep reaching voters with our pro-worker message, we'll win. **To make sure we have what it takes to win this race, my team and I have set an ambitious $200,000 daily fundraising goal to hit _before midnight tonight._ And I'm counting on top supporters like you to help me reach it.** **[So please, friend, will you chip in $10, $25, or more now to split between my campaign and Tammy Baldwin to help me raise the resources I need to win in Ohio and defend our Senate majority?](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/2155?c0=tbe-em-brown.JYBKxm&refcode=AU_STB_FR_TAN_GEN_AC_20240818_AM1_V1_S1&t=5&akid=3324%2E35263%2ESIobNP)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation to Sherrod Brown and Tammy Baldwin will go through immediately:_ | | [SPLIT $10 NOW](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/3664?c0=tbe-em-brown.yRJbqX&refcode=AU_STB_FR_TAN_GEN_AC_20240818_AM1_V1_S1&t=6&akid=3324%2E35263%2ESIobNP)

name: Chuck Schumer
subject: Here’s why I’m so worried about this race:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by James for NY 2026
body:
| | |
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/91052268/492556996/1231922548?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk1571-bu-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlYjlmNmU0My02YzVkLWVmMTEtOTkxYS02MDQ1YmRkYmZjNGIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=mf1SVeRtWzaHL2A0itZqye3Lb46ptuXeEDnRyuhZDEY=)
Peter, November might be a few months away, but election season is already in full swing.

So much is on the line this year, from abortion access to better wages and working conditions to our fundamental right to vote. Future progress on all of these issues depends on protecting our razor-thin Democratic Senate majority – and if we wait until the fall to take action, it’ll already be too late.

[**That’s why I’m asking you to support my friend and colleague Sherrod Brown today. Sherrod is in the fight of his life in Ohio, and experts say this race could decide Senate control, so please: Give every dollar you can to split between Sherrod and Letitia James to help reelect a true champion for working families.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/91052269/492556997/1231922548?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk1571-bu-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlYjlmNmU0My02YzVkLWVmMTEtOTkxYS02MDQ1YmRkYmZjNGIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=mf1SVeRtWzaHL2A0itZqye3Lb46ptuXeEDnRyuhZDEY=)

---
Here’s why I’m so worried about this race: Experts are calling Sherrod one of the most vulnerable senators on the ballot, and national Republicans smell blood. They’re already spending millions to flip this seat and the Senate red, and Mitch McConnell’s super PACs just made their largest ad investment EVER to try to take down Sherrod.

Now, polls show this race is neck and neck, so Sherrod’s counting on US – you and me, friend – to help him pull ahead. Unlike his wealthy self-funding opponent, Sherrod can’t write his campaign million-dollar checks. That’s why I set a personal goal to raise $75,000 for Sherrod’s campaign by midnight tonight, and I need you to help me get there.

[**If we lose this race, we lose the Senate, plain and simple. With that in mind, will you rush $5 or more to help Sherrod win in Ohio and defend our Senate majority?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/91052271/492556999/1231922548?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk1571-bu-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlYjlmNmU0My02YzVkLWVmMTEtOTkxYS02MDQ1YmRkYmZjNGIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=mf1SVeRtWzaHL2A0itZqye3Lb46ptuXeEDnRyuhZDEY=)

Thank you.

– Chuck Schumer

name: Ruben Gallego for Senate
subject: Kari Lake called abortion the “Ultimate Sin”
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Gallego for Arizona
body:
That kind of statement should be disqualifying in itself, but here’s something just as troubling:
#

Yeah, that’s right, Peter.
Kari Lake called abortion the “Ultimate Sin.”
That kind of statement should be disqualifying in itself, but here’s something just as troubling:
A poll came out on Thursday that shows Kari Lake tied with Ruben Gallego. It was commissioned by the National Republican Senatorial Committee — the official campaign arm of the Senate GOP. The elite of the Republican elite.
These guys don’t just put out polls they don’t trust. That means Kari Lake has a 50/50 chance of winning in Arizona right now. If she makes it to the U.S. Senate then arguably the most extreme, most radical woman in the MAGA-right will have a massive amount of power and influence.
If that doesn’t send a chill up your spine, we don’t know what will.
We’ve got one option here. We must defeat her.
And to do that, Ruben Gallego has to hit his fundraising goals. So, please:

name: Sent from Debbie's iPhone
subject: playing dominoes with my mom
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Debbie for Florida
body:
Screenshot 2024-08-18 at 10.15.23 AM
| | |
---
Friend, every Sunday my mom and I spend the afternoon playing dominoes together. It's our special tradition — and it's one of the most meaningful parts of my life.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/91052662/492558567/849749119?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk1741-fr-nd&recurring=1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS8xMDc1MjUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZmUzNzc5ZjgtNmM1ZC1lZjExLTk5MWEtNjA0NWJkZGJmYzRiIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=ZZk5EPQ5__2uqDOTDOfOcx_jTi3sZ5mbs98IiDFq3bo=)
I owe just about everything in my life to my mom. She made the brave decision to move my family from our home in Ecuador to America. It wasn't easy moving to a new country as a 14-year-old, but I can't imagine what it was like for my mom, having to start all over and working double shifts just to pay rent for a one room apartment.
But friend, my mom never wavered once. **Her constant reassurance, work ethic, and firm belief in the American dream inspired me to fight for a better life.**
I studied hard, got a minimum wage job, and earned scholarships to pay for college. After school, I found a career giving back to my community through public service, eventually becoming the first South American immigrant elected to Congress. I've found purpose in my life, become part of a unique community, and raised a beautiful family.
**Because of my mom's sacrifices, my family got our American dream. And now, it's both a privilege and a joy to be my mom's caretaker, ensuring that she can age with dignity and comfort.** There are a lot of big things that come along with that job — managing her doctor's appointments, advocating for her care, and navigating the all-too-complicated Medicare and Social Security systems.
But it's the little parts of caring for my mom — playing our weekly domino games, cooking a big dinner for her, taking her on trips to her favorite places — that matter most to me.
My ability to give my mom a good retirement is one of the things that I am most grateful for. It's not easy by any means, but I know all too well just how lucky my mom and I are. **These days, it's getting harder and harder for Americans to age with dignity and comfort.**
Far-right Republicans have fought for major cuts to Social Security and blocked efforts to expand Medicare, leaving seniors living paycheck to paycheck. Instead they want to cut or privatize these critical public programs — my opponent Rick Scott actually came up with a plan to _end_ them altogether. Even though I've been able to give my mom a good retirement, the shortcomings of these programs still make it incredibly hard to get her the care and support she needs.
**Every American deserves a good, stable retirement. That's why I'm running for Senate — to fight for people like my mom.[Polls show that we've got a real chance to win, but I'm counting on your help to power my grassroots campaign. Please, if you believe in a better future for seniors, will you rush $5 to help me defeat Rick Scott and protect Social Security and Medicare?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/91052663/492558581/849749119?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&amount=5&refcode=jtk1741-fr-nd&recurring=1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS8xMDc1MjUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZmUzNzc5ZjgtNmM1ZC1lZjExLTk5MWEtNjA0NWJkZGJmYzRiIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=ZZk5EPQ5__2uqDOTDOfOcx_jTi3sZ5mbs98IiDFq3bo=)**
_Please use the links in this email to start a weekly donation through ActBlue._ | | | [DONATE $5](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/91052666/492558582/849749119?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&amount=5&refcode=jtk1741-fr-nd&recurring=1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS8xMDc1MjUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZmUzNzc5ZjgtNmM1ZC1lZjExLTk5MWEtNjA0NWJkZGJmYzRiIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=ZZk5EPQ5__2uqDOTDOfOcx_jTi3sZ5mbs98IiDFq3bo=)
---

clean_body: Screenshot 2024-08-18 at 10.15.23 AM | | | Friend, every Sunday my mom and I spend the afternoon playing dominoes together. It's our special tradition — and it's one of the most meaningful parts of my life. = I owe just about everything in my life to my mom. She made the brave decision to move my family from our home in Ecuador to America. It wasn't easy moving to a new country as a 14-year-old, but I can't imagine what it was like for my mom, having to start all over and working double shifts just to pay rent for a one room apartment. But friend, my mom never wavered once. Her constant reassurance, work ethic, and firm belief in the American dream inspired me to fight for a better life. I studied hard, got a minimum wage job, and earned scholarships to pay for college. After school, I found a career giving back to my community through public service, eventually becoming the first South American immigrant elected to Congress. I've found purpose in my life, become part of a unique community, and raised a beautiful family. Because of my mom's sacrifices, my family got our American dream. And now, it's both a privilege and a joy to be my mom's caretaker, ensuring that she can age with dignity and comfort. There are a lot of big things that come along with that job — managing her doctor's appointments, advocating for her care, and navigating the all-too-complicated Medicare and Social Security systems. But it's the little parts of caring for my mom — playing our weekly domino games, cooking a big dinner for her, taking her on trips to her favorite places — that matter most to me. My ability to give my mom a good retirement is one of the things that I am most grateful for. It's not easy by any means, but I know all too well just how lucky my mom and I are. These days, it's getting harder and harder for Americans to age with dignity and comfort. Far-right Republicans have fought for major cuts to Social Security and blocked efforts to expand Medicare, leaving seniors living paycheck to paycheck. Instead they want to cut or privatize these critical public programs — my opponent Rick Scott actually came up with a plan to end them altogether. Even though I've been able to give my mom a good retirement, the shortcomings of these programs still make it incredibly hard to get her the care and support she needs. Every American deserves a good, stable retirement. That's why I'm running for Senate — to fight for people like my mom.= Please use the links in this email to start a weekly donation through ActBlue. | | | = | | = | | = | | = Thank you so much, Debbie | * | | | = Debbie Mucarsel-Powell is a Floridian, South American immigrant, mother, and former Congresswoman. She’s dedicated her life to uplifting working families, ending gun violence, and fighting for her community. Now, she’s running to defeat Republican Senator Rick Scott and win a better, brighter future for Florida.

Friend,

The House GOP Chair’s polling and data team asked me to follow up with you on your 2024 Trump-Voter Entrance Poll.

\*\*You see, while the Democrats are spending\*\* BILLIONS \*\*to win votes in the 2024 election, the GOP’s strategy is different: We’re going to win this election by addressing the concerns of voters like YOU.\*\*

clean_body: I am officially the Democratic nominee against Lauren Boebert, and I’m emailing today to humbly ask if you can make a donation to my campaign for Congress to defeat Boebert and flip this seat blue. | Peter, I am officially the Democratic nominee against Lauren Boebert, and I’m emailing today to humbly ask if you can make a donation to my campaign for Congress to defeat Boebert and flip this seat blue. In 2022, Lauren Boebert barely won re-election. Her Democratic opponent, Adam Frisch, lost by just 546 votes in the closest race in the entire country. Afraid she was in trouble again, Lauren Boebert ran scared to my congressional district, thinking she could carpetbag her way back to Congress. Not on my watch. Brand-new polling shows that Boebert is once again vulnerable and that I can send her packing and turn this seat blue – but only if grassroots donors like you give now: Please use the links in this email to start a weekly donation through ActBlue: | | | | | | | | | | I’m not taking money from corporate PACs like Boebert, so I have nowhere else to turn. Thank you in advance for any amount you can afford to chip in. I am eternally grateful, Trisha ** Paid for by Trisha 4 Colorado Trisha 4 Colorado PO Box 630633 Highlands Ranch, CO 80130 Contributions or gifts to Trisha 4 Colorado are not tax deductible.

name: Chris Deluzio
subject: Kamala Harris and Tim Walz are coming to Pittsburgh!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY CHRIS DELUZIO FOR CONGRESS
body:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/91056154/492567666/1895761198?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjU0MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5NmY0NDFhYS03MjVkLWVmMTEtOTkxYS02MDQ1YmRkYmZjNGIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=MWTS2KSHEZI7LaUPwsC3KmOTL-doBN9Fd6IlQPpbVug=&emci=92f441aa-725d-ef11-991a-6045bddbfc4b&emdi=96f441aa-725d-ef11-991a-6045bddbfc4b&ceid=13185894) **Vice President Kamala Harris and Tim Walz are coming to Pittsburgh TODAY to kick off their bus tour!**

Derek, Kamala and Tim know how important Western Pennsylvania is in this year’s election. They know that races in Pennsylvania have come down to just 1 percentage point. They know that Pennsylvania will be the deciding state in this election.

I know firsthand how close races can be in Pennsylvania. I’m running for re-election in PA-17—one of the closest House races in the country—and I’m up against an opponent who embraces election deniers and insurrectionists and who wants to roll back a woman’s right to choose. [**Kamala Harris and Tim Walz know how important it is to keep this seat—and all of Pennsylvania—blue this November.
