name: No Dem Left Behind
subject: The Power of Rural Democrats
body:
Local parties are coming together like never before to build a rural resurgence.
| | | | | |
---
# Rural Democrats Are Being Heard.
---
|
---
The pandemic changed so much for so many Americans. There are a few silver linings amongst those clouds. The world learned how to be more digitally connected and connected across great distances. Rural America is all about great distances. For years, political organizing was an insurmountable challenge in certain districts. Upon No Dem Left Behind's founding, we recognized that obstacle and had a plan to address it. Our early virtual town halls utilized celebrity star-power to spotlight Dems in deep-red districts. Our ROCC forums taught the principles of organizing in a peer-learning environment. Our work on ARPA inspired activism in Republican-led counties. In short, our mission was to connect and empower rural Democrats to build the infrastructure to reshape the Electoral Map in the years to come.
---
|
---
The lesson? After the rain, comes flowers.
---
|
---
It's a pleasure to have you with us in this ongoing journey. And that's how rural Democrats are feeling. Our reward at No Dem Left Behind comes when we step into that local Dems meeting, when we partner and accomplish something together, we get that great, big "thank you". Thanks for recognizing us, remembering us, and making sure we never feel left behind. If you can spare a little to support this work, we'd greatly appreciate it...
---
| | | | | [→ Support Rural Democrats](https://click.nodemleftbehind.com/click/gpnv-2ui1hu-emxa0b-kyd76rh0/)
---
To tomorrow's field of flowers. — No Dem Left Behind
---
|
---
|
---
No Dem Left Behind PAC P.O. Box 15320 Washington, D.C. 20003
---
|
---

I’m here to help, so ask me anything |
---

| | Hey y’all, I’m Peaches, and I’m here to help folks in Georgia learn about voting. To do that, we must reach as many voters across the district as we can, gather the needed resources, and build our grassroots support. | = | Team, Evan is the official Democratic nominee running to represent California’s 16th district! = | = Republicans wouldn’t want someone like Evan, a progressive gay Asian American, in Congress. That’s exactly why we need him representing us. He won’t back down to extremists vying to undermine our democracy and take away our rights. We’re gearing up for the General Election to ensure that Evan has a fighting chance. To do that, we must reach as many voters across the district as we can, gather the needed resources, and build our grassroots support. = | | = | = | = | | = | = | = | = Let’s do this! Team Low | | = Paid for by Evan Low for Congress Evan Low for Congress 1700 Tribute Road, Suite 201 Sacramento, CA 95815 United States | = = | | Throughout his time in public service, Evan has defended our most vulnerable and built coalitions to deliver solutions. Now, he's running for Congress at an inflection point for Silicon Valley and the nation. Our region needs a representative who will lead on maintaining our global competitiveness, combat hate, stand up for the vulnerable, protect reproductive freedom, reduce crime in our communities, and ensure the middle class can once again afford to buy a house and raise a family where they work. Together, we will usher in a new era of courageous leadership for Silicon Valley. =**

**With everything from abortion rights to Social Security and Medicare on the line, November 5th could be the end of our democracy as we know it. That’s why it’s critical for us to do everything we can to defend our Senate majority from far-right extremists like Rick Scott, JD Vance, and Donald Trump. **
**[Please, friend: Will you chip in $3 right now to split between my campaign and Maggie Hassan's to help me reach my $3 million pre-primary goal before midnight tonight to help me protect our Senate and democracy from right-wing extremism?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/91059973/492578822/-1622835584?amounts=3,10,25,50,100&refcode=mh-jtk2653-bu-nd&recurring=0&amount=3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MjcxNGVlZS03YTVkLWVmMTEtOTkxYS02MDQ1YmRkYmZjNGIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=heNyRyEz984qXb3eyCoM_W_gwQQcVoJsFWvHytfJMdo=)**

It’s no secret that if Trump, Vance, and Scott win in November, they'll work closely to push forward their dangerous agenda. They'll roll back voting rights and reproductive freedom — even more so than they already have — cut critical government programs like Social Security and Medicare, and end the Affordable Care Act.
I’ve spent my life serving Floridians because I listen to and care about our communities. I've helped **protect the Everglades** , worked at the state and national level to **expand health care access** , and **fought to defend reproductive rights**. **I won’t let Rick Scott continue to scheme and lie just to advance his self-serving agenda and the interests of his ultra-wealthy friends. **
**Our race in Florida could determine both control of the Senate and the next Senate majority leader, which means it’s more important than ever to protect our Democratic Senate majority. And that starts by defeating Rick Scott and flipping Florida blue. **
**[Unlike my opponent, friend, I’m running a true grassroots movement powered by on-the-ground supporters like you. name: Pramila Jayapal
subject: This email contains nuts
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pramila for Congress
body:
I spent 10 years growing up in Indonesia and one of my favorite things was the peanut satay.
# [](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/892?refcode=em20240818-4200-footer&t=1&akid=4200%2E420207%2ElDrhfr)
Peter,
I spent 10 years growing up in Indonesia and one of my favorite things was the peanut satay.
**Recently, I found a super easy recipe for peanut tofu satay** – and I have been obsessed with it since! This peanut satay is great served with brown rice or even a quick fried rice that you can make with day old rice and frozen veggies.
This recipe reminds me of growing up and has been some quick comfort food after long days – which are getting more and more common in this heated election year.
Today, I want to do something super special. With every [**donation**](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/47393?c0=pj-email-20240818.yHoCnh&refcode=em20240818-4200&t=2&akid=4200%2E420207%2ElDrhfr) made to my campaign, I am going to include this comfort recipe in the donation receipt so you can try it out for yourself!
**[Contribute](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/47393?c0=pj-email-20240818.yHoCnh&refcode=em20240818-4200&t=21&akid=4200%2E420207%2ElDrhfr)**
[**Feel good about doing your part in this election by making a $3 donation and celebrate with some fantastic peanut tofu.**](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/47393?c0=pj-email-20240818.yHoCnh&refcode=em20240818-4200&t=22&akid=4200%2E420207%2ElDrhfr)
Let me know how this recipe turns out for you!
–Pramila
**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-footer?refcode=em20240818-4200-footer&t=23&refcode2=4200_420207_lDrhfr&akid=4200%2E420207%2ElDrhfr)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/pramila.jayapal) | [](https://twitter.com/pramilajayapal) | [](https://www.instagram.com/pramilajayapal/)
Email us: info@pramilaforcongress.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, and small-dollar contributions sustain our movement for transformative change. To contribute by check, please address to Pramila for Congress, PO Box 21912, Seattle, WA 98111.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/did-your-info-change/?t=24&akid=4200%2E420207%2ElDrhfr)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=25&akid=4200%2E420207%2ElDrhfr)

[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/91059958/492578775/872526041?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NjIxNiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4NjcxNGVlZS03YTVkLWVmMTEtOTkxYS02MDQ1YmRkYmZjNGIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=THJi9O2tldduu1POS2DZCLrpfaZTLKk7Ie3wgB_uy3c=&emci=33702a60-f55b-ef11-991a-6045bddbfc4b&emdi=86714eee-7a5d-ef11-991a-6045bddbfc4b&ceid=19445147)
Hello,
We’re emailing to ask for $1 to help Adam Frisch win this November.
No, that’s not a typo. Our next fundraising deadline is coming fast, and we’re still short of our $50,000 goal and what we need to win this critical House seat.
We know $1 might not seem like a lot – and it’s not. But combined with tens of thousands of other grassroots donors chipping in, your $1 has _enormous_ impact.
$1 lets us fill up the tank as Adam continues crisscrossing the district, meeting with voters who are fed up with the angertainment antics of extremists in Washington.
$1 lets us invest early in staff and the critical resources it takes to build a winning campaign.
$1 lets us counter the Super PAC lies.
And $1 lets us take the lead in what was the closest race in the country last year – decided by just 546 votes.

Our next fundraising deadline is coming fast, and we’re still short of our $50,000 goal and what we need to win this critical House seat. We know $1 might not seem like a lot – and it’s not. But combined with tens of thousands of other grassroots donors chipping in, your $1 has enormous impact. $1 lets us fill up the tank as Adam continues crisscrossing the district, meeting with voters who are fed up with the angertainment antics of extremists in Washington. $1 lets us invest early in staff and the critical resources it takes to build a winning campaign. $1 lets us counter the Super PAC lies. And $1 lets us take the lead in what was the closest race in the country last year – decided by just 546 votes. _Montana Suffragists Campaigning in 1914_
On this day 104 years ago, women _finally_ gained the right to vote with the ratification of the 19th Amendment. Today, Sharice Davids and I aren't just two women asking to cast a ballot – we're two women asking citizens to cast ballots for us! And to make history when they do. clean_body: Today, we're giving a new meaning to votes for women. | = Montana Suffragists Campaigning in 1914 On this day 104 years ago, women finally gained the right to vote with the ratification of the 19th Amendment. Today, Sharice Davids and I aren't just two women asking to cast a ballot – we're two women asking citizens to cast ballots for us! And to make history when they do. = 🥊 Sharice Davids is a former MMA fighter who became one of the first two Native American women to serve in Congress and the first LGBTQ+ Native American elected to Congress. = 🚁 I'm an Apache helicopter pilot who would be the first woman West Point graduate elected to Congress. = | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = | = | = ---|---|--- = | = | = Thanks for having our backs, Ashley Ehasz - candidate for Pennsylvania's 1st Congressional District Sharice Davids - candidate for Kansas's 3rd Congressional District | Ashley Ehasz is a U.S. Army veteran, Apache helicopter pilot, and proudly pro-choice Democrat running to unseat Republican Brian Fitzpatrick and represent Pennsylvania’s 1st Congressional District to defend our democracy, restore reproductive rights, tackle corporate greed, advocate for bold gun safety measures, and fight for working families across southeast PA. | = = | Paid for by Ehasz for Congress Ehasz for Congress 1800 Byberry Road #1336 Bensalem, PA 19020 United States Ashley Ehasz is a former member of the U.S. Army. Bernie was born in Bogota, Colombia. At age five, his American Dream began when he moved to the United States with his family. Bernie became an American citizen at age 18.

Through his relentless work ethic and untamable entrepreneurial spirit, he turned the first car dealership that he purchased in 2005 into one of the largest dealership groups in America.

In 2016, Bernie recognized the value and transformational potential of blockchain technology, before it received mainstream attention, and moved much of his volunteer time and investment dollars into the space. In 2018 he co-founded ChampTitles, which grew to be quite successful as Bernie served as Chairman of the Board.

After a long, successful career, Bernie sold most of his business to begin focusing on his calling: protecting the American dream for another generation.

Solving our country’s problems requires common sense. In Washington, Bernie will fight to shrink government, protect our freedoms, stop the Chinese Communist party from taking our data and land, and always put America First.

Ohioans are done with politicians who talk a big game and do nothing. Bernie wants to go to D.C. to get work done – just like he always has.

subject: I'm a bona fide Scrabble fanatic

body:
| | |
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/91060163/492579272/-1893289703?amounts=250,100,50,25,5&refcode=jtk2509-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzY0NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhZjg2NDk5Zi03YjVkLWVmMTEtOTkxYS02MDQ1YmRkYmZjNGIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=NzqE71poZlsyzuL2mQ67rbT3C0lebgmJAIqyXbAaTBU=)
Not a lot of people know this about me, friend, but I'm a bona fide Scrabble fanatic. When I'm home from a busy week, you'll find Connie and me out on our deck fully engrossed in a game. Sometimes our rescue dogs Franklin and Walter join in – but I'll be honest, their spelling is a little "ruff."
Another thing most people don't know is that Scrabble harkens back to the Great Depression. It was developed by an unemployed architect, and the first Scrabble factory was in an old schoolhouse in rural Connecticut where they produced 12 games an hour. The chairman of Macy's came across the game while on vacation, and the rest, as they say, is history.
Scrabble's success story reminds me of the American dream and all of the reasons our fight for the Dignity of Work is so important. The 1930s were a tough time for our country, but Franklin D. Roosevelt's New Deal and several important advances for the labor movement came out of that period: better hours, a guaranteed minimum wage, and the right to unionize.
I'm fighting every day in the Senate to make sure progress for workers never stops – but I need your help to keep it up. Mitch McConnell and the GOP are all in to defeat me because this race could decide Senate control – so I'm counting on folks like you to help me compete.
[**Right now, I'm falling short of my daily fundraising goal, and I need a triple word score to turn things around. Will you chip in $5, $25, or any amount so I can hit my goal, win, and keep the Senate blue?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/91060164/492579273/-1893289703?amounts=250,100,50,25,5&refcode=jtk2509-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzY0NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhZjg2NDk5Zi03YjVkLWVmMTEtOTkxYS02MDQ1YmRkYmZjNGIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=NzqE71poZlsyzuL2mQ67rbT3C0lebgmJAIqyXbAaTBU=)
Thank you so much,
Sherrod Brown

#
Hi Peter – it’s Dick.
I’m currently putting the finishing touches on the speech I’ll be delivering at the Democratic National Convention tomorrow! I’m honored to be part of this great event, and I know the energy in Chicago will be electric.
It’s clear Kamala Harris and Tim Walz have the experience and leadership required to be the next President and Vice President of the United States.
But we know the challenge that lies ahead: in less than three months from now, voters will go to the polls to choose between two visions:
1. A vision of hatred, division, and government that works for one person – Donald Trump, and Donald Trump only.

2. **A vision of unity that celebrates our differences, and a government that works for everyone – not just a power-hungry convicted felon.**

What will you choose, Peter?
[**_If you support Vision 2, we need your help to send a message that Democrats are going to win up and down the ballot. Donate any amount now to make a Democratic White House, Senate, and House of Representatives a reality._**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/91060249/492579677/-1442630867?source=LOC_EM_FR_2024.08.18_DNCPreSpeech_B1_F1_S1_C1_Actives_N-T1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODQ4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyYTNiMTFjMi03YzVkLWVmMTEtOTkxYS02MDQ1YmRkYmZjNGIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0XUrJheQV3L3iL_E1SlhF4gf1CxH-ID9Sf4VXp3shOA=)

A vision of hatred, division, and government that works for one person – Donald Trump, and Donald Trump only. 2. A vision of unity that celebrates our differences, and a government that works for everyone – not just a power-hungry convicted felon. What will you choose, Peter? = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately. = = = = ****=** = I hope you’ll be tuning in tomorrow! | | Dear Fellow Patriot, I just wanted to say **_**_thank you_**_** _- _thank you for opening this email. . . . Because I know that your inbox is probably . . . Because I know that your inbox is probably crowded with so many political emails, emails about the state of our country and the numerous important elections that are happening right now. And more importantly, I know that you are busy with a life of your own, a family of your own, and daily trials and joys of your own. clean_body: | | | | | | | Dear Fellow Patriot, I just wanted to say thank you - thank you for opening this email. . . . Because I know that your inbox is probably . . . Because I know that your inbox is probably crowded with so many political emails, emails about the state of our country and the numerous important elections that are happening right now. And more importantly, I know that you are busy with a life of your own, a family of your own, and daily trials and joys of your own. So, I hope you know that taking a minute out of your day to read about my critical battle to defeat Democrat Adam Schiff and fight for the future of California means the world to me. Fellow Patriot, I hope you'll and stay up to date through election day. We have less than 3 months to go, and so much is at stake. If you care about the future of California and the fight to bring common sense leadership to our country's most left-wing state like I do, the greatest thing you can do is pray for me and my election. And friend, in addition to your prayers, if you're able, goes a long way towards helping me fight against Adam Schiff and the Democrat machine backing his campaign. Because the last thing the Democrats want to see is support from hundreds of individual American patriots donating to my campaign and dreaming of a new Conservative California. So, I'm glad this email reached you, and I hope I can count on your support to defeat Adam Schiff in November. | | | | | | | Thank you for your support. Let's win this together! | | | | | go.txting.io/7up80c PAID FOR BY STEVE GARVEY FOR U.S. SENATE PO Box 532389 Los Angeles, CA 90053-2389

name: Sherrod Brown
subject: we're officially being outspent on TV ads
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kaine for Virginia
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tk-2024-sherrod [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tk-2024-sherrod]
Derek, I spoke last week with my campaign manager, and she broke some tough news: We're officially being outspent on TV ads.
I know, friend, I almost spit out my coffee when she told me.
But here's the deal: The GOP is zeroing in on our race because they know control of the Senate hinges on what happens here in Ohio. That's why they've named me a top target for defeat and why they're making record-breaking investments to defeat me.
Let me make one thing clear, friend: The GOP might outspend us in this race, but they will not outwork us. If we can keep reaching voters with our pro-worker message, we'll win.
To make sure we have what it takes to win this race, my team and I have set an ambitious $200,000 fundraising goal to hit before midnight tonight . And I'm counting on top supporters like you to help me reach it.
So please, friend, will you chip in $5, $25, or more now to split between my campaign and Tim Kaine to help me raise the resources I need to win in Ohio and defend our Senate majority? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tk-2024-sherrod]
DONATE NOW [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tk-2024-sherrod]
Thank you,
Sherrod Brown

| | Here's what I know, Peter... Alaska is represented by a rubber-stamp Democrat who has stood by as the Biden-Harris Administration has pushed its anti-American energy agenda. She largely sat back as Joe Biden signed 60+ executive orders against Alaska energy exploration & production. **Her failure to stand up against out-of-touch environmental activists is why me, a Congressman from Minnesota 2,500 miles away, stepped up for the people of Alaska and our nation's energy security and authored "Alaska's Right to Produce Act".** It is my honor to stand up for Alaska's--and America's--energy future and that's why I'm joining President Trump and supporting Alaska's Lt. clean_body: ... that's why we need Nancy Dahlstrom!| | | | | Here's what I know, Peter... Alaska is represented by a rubber-stamp Democrat who has stood by as the Biden-Harris Administration has pushed its anti-American energy agenda. She largely sat back as Joe Biden signed 60+ executive orders against Alaska energy exploration & production. Her failure to stand up against out-of-touch environmental activists is why me, a Congressman from Minnesota 2,500 miles away, stepped up for the people of Alaska and our nation's energy security and authored "Alaska's Right to Produce Act". It is my honor to stand up for Alaska's--and America's--energy future and that's why I'm joining President Trump and supporting Alaska's Lt. Governor, Nancy Dahlstrom, to be their sole congressional representative. Alaska and Minnesota have faced an onslaught of anti-mining and anti-energy policies that have done nothing but destroy domestic energy production and drive prices up. With President Trump leading the charge, a unified Republican Congress will be essential in reversing these failed policies. That's why we need Nancy representing Alaska. Thanks for any help you can send, Pete Stauber | | | |

Peter, I want you to understand the stakes of tomorrow’s public filing deadline:
1. Last deadline, we were outraised by Kelly Ayotte.
2. My MAGA opponent Kelly Ayotte brought in a record-setting fundraising haul – primarily from extreme GOP mega-donor contributions.
3. Cook Political Report rated this race a “toss-up” and polling shows **I’m in a statistical tie** against Ayotte.

But I'm no stranger to tough races – I flipped Manchester’s mayoral seat blue for the first time in nearly 15 years.

From that, I learned that the key is to build a strong, grassroots team that is determined to push New Hampshire forward. With enough supporters chipping in, organizing, and spreading our message across New Hampshire, we can flip this seat blue.

That’s why I need our grassroots supporters to step up today.

[**_So I’m asking 100 of our top supporters – including you, Peter – to chip in $50, our average grassroots donation, to help our people-powered campaign take on Ayotte and the National Republicans trying to buy this seat. body:

Here are 7 reasons why your donation today is so important (that’s one for every finger!):**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/91062246/492586478/635992257?refcode=240818&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDY0NjciLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiOTAzOTY0ODctODA1ZC1lZjExLTk5MWEtNjA0NWJkZGJmYzRiIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=ejt-CXmdasizq7XWgMz2fsDgwgCFVL9n77nlcgICMDY=)
1. **Political experts rank this race a toss-up,** which means your gift will have a huge impact on our ability to raise the resources we need to win.
2. **Tim Sheehy is wrong for Montana**. He wants to privatize health care, sell off our public lands, and would support a national abortion ban.
3. **Mitch McConnell is desperate to beat me.** He named me one of his top targets, and outside groups are spending millions to pummel me with attacks.
4. **Their attacks are working.** The polls have tightened into a statistical tie, and this race couldn’t be any closer—your $7 will help us pull ahead.
5. **I won my first Senate race by just 3,562 votes** ... and this election could be even closer.
6. **We’re less than 100 days out from Election Day, and we’re falling behind in our fundraising**. If we can’t afford to keep our ads up, our opponent’s attacks will drown us out.
7. **We can’t win without you. If every person reading this chipped in $7,** we’d have the resources we need to overcome the attacks, break our tie in the polls, and win this race. But not everyone will, so I’m asking you personally:

[**Can I count on you to make a split donation of $7 or more between my campaign and Lose Cruz? Your support today could mean the difference between victory and defeat.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/91062247/492586479/635992257?refcode=240818&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDY0NjciLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiOTAzOTY0ODctODA1ZC1lZjExLTk5MWEtNjA0NWJkZGJmYzRiIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=ejt-CXmdasizq7XWgMz2fsDgwgCFVL9n77nlcgICMDY=) If we win in Montana, we can defend the Montana way of life, safeguard a woman’s right to make her own health care decisions, and protect our public lands for generations to come. —Jon LoseCruz **Be sure to follow us! **

clean_body: | = = = 1. Political experts rank this race a toss-up, which means your gift will have a huge impact on our ability to raise the resources we need to win. 2. Tim Sheehy is wrong for Montana. He wants to privatize health care, sell off our public lands, and would support a national abortion ban. 3. Mitch McConnell is desperate to beat me. He named me one of his top targets, and outside groups are spending millions to pummel me with attacks. 4. Their attacks are working. The polls have tightened into a statistical tie, and this race couldn’t be any closer—your $7 will help us pull ahead. 5. I won my first Senate race by just 3,562 votes ... and this election could be even closer. 6. We’re less than 100 days out from Election Day, and we’re falling behind in our fundraising. If we can’t afford to keep our ads up, our opponent’s attacks will drown us out. 7. We can’t win without you. If every person reading this chipped in $7, we’d have the resources we need to overcome the attacks, break our tie in the polls, and win this race. But not everyone will, so I’m asking you personally: = If we win in Montana, we can defend the Montana way of life, safeguard a woman’s right to make her own health care decisions, and protect our public lands for generations to come. —Jon LoseCruz Be sure to follow us! | | Ted Cruz abandoned Texas and betrayed our country. His destructive brand of extremism represents a clear and present danger to American democracy and the personal freedom of everyday Texans. Together, we CAN fight back. = | = Sensible Americans PAC PO Box 33079 Washington, DC 20033 United States | Paid for by Sensible Americans PAC, LoseCruz.com, and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. name: Jesse James Mullen
subject: Celebrating the 19th Amendment
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mullen For Secretary of State
body:
Today, we mark one of the most significant milestones in our nation's history—the anniversary of the 19th Amendment, which granted women the right to vote in 1920. | | | [](http://links.mullenformontana.com/u/click?_t=96962950e68f455895e83c6431fce0d7&_m=1d874bc4b6bc43b8b45dee99490d9597&_e=CS7ztaSLybUJz6Ohtr5iamiiZJwWfnZcorpf90bCRQvs2fUqOlUsMSMBd-KlUaFfWzHK7whS3i8Hz0etBrNj1KB0sU_A6TM4M5CU0H7Nv05hLnHvhULj3j1IVyNZ97WF15em4v_LSFiK1-WNzTz8p7kZYPA0KknvU0V7xi2J5PRHCcmCq-m9Pi8FQshj0KdbDeuzXd-QSJuRxbeSg5TJ5fckFZFblGHPuDWHKftbZ6MpopXuwpu3PS1j-gLrHyQeLl2MLR32GmDrnjV76UdaJtsDWTT_SVv5h_9v8xzUzbAyf74eI1j3-aFpnOKzE2tw1T_Xc0MEZB0S24IsCk4yOB7UKIJL-NTIdNLcmkFEtIZslpYLLoDEXZP3iuTifKpc6KHlN-OxMCY5Mn6UB-ioiw%3D%3D) Friend, Today, we mark one of the most significant milestones in our nation's history—the anniversary of the 19th Amendment, which granted women the right to vote in 1920. Reflecting on this historic day, I am reminded of the countless women who fought tirelessly year after year to secure this fundamental right and pave the way for future generations. Their courage and determination were not just about winning the right to vote, but about asserting their voice in the democratic process and claiming their place in shaping our nation’s future. And although many women have helped to shape our country since 1920, the fight for women's rights is far from over. Right here in Montana, we will decide the fate of abortion rights this fall – and across the country, there are still challenges to women’s fundamental rights that we must overcome. I am committed to upholding the values of equality and justice that the 19th Amendment represents. If I am elected, I will work tirelessly to make our electoral process more accessible and equitable and I will work to create a business environment that encourages more female entrepreneurship. [**So, in honor of the anniversary of the 19th Amendment, can you sign on to show you’re with me in the fight for women’s rights?**](http://links.mullenformontana.com/u/click?_t=96962950e68f455895e83c6431fce0d7&_m=1d874bc4b6bc43b8b45dee99490d9597&_e=CS7ztaSLybUJz6Ohtr5ianV3sgtqI3kbW8NZPgyXviVELQwBUBF2bNPaOZpjq7q5MpgCM_ixD1_38zU5Cv3BMvoGTXmQQyDC-VgwmHn4xsy2U3lZ4lrhTXJVTkLcPAJfzpQ461joz-g72IHeJ7nDwdy77pO3ArlNDuylnGIyefjYNbbLy3USxSKcCnOfFk4g_6ncNwbwv8gHew_zuqgK6Fx5pBr9QW8h2dayZ3VtP1ocMisVkpGTKgkD0snJ6CuDp4FsEZL7ib10TSMFvSN0rKN-rRIkI0NwYF3HbJu71m1ty6CMZY4pc8Ur50yR9TvR9WtSGvL-VaqdIo86HfeKHA%3D%3D) [Sign on](http://links.mullenformontana.com/u/click?_t=96962950e68f455895e83c6431fce0d7&_m=1d874bc4b6bc43b8b45dee99490d9597&_e=CS7ztaSLybUJz6Ohtr5ianV3sgtqI3kbW8NZPgyXviVELQwBUBF2bNPaOZpjq7q5MpgCM_ixD1_38zU5Cv3BMvoGTXmQQyDC-VgwmHn4xsy2U3lZ4lrhTXJVTkLcPAJfzpQ461joz-g72IHeJ7nDwdy77pO3ArlNDuylnGIyefjYNbbLy3USxSKcCnOfFk4gD2DC-IgAzBbY6aAINeAOLwOI5GmzJdblYGcK4wzO_rlQmfdNMdcCPWOnibjtHxHoXfUtFaeap8Pa22oB-JJkXaY75HEvHJkOVEC49U-md0LXlWGD0fq6VM7U_GSDEJ7ik8HfzcYWEZX9kIRcadcghA%3D%3D) Thank you for standing for women’s rights and freedoms and for continuing to work toward a better future for all. Very best,
Jesse James Mullen

Darrell Issa are demanding answers from the Secret Service about a possible cover-up and a "troubling pattern of misconduct" surrounding the agency's handling of cocaine discovered in the White House last summer. The two Republican lawmakers, who serve in key Judiciary Committee roles in the Senate and the House, cited revelations from a RealClearPolitics article last week that former Secret Service Director Kimberly Cheatle and senior agency leaders sought to destroy the cocaine discovered in the..." **[High-Profile Texas Democrats Endorse Ted Cruz For Senate:](http://trk.tedcruz.)** "Three and a half years into an unprecedented border crisis impacting Texans in border communities and the state's largest cities, high-profile Democrats are openly endorsing a Republican candidate for Senate who they never endorsed before: U.S. Sen. Ted Cruz. Cruz, a Houston Republican, is running for reelection for his third term. He's being challenged by U.S. Rep. Colin Allred, a Dallas Democrat, who is trailing in the polls. While Cruz has been characterized as polarizing or far right by those on the left, those on the right argue he's a conservative stalwart championing their causes: pro-life, supporting traditional marriage, women's..." **[Ted Cruz: Bitcoin Is A Reservoir Of Power:](http://trk.tedcruz.-YppsENRfiGkiKVQ)** "Cruz described Bitcoin btc-2.6%Bitcoin as a "reservoir of power," suggesting that it could serve as an energy safety net for the state's grid infrastructure during extreme weather events or times of economic uncertainty. "What Bitcoin presents is an opportunity in real-time to enhance the resiliency of our grid," said Cruz. These comments come as Bitcoin mining in Texas has sparked concerns over noise pollution and health issues for residents, highlighting the need for better regulations. The Texas Blockchain Council endorsed Ted Cruz for reelection to the U.S. Senate on August 12, according..." **[Cruz Makes Another Biden Prediction After Correctly Predicting In 2023 Democrats Would Replace Him:](http://trk.tedcruz.-OWMCF2HsTw)** "Sen. Ted Cruz (R-TX) said this week that he believes there is a good chance that President Joe Biden leaves office before the elections this fall. Cruz made the remarks during the most recent episode of his "Verdict" podcast with co-host Ben Ferguson while mentioning that he predicted a year ago that Democrats were going to replace Biden before the election. "So, I'm going to make another prediction, and it's not one that I want to have happen," Cruz said. "I'm going to put the odds at 40% that Joe Biden resigns..." **[Ted Cruz Needs YOUR Help To Keep Texas, Texas>>](http://trk.tedcruz.-LZOyawbOYjcDjg)**

name: Leaders We Deserve
subject: This is what Quavo had to say about Kamala Harris
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY LEADERS WE DESERVE, LEADERSWEDESERVE
body:
Kamala Harris is standing on business.
# [](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/go/852?refcode=em20240818&t=1&akid=1072%2E587540%2EUUYAXZ)
**“One thing I learned about working with Vice President Harris is she's always standing on business.”**
That’s what rapper and singer Quavo — who has personally experienced the tragedy of losing his nephew to gun violence — had to say about Kamala Harris’ promise to prioritize gun safety issues if elected. 👇 👇 👇
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lwd-em-20240818?refcode=em20240818&refcode2=1072_587540_UUYAXZ&akid=1072%2E587540%2EUUYAXZ)
We agree with him. Kamala Harris **does** stand on business:
* **The Biden-Harris administration passed the most significant gun safety legislation in 30 years.** The Bipartisan Safer Communities Act (BSCA) enhanced background check restrictions, supported red flag laws, and funded mental health and school programs to address gun violence.
* **Vice President Harris oversees the White House Office of Gun Violence Prevention.** This office oversees the implementation of BSCA nationwide, works with local and state officials, and finds new executive actions.
* **And a lot more....**

**Peter, Kamala Harris has proven that she will do the work to keep our kids and communities safe from gun violence.** **[Can you split a contribution of $5 between Kamala Harris and Leaders We Deserve to elect a president that stands on business?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lwd-em-20240818?refcode=em20240818&amount=5&refcode2=1072_587540_UUYAXZ&akid=1072%2E587540%2EUUYAXZ)**
**[Donate $5 »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lwd-em-20240818?amount=5&refcode=em20240818-1072&refcode2=1072_587540_UUYAXZ&akid=1072%2E587540%2EUUYAXZ)**
In her role as Vice President, Kamala Harris has championed efforts to create a safer future for our communities. **This is not the future the GOP wants for you, Peter.**
While in the White House, Donald Trump gutted several gun safety regulations that kept our communities safer. If re-elected, there’s no guarantee that he won’t roll back the historic changes passed by the Biden-Harris administration.
**[Peter, that's not a future we deserve. So, can we count on you to split a $5 donation between Kamala Harris and Leaders We Deserve to elect a president who will advocate for a better, safer future?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lwd-em-20240818?refcode=em20240818&amount=5&refcode2=1072_587540_UUYAXZ&akid=1072%2E587540%2EUUYAXZ)**
**[Donate $5 »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lwd-em-20240818?amount=5&refcode=em20240818-1072&refcode2=1072_587540_UUYAXZ&akid=1072%2E587540%2EUUYAXZ)**
Thank you,
Leaders We Deserve
* * *
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lwd-em-footer?refcode=em20240818&t=2&refcode2=1072_587540_UUYAXZ&akid=1072%2E587540%2EUUYAXZ)**

name: Harriz-Walz 2024
subject: Peter, Kamala and Tim are deeply thankful for your support. Will you help power our ads, organizers, and outreach today?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Harris for President
body:
| | |
---
$25. That's how much Kamala Harris and Tim Walz are asking you to donate today. We know it doesn't seem like enough to have an impact, but when you add up the millions of donations we receive from emails like these, your $25 adds up fast and is a strong show of force -- _to our team and to our opponents_. $25 to defeat Donald Trump at the ballot box. $25 for a future where every person has the opportunity to not just get by, but to get ahead. $25 to help Kamala and Tim make history. [**What do you say, Peter? Click this link to pitch in $25 or even more to elect Kamala and Tim. name: Amy Klobuchar
subject: Results are in. Royce White will be my opponent.
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Gallego for Arizona
body:
#

Peter,
The results are in and it’s official: My opponent for Minnesota’s Senate seat this November will be **Royce White.**
**Election Day is less than three months away -- and early voting starts even sooner._That means your support for my reelection campaign has never been more important._**
[**Will you split a donation now between my reelection campaign and Ruben Gallego to help me continue my work in the Senate?**](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1000?c0=ruben-em-klobuchar-split.fbdDnc&refcode=em240818-2-90&t=1&akid=2891%2E734936%2EvjLruu)
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly._
| | **[Donate $5](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1061?c0=ruben-em-klobuchar-split.Wu4-b2&refcode=em240818-2-90&t=20&akid=2891%2E734936%2EvjLruu)**
---
****
| **[Donate $25](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1046?c0=ruben-em-klobuchar-split.3yQP4Z&refcode=em240818-2-90&t=21&akid=2891%2E734936%2EvjLruu)**
---
****
| | **[Donate $50](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1039?c0=ruben-em-klobuchar-split.Sur6iw&refcode=em240818-2-90&t=22&akid=2891%2E734936%2EvjLruu)**
---
****
| **[Donate $100](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1040?c0=ruben-em-klobuchar-split.bgddaf&refcode=em240818-2-90&t=23&akid=2891%2E734936%2EvjLruu)**
---
****
| | **[Donate $250](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1041?c0=ruben-em-klobuchar-split.RPyBUr&refcode=em240818-2-90&t=24&akid=2891%2E734936%2EvjLruu)**
---
****
| **[Other Amount](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1044?c0=ruben-em-klobuchar-split.Bey0cY&refcode=em240818-2-90&t=25&akid=2891%2E734936%2EvjLruu)**
---
****
Here’s what I need you to know about what we’re up against:
→ Royce White is an election denier.
→ He thinks “women have become too mouthy”.
→ He doesn’t support IVF.
→ **He even said overturning Roe v. Wade was the “single greatest thing my government has done in my entire lifetime.”**

Royce White and his divisive language and policies would tear us apart rather than find common ground for change. **That is not who we are. That is not who I am.**
[**That’s why I’m counting on grassroots supporters like you to continue powering my campaign so we can do more to make life better for the American people. Will you split a contribution of any amount between my reelection campaign and Ruben Gallego today?**](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1000?c0=ruben-em-klobuchar-split.fbdDnc&refcode=em240818-2-90&t=26&akid=2891%2E734936%2EvjLruu)
I couldn’t do this without you.
Amy

Paid For By Gallego for Arizona
Use of military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform do not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or the Department of Defense.
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Emails like this are a critical tool for our campaign's fundraising and organizing efforts. If you'd like to receive only the most important emails going forward, [tell us at this link](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/signup/fewer_emails/?source=fewer-emails&t=27&akid=2891%2E734936%2EvjLruu). Or, if you need to, you can [unsubscribe here](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=28&akid=2891%2E734936%2EvjLruu). **This week the DNC is coming to Chicago. Yours truly will be on the ground at the DNC and doing my best to report newsworthy updates in real time.**
And while published content will continue to remain accessible to all subscribers, I want to recognize our growing community of paying subscribers. **That is why I am excited tonight to launch our paid-subscriber Let 's Address This chat.** If you're already a paid subscriber, you'll be able to access it via the Substack App (available in the App store). If you're not a paid subscriber, now is the time to join in!
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack..a1TIvqgzriG_Ze7nm6BbNe34lVowR1JHXfRTBZjpU6Y?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget&utm_content=147849044)
The goals of this chat are to:
* Build a community of thoughtful people who value being informed on the key issues that impact us.
* Enable like-minded neighbors to communicate with, to collaborate with, and yes, even to commiserate with one other.
* Offer an ongoing safe space in a private community with whom to share ideas and opinions, and understand new perspectives.

This will be a historic and busy week, and I'm excited to be on the ground to share updates that legacy media will likely ignore, slant, or sadly misrepresent. I am likewise excited to launch the Let's Address This community chat group to take our dialogue to the next level. I hope you subscribe and join us, and I'll see you in the chat!
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack..a1TIvqgzriG_Ze7nm6BbNe34lVowR1JHXfRTBZjpU6Y?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget&utm_content=147849044)
And finally, if you're going to be at the DNC, be sure to send me a note as I'd love to connect to say hello in person.

name: COURIER
subject: Sinclair anchor concerned over right-wing bias resigns from network
body:
Even Sinclair employees are starting to worry about the propaganda on their networks

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/91063479/492591013/2130526953?refcode=emwrapper&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDc4NzgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiM2NlODcyNTItODM1ZC1lZjExLTk5MWEtNjA0NWJkZGJmYzRiIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=CgZsHJISkY0U6b9BnSDZuY9PvVYiKAegAvR1mEBi1UU=&emci=02121b7b-e75b-ef11-991a-6045bddbfc4b&emdi=3ce87252-835d-ef11-991a-6045bddbfc4b&ceid=14016711)
Peter,
Since the late ‘80s, the Sinclair Broadcast Group has bought up local news stations across the country. **Today, they control an astonishing 190 stations in more than 100 markets. **
Sinclair has used their massive reach to put far-right, nationally produced propaganda in local news broadcasts. Recently, that includes a constant drumbeat of negative stories about President Biden and positive news about Donald Trump.
**While many have tried to sound the alarm about Sinclair, a damning new report says Sinclair’s own former top anchor Eugene Ramirez resigned in January over concerns about “the accuracy and right-wing bias of the content he was required to present on air.”**
[**We’ll tell you more in a moment, but if you’re ready to support COURIER’s mission to provide a local news alternative to Sinclair, can you chip in $20 to help us fight back?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/91063480/492591021/-593472309?refcode=20240818-EM-SinclairResignation3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDc4NzgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiM2NlODcyNTItODM1ZC1lZjExLTk5MWEtNjA0NWJkZGJmYzRiIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=CgZsHJISkY0U6b9BnSDZuY9PvVYiKAegAvR1mEBi1UU=)
According to the report, while working as lead anchor, Ramirez was required to read stories made by Sinclair's Rapid Response Team, a national news office that compiles and summarizes talking points from Republican politicians and right-wing groups.
**The report shows that those stories were negative against Democrats nearly 20% of the time, compared to just 2% of the time for Republicans.**
Further, Ramirez reportedly was told not to interrupt or question some of the show’s more controversial guests, like Moms for Liberty and _Project 2025_ creators The Heritage Foundation.
**Here’s why this matters: **
* Sinclair immediately replaced Ramirez with another host, and his former show still airs on at least 70 of the local news stations Sinclair owns.
* Sinclair owns television stations that reach 40% of American households.
* According to a Pew research study, television is _still_ the number one way Americans get their local news.

**That means _millions_ of Americans are exposed to the types of lies and deceit Ramirez warned about _every single night_.**
Peter, COURIER exists to counter the dangerous lies companies like Sinclair are spreading.
While Sinclair has been buying up local news outlets, COURIER is providing a freely available alternative in the form of local newsrooms in eleven battleground states around the country.
While Sinclair uses their newsrooms to inject their communities with propaganda, **we use our presence to fight back against misinformation with factual news that actually matters. **
[**But we can’t do it without your help. We don’t rely on paywalls or subscription models to provide our news, which means we need donations from supporters like you to keep fighting back against Sinclair. If you can, can you chip in $20 to help us out?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/91063481/492591024/-593472309?refcode=20240818-EM-SinclairResignation3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDc4NzgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiM2NlODcyNTItODM1ZC1lZjExLTk5MWEtNjA0NWJkZGJmYzRiIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=CgZsHJISkY0U6b9BnSDZuY9PvVYiKAegAvR1mEBi1UU=)
Express Donate: If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly: | subject: Now it’s our turn
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jason Crow for Congress
body:
Jason Crow For Congress [https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP21/1/88523/images/logoJC%20(1).png]
Team,

Last month, MAGA Republicans had their convention and showed just how extreme they are. They nominated J.D. Vance for their Vice Presidential pick, and he’s been spending the month trying to mislead the American public about who he is.

Let’s be clear: He’s as extreme as it gets. He wants to deny women their reproductive freedom, he opposes gun safety laws, and wants to do everything he can to forward Donald Trump’s MAGA agenda.

Every speech he’s given since then is filled with lies and seeks to divide Coloradans. That’s not who we are.

Tomorrow night, the Democratic National Convention begins, where we’ll show the American people what we’re all about: restoring our freedoms, making healthcare affordable, combating climate change, protecting our democracy, and so much more.

Kamala Harris and Tim Walz will also accept their historic nominations for President and Vice President, and then we will keep pushing hard through election day. It’s our job to ensure that they have a Democratic Congress so that we can get things done for the American people.

Will you donate today to help us flip the House blue? Republicans got a huge boost in donations from their Convention, but we have the opportunity to keep the momentum going through our Convention this week! [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/crow-august-2024]

If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will be processed immediately:

DONATE $10 NOW » [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/crow-august-2024?amount=10&express_lane=true&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com]

ANOTHER AMOUNT » [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/crow-august-2024?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com]

Thank you for pitching in.

— Team Crow

Friend,

By now you may have heard about the GOP’s plan, Project 2025, to dramatically reshape the federal government.

But today, we want you to hear directly from the president of the group leading Project 2025...

_**“The country is in the process of the second American Revolution, which will remain bloodless if the left allows it to be.”** \- Kevin Roberts, Heritage Foundation President_

This is a real quote from a leading voice in the GOP.

It’s horrifying.

And it’s why electing democracy defenders up and down the ballot has never been more important.

We’re working to elect Democratic Secretaries of State across the nation who will ensure the integrity of our elections, protect voting rights, and uphold the principles of democracy.

Because the alternative is far too dangerous.

If that’s all you need to hear to [**chip in $3, we hope you’ll take the next step by making a donation today:**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/91063625/492591381/1071238057?refcode=em-8.18.24-all-rs&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTkxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0MWU4NzI1Mi04MzVkLWVmMTEtOTkxYS02MDQ1YmRkYmZjNGIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=6vrxabGFQxEc3b554GCSFrVkr241N75pjlanZzMBoCI=)

Surfing Blue
I'm the longshot Democratic and Working Families Party candidate in NY-21. My Republican opponent is Elise Stefanik. www.paulacollinsforcongress.com
Happy Convention Week! No doubt there will be watch parties, speech snacks, and candidate cocktails concocted from coast-to-coast.
The energy. The smiles. Since Harris entered the race at the top of the ticket, the quick in the step and the please-click-to-donate is not to be missed by anyone within miles of a true Blue Dem.
Look - all of us know what is at stake.
But can the longshot candidates - those state and local candidates, especially in those deep red, rural races, ride the blue wave to victory?
We can. And we must.
The reality is, there are many congressional districts, county positions, state and local races that have been written off by party leaders and political gurus since the Obama era. I'm an accountant. I'm a lawyer. I know the art of persuasion by numbers. And the case for channeling sparse resources to races that seem "flippable" is compelling in a regular election cycle.
Do I need to remind you: this is not a normal election cycle.
Harris raised $310 million in the first 10 days of her candidacy.
We saw millions of people do that which many now loathe: log in to countless Zoom gatherings to express support and enthusiasm for the ticket.
People are phonebanking by the tens of thousands. (I wonder who they are calling and if they are direct dialing if everyone now uses a cell phone. [There are rules](https://substack.com/redirect/04239af1-ca40-4744-a467-dbb1d0339588?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), you know.)
I'm not encouraging complacency. I am asking you to not leave the down-ballot races behind.
Here is my rationale:
1. Harris and Walz will need a functioning Congress in order to implement their goals and platform.
2. [Certification of the vote is a local process.](https://substack.com/redirect/1089a603-9159-449e-a03e-fbb59e5cc533?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) We are kidding ourselves if we think that the so-called "flyover states" or the rural counties that many people can't find on a map no longer matter. Every election official, every board of elections, and every race matters in the MAGA universe. Get involved. Know the officials. Have the team of volunteers ready to ask question and refute the election deniers if and when it becomes necessary.
3. If we don't find a way to elevate those Democratic outposts in the deeply-red counties, then when? When will we find another race in which we are expecting historic levels of participation, then we are dooming those counties and candidates to a death spiral from which we may never recover. This is our unexpected chance to raise the numbers and narrow the margins by which MAGA candidates win. Why is that important? Speaking as a candidate, fundraising and even hiring professional staff members is a challenge when running in an un-targeted race. I cannot overstate that it's not just that candidates who are in an un-targeted race don't get nice electronic deposits from the parties and the PACs; they also struggle from the collateral consequences in donor support and professional hiring.

I'm issuing a call to action: First, for each postcard you send to a voter regarding the top of the ticket, please also send a postcard to a longshot Democrat in a place that some have called "unwinnable". If you need postcards, mailing lists, or postage, reach out to me. I can get them to you in tomorrow's mail.
Second, for each dollar you send to the top of the ticket, please send 50 cents to a longshot Democrat's race. Remember: Harris and Walz need a functioning Congress, as do the state and local governments.
Third, spread the word, and embrace the fact that the so-called "unwinnable" races actually have not one, but three ways to win: a) they could surprise all of us and get more than 50% of the vote; b) they can narrow the margin by which the MAGA opponent wins, thus dealing a psychological blow to the other side; c) they can get a newly energized group of volunteers organized and lined up for the midterms.
You better believe it - I'm 100% in support of the top-of-the-ticket.
But I implore you: devote at least some percentage of your time, talent, and treasure to the down-ballot races. In so doing, you are helping Harris/Walz in their ability to govern after the historic Inauguration in January. And when we finish partying and regroup for the midterms, we need structures and organization in place to pick up on November 6, 2024.
Let's ride this Blue Wave. Happy surfing.
_If we haven 't met yet, I am Paula Collins, the Democratic and Working Families Party Candidate for New York's 21st Congressional District. Your comments are invaluable to me. Please let me hear from you. Remember that you can always visit my website at www.paulacollinsforcongress.com or by sending me a text at 315-230-3920. _

name: Team Kennedy
subject: This is our wake-up call!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TEAM KENNEDY
body:
The time to act is now.

|
---
| | | [The time to act is now.](https://www.kennedy24.com/donate-em?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=warning_to_america_8_15_nd1rs2&n=1)

---
---
[](https://www.kennedy24.com/donate-em?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=warning_to_america_8_15_nd1rs2&n=2)
|
---
Dear Peter,
We are witnessing a profound and alarming shift in global governance—a shift that threatens the very foundation of freedom and democracy. Today’s authoritarianism knows no boundaries, and its reach is expanding at an unprecedented pace.
Recently, London’s Metropolitan Police Chief declared an intention to pursue international extradition requests against anyone who violates British social media censorship rules—[even targeting American citizens](https://www.kennedy24.com/donate-em?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=warning_to_america_8_15_nd1rs2&n=3).
Such actions are not isolated incidents; they are part of a broader agenda by elites who seek to control what we can read, see, and hear.
They justify this censorship by labeling dissenting voices as “misinformation,” “hate speech,” “far-right,” or “extremist.” **These labels are wielded as weapons to silence opposition and stifle free expression.**
Throughout history, totalitarian regimes have begun their reigns of terror with censorship. The suppression of free speech has often been the precursor to greater atrocities. It starts with silencing dissent, manipulating information, and instilling fear in those who dared to speak the truth.
[This pattern is disturbingly familiar, and we must recognize it for what it is: a prelude to oppression.](https://www.kennedy24.com/donate-em?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=warning_to_america_8_15_nd1rs2&n=4)
[ We Must Not Yield ](https://www.kennedy24.com/donate-em?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=warning_to_america_8_15_nd1rs2&n=5)
During the COVID-19 lockdowns, MI-6 labeled health freedom activists, including myself, as potential “terrorists.” Yet, it is the authorities who employ fear as a tool of control, perpetuating narratives of pandemics, economic collapse, and endless wars to maintain their grip on power.
These tactics are designed to frighten us into compliance, but we must not yield.
[This is a wake-up call for America and the world. We must reclaim our right to free speech and resist the creeping tide of authoritarianism. If not in America, the paragon of freedom, then where? ](https://www.kennedy24.com/donate-em?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=warning_to_america_8_15_nd1rs2&n=6)
We owe it to ourselves, to future generations, and to the countless voices silenced by oppressive regimes throughout history. That’s why we’re asking for your urgent support right now.
Robert F. Kennedy Jr. is our best hope for ending this insidious censorship and restoring our fundamental rights.
With less than 90 days before the election, we’ve set ambitious monthly goals to continue our historic campaign.
[Can we count on you to chip in today to help us reach $3 million by the FEC deadline? ](https://www.kennedy24.com/donate-em?amp%3Butm_campaign=election&e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=warning_to_america_8_15_nd1rs2&n=7)
| [](https://www.kennedy24.com/donate-em?amount=50&e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=warning_to_america_8_15_nd1rs2&n=8)

[Donate today](https://www.kennedy24.com/donate-em?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=warning_to_america_8_15_nd1rs2&n=20) to put a Kennedy back in the White House — Elect Robert F. Kennedy, Jr. as President to unite America in 2024!
Make sure to join us on Social Media to help spread our campaign's message and put Robert F. Kennedy, Jr. in the White House!

Team,
Donald Trump and his MAGA Republicans are relentlessly attacking the core of our democracy. Each day they push their dangerous rhetoric and extreme policies, bringing our nation to a critical tipping point.
We cannot stand by and watch.
Kamala Harris is at the forefront, passionately defending our rights and the values we cherish. The battle ahead is tough, but with your immediate support, we can ensure she triumphs.
This is where YOU come in. Your $3 donation can be the difference between preserving our democracy and losing it.
Your contribution is more than just money—it's a lifeline for our democracy. Together, we can:
_**✅ Safeguard our democracy from Trump’s lies and deceit.
✅ Secure a Democratic majority in the Senate and reclaim the House.
✅ Elect Kamala Harris as the first woman President and continue building a fair and just America.**_
Trump and his MAGA allies are counting on us to fail. But with you by our side, we can outshine their darkness with our collective strength.

name: Nick Begich
subject: On the Road Across Alaska
body:
I'm doing the work to earn your vote! | | | |
---
| | |
---
|
## Traveling Across Alaska—Fighting for Our Future

Dear Friends,

Subject: Meeting Alaskans Across the State

Dear Friends,

Over the past few weeks, I’ve had the privilege of traveling across our incredible state, meeting with Alaskans in places like Kenai and Soldotna, Fairbanks and North Pole, Delta Junction, and Ketchikan. Everywhere I’ve gone, I’ve heard the same message loud and clear: Alaskans want a representative who’s willing to work hard, listen, and deliver results.

As your candidate for Congress, I’m committed to being the kind of leader who puts in the work. Our state faces unique challenges, and it’s going to take someone who understands that real solutions start with listening to the people directly. That’s exactly what I’m doing—connecting with Alaskans, understanding your concerns, and sharing my vision for a brighter future. The first step is winning this upcoming primary on August 20th, and I need your help to make it happen. You can vote early or in person on Election Day. Head over to [elections.alaska.gov/avo](https://alaskansfornickbegich.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8aeb8c45837a089b0eee9add8&id=c1a1fd0744&e=6679001ba0) for more information on early voting locations and times. Every vote counts, and your support is essential to securing a brighter future for Alaska. Thank you for your continued support. Together, we’re going to make sure Alaska’s voice is heard loud and clear in Washington.

**America First, Fighting for Alaska!**

Best regards,

Nick Begich
Candidate for U.S. Congress
\---

P.S. If you haven’t already, please consider volunteering or donating to our campaign. Every bit of help makes a huge difference in ensuring that Alaskans have the representation they deserve. Visit [our website](https://alaskansfornickbegich.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8aeb8c45837a089b0eee9add8&id=011bc30ebb&e=6679001ba0) to get involved!

---
| [YES, I WANT TO SUPPORT NICK!](https://alaskansfornickbegich.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8aeb8c45837a089b0eee9add8&id=60ab2ff5ea&e=6679001ba0 "YES, I WANT TO SUPPORT NICK!")
---
|
---
|
### On The Road With Nick
Over the past few months, Nick has been on the road, connecting with Alaskans across the state. From community events in Kenai and Soldotna to meet-and-greets in Fairbanks, Delta Junction, and Ketchikan, these photos capture the energy and commitment behind Nick’s campaign to bring hard work and real solutions to Washington, D.C!

## ENDORSEMENTS
**The momentum is _clear!_** Nick has been endorsed by numerous state, local, and national Republicans — and many of Alaska's most active Republican organizations. See if your group is on the list!.

Want to add your name to the list? Visit [our website](https://alaskansfornickbegich.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8aeb8c45837a089b0eee9add8&id=c3ec4b7569&e=6679001ba0) to sign up to endorse Nick Begich for Congress!

### We need your help!
There's no two ways about it — I'll need your support to win. With a strong team, we can get the job done — and I need you on my team. Whether you can help me out with a [donation](https://alaskansfornickbegich.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8aeb8c45837a089b0eee9add8&id=34903b85eb&e=6679001ba0), by [volunteering](https://alaskansfornickbegich.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8aeb8c45837a089b0eee9add8&id=6e21dc0c49&e=6679001ba0), by giving me an [endorsement](https://alaskansfornickbegich.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8aeb8c45837a089b0eee9add8&id=48f0d73c34&e=6679001ba0) — or all three — it all counts, and anything you can do helps us bring bold new leadership to DC. Thanks so much for your support — with your help, we can build a great future for our Great Land!

name: Blue North Carolina - via Team Cooper
subject: 🛑 STOP the QAnon threat to NC public schools 🛑
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cooper for North Carolina
body:
She attended January 6th. She threatens political violence. And she could be the next Superintendent of Public Schools.
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/91065831/492599613/823540626?refcode=ea.8d79d2c3-885d-ef11-991a-6045bddbfc4b&ms=ea.8d79d2c3-885d-ef11-991a-6045bddbfc4b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ZDc5ZDJjMy04ODVkLWVmMTEtOTkxYS02MDQ1YmRkYmZjNGIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=oEU6Iz76TLWiwScC7WogxXVJcetyHWwkVJlF6pz69k4=&emci=bb16a13a-f25b-ef11-991a-6045bddbfc4b&emdi=8d79d2c3-885d-ef11-991a-6045bddbfc4b&ceid=1049176)
**_CNN_ : GOP nominee to run North Carolina public schools called for violence against Democrats, including executing Obama and Biden** Peter — North Carolina Republicans have set out to completely undermine our public education system... **and their nominee for Superintendent of Public Schools, Michele Morrow, would do exactly that.** She’s denigrated our public school system, calling schools “socialism centers” and “indoctrination centers.” Not only is Morrow completely unqualified for the office of Superintendent, she has also promoted dangerous QAnon conspiracy theories and advocated for violence against Democratic politicians — including Presidents Obama and Biden and Governor Roy Cooper. _So we weren’t surprised to learn that after attending Donald Trump’s January 6th rally, she filmed a video urging Trump to use military force to stay in power._ **Michele Morrow is too dangerous to gain ANY kind of political power.** Peter, there is nothing more important than strengthening our public school system and ensuring that teachers have what they need to educate North Carolina’s next generation of leaders. name: Lucas Tyree Kunce
subject: Taking our power back
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Lucas Kunce for Missouri
body:
#
Peter,
**I grew up in a Missouri where people took care of each other.**
That’s how my family got by when we were bankrupted by medical bills growing up. That’s why I joined the Marine Corps after college and dedicated my life to serving the Missourians in our community. And that value is how we’re going to defeat Josh Hawley and take back Missouri’s U.S. Senate seat this November.
Not only is Hawley obsessed with controlling every aspect of our lives — he has rejected nearly every opportunity to stand up for the people of our state.
He has refused to support Missouri workers, he voted against healthcare for veterans, and he even forced Missouri taxpayers to pay $250,000 for his own lawbreaking all while enriching himself.
**I got a message for Josh Hawley: If you aren’t gonna help, stay out of our way.**
If Josh Hawley thinks he needs to tell us how to live, he doesn’t know the Missouri I know. This November, we’re taking our power back.
**[Please help me take a stand against Josh Hawley’s career-long crusade against our freedoms and flip Missouri’s U.S. Senate seat this November by rushing a donation of anything at all toward my grassroots campaign today.](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/67197?refcode=em20240818-7369&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=7369%2E614464%2EAZp66c)**

[Contribute $10](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/67205?refcode=em20240818-7369&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=10&t=2&akid=7369%2E614464%2EAZp66c) [Contribute $25](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/67205?refcode=em20240818-7369&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=25&t=3&akid=7369%2E614464%2EAZp66c) [Contribute $30](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/67205?refcode=em20240818-7369&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=30&t=4&akid=7369%2E614464%2EAZp66c) [Contribute $50](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/67205?refcode=em20240818-7369&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=50&t=5&akid=7369%2E614464%2EAZp66c) [Contribute $100](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/67205?refcode=em20240818-7369&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=100&t=6&akid=7369%2E614464%2EAZp66c) [Contribute $250](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/67205?refcode=em20240818-7369&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=250&t=7&akid=7369%2E614464%2EAZp66c) [Give another amount](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/67197?refcode=em20240818-7369&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=8&akid=7369%2E614464%2EAZp66c)

Your support has gotten us this far. Let’s take this all the way.
Thank you for everything,
Lucas Kunce

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lk-email-footer?refcode=em20240818-7369-footer&t=9&refcode2=7369_614464_AZp66c&akid=7369%2E614464%2EAZp66c)**

# ICYMI: Ian Cain Lays Out His Vision for Massachusetts
---
| **Quincy, MA** \- In case you missed it, Ian Cain laid out his vision for Massachusetts in a candidate forum on WBZ this morning. Ian highlights his plan to secure our border, get our economy back on track, and bring a new generation of leadership to the U.S. Senate.
The contrast was clear: Ian Cain is the only candidate from Massachusetts, the only candidate with actual experience legislating, and the only candidate in the race that isn’t chasing celebrity status. He is facing two Republicans with serious credibility problems and with little chance of defeating Elizabeth Warren.
Cain laid out his plan to defeat Elizabeth Warren and how she has only used this seat to propel her own career, and has no interest in representing Massachusetts.
Ian Cain is the only conservative that can beat Elizabeth Warren.
Check out his plan for Massachusetts:https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=KLgrmKfXXfw

| | [](https://gop.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1d82dcd2e67c4075340c26b37&id=54d6b62d98&e=25844e23a8) Sunday, August 18th will be our NEBRASKA PROTECT THE VOTE TOUR: Election Integrity Zoom Training! We will be hosting the virtual Nebraska Election Integrity Training **SUNDAY, AUGUST 18 TH AT 4:00 PM with Special Guest Rogan O’Handley. **Let’s ensure that we have free and fair elections in Nebraska. Sign up to be a Poll Worker, Poll Watcher, or Poll Observer TODAY! With your help we can Protect the Vote!

If you have any questions or concerns, please feel free to contact me!

**[CLICK HERE TO SIGN UP TO ATTEND TRAINING](https://gop.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1d82dcd2e67c4075340c26b37&id=de2e1f3ebc&e=25844e23a8)**

**[CLICK HERE TO SIGN UP TO BE A POLL WATCHER/POLL OBSERVER](https://gop.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1d82dcd2e67c4075340c26b37&id=269841ab38&e=25844e23a8)**

Please allow 60-75 minutes for your training. We endeavor to complete the session in under an hour. If none of those times work for your schedule, please know that we will be adding trainings regularly, as well as an “On Demand” option. We will update you if we see that you have not yet completed a training when the new schedule has posted.

Your participation is truly appreciated and crucial to ensuring free and fair elections in 2024.

Feel free to share the registration links with friends and neighbors!

Best,
Madeline Hart
Election Integrity State Director
[mhart@gop.com](mailto:mhart@gop.com)

**Kamala Harris is spot on — politicians shouldn’t be able to pick their voters.**
We’ve been shouting it from the rooftops ever since we founded the NDRC!! (Thank you for shouting it alongside us!) But in this critical moment for our democracy, we have a unique opportunity to elect a historic number of leaders across the country who will be tireless advocates for fair maps.
**From State House to State Supreme Court and everything in between, we’re supporting Democracy Defenders whose victories will move the needle. That can only be accomplished if we continue building this grassroots operation from the ground up. That’s where you come in. **
[**So please, join us in this important work — rush a donation to support the NDRC right away and let’s win BIG in November! →**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/91066749/492603125/-1472687013?refcode=don_ndrc_tier1_email_HarrisTweet_email_20240818-NDRC-Tier1-HarrisTweet_&utm_source=email&utm_medium=email&utm_term=don&utm_content=20240818-NDRC-Tier1-HarrisTweet_&utm_campaign=HarrisTweet&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjdkZDlhYTQ1LThiNWQtZWYxMS05OTFhLTYwNDViZGRiZmM0YiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=QmQ8dOsiWMEJc7W1uAan87gx7Biimlna7Ayyby6IUOQ=)
Thank you.
— NDRC HQ

name: Pennsylvania Update (via DLCC.org)
subject: re: Pennsylvania specials
disclaimer_text: Paid for by DLCC PAC
body:
With our sights set on victory this fall, the groundwork starts now – and state Dems in Pennsylvania and beyond need your attention before next month's specials. | | |
---

_BEGINNING TOMORROW: _**Biden, Obama, Harris, and Walz take the stage at the DNC in Chicago.**
---
Whether it's energizing speeches, the deciding of the 2024 Democratic Party platform, or witnessing Kamala Harris and Tim Walz formally accept the nomination,**there's a lot to look forward to this week, team.**
---
Over this four-day fest, we can expect to see everyone — from Presidents Biden and Obama to everyday grassroots Democrats —**** unite in Chicago to win this November.
---
But Debbie Mucarsel-Powell is gearing up for her own primary in Florida, so she won't be able to attend herself — she’s too busy traveling the state to make sure everyone is ready to vote tomorrow.
---
**That's why she's counting on at least 10,000 supporters to watch and prove that Democrats are more fired up than ever to keep the White House and Senate and flip the House blue — _and finally win Florida._**
---

clean_body: Democrats from across the country will unite in Chicago to gear up for the election. | | | | | BEGINNING TOMORROW: Biden, Obama, Harris, and Walz take the stage at the DNC in Chicago. Whether it's energizing speeches, the deciding of the 2024 Democratic Party platform, or witnessing Kamala Harris and Tim Walz formally accept the nomination,there's a lot to look forward to this week, team. Over this four-day fest, we can expect to see everyone — from Presidents Biden and Obama to everyday grassroots Democrats —** unite in Chicago to win this November. But Debbie Mucarsel-Powell is gearing up for her own primary in Florida, so she won't be able to attend herself — she’s too busy traveling the state to make sure everyone is ready to vote tomorrow. That's why she's counting on at least 10,000 supporters to watch and prove that Democrats are more fired up than ever to keep the White House and Senate and flip the House blue — and finally win Florida. Will you tune into the DNC this week? | | | | — Team Debbie | | | | = Debbie Mucarsel-Powell is a Floridian, South American immigrant, mother, and former Congresswoman. She’s dedicated her life to uplifting working families, ending gun violence, and fighting for her community. Now, she’s running to defeat Republican Senator Rick Scott and win a better, brighter future for Florida.

name: Research Survey [Voter Action Project]
subject: Supporter poll: Expand the Supreme Court?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Integrity First Voter Action Project, www
body:
Voter Action Project Logo [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-weekly?refcode=081824_1&amount=25]
The Hill: Democrats reintroduce Supreme Court expansion legislation [https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/EA/EA007/1/89215/images/Hill_ExpandSCOTUS.png]
A group of Democratic lawmakers recently reintroduced a bill that would create an additional four seats on the Supreme Court.
This would make the number of justices match the number of U.S. Courts of Appeals (13 in total), as was tradition until Congress stopped expanding the Supreme Court more than 100 years ago.
We want to hear from voters in your area to get their feelings on the topic. Will you take our one-question poll right away?
Team: Should the Supreme Court be expanded?
By clicking a response below your answer will be automatically recorded:
YES [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-pollresponse?refcode=081824_1&amount=15] NO [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-pollresponse?refcode=081824_1&amount=15]
http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-weekly?refcode=081824_1&amount=25 [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-weekly?refcode=081824_1&amount=25]
https://www.facebook.com/voteraction [https://www.facebook.com/voteraction] https://twitter.com/voteractionproj [https://twitter.com/voteractionproj] https://www.instagram.com/voteractionproj/ [https://www.instagram.com/voteractionproj/] https://www.linkedin.com/company/voter-action-project/ [https://www.linkedin.com/company/voter-action-project/]
Integrity First Voter Action Project is dedicated to expanding ballot access and increasing voter participation across the country.
Since the Supreme Court gutted key provisions in the Voting Rights Act, extreme politicians have taken advantage to pass harsh laws that restrict access to the ballot box. These restrictions particularly affect disadvantaged communities and people of color. It’s our goal to bring awareness to these laws wherever they may crop up and organize voters to take action to ensure the right to vote is available to everyone in their states and communities.
Your support is crucial to our efforts. Will you donate today to help us protect voting rights? [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-weekly?refcode=081824_1&amount=25]
Donate Now [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-weekly?refcode=081824_1&amount=25]

name: Gretchen Whitmer
subject: Supporting my friend, Elissa.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ELISSA SLOTKIN FOR MICHIGAN
body:
# [](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/188?t=1&akid=1791%2E135344%2EwzUFm3)

Hi friend, it’s Gretchen Whitmer, and right now, I’m popping into your inbox with an important message.
But here’s where I was Wednesday:

That’s right. I’m proud to be standing alongside our Democratic nominee for U.S Senate: Congresswoman Elissa Slotkin.
It’s a race we cannot afford to lose. Because there’s so much on the line for Michiganders.
Whether it’s the fight to codify reproductive freedom at the federal level, to bring down the cost of prescription drugs, or to make sure Michigan is a place where anyone can get in and stay in the middle class, we need Elissa in the U.S. Senate delivering for Michiganders.
Now, I know a thing or two about winning in Michigan, so hear me when I say: Michigan is the swingiest of swing states.
National Republicans and outside groups are spending tens of millions to turn Michigan red and keep Elissa out of the Senate, and polls show that this race could not be closer.
So I’m prepared to fight like hell to make sure Elissa is our next U.S. Senator, and I need you in the fight with me.
