name: Jill Stein for President
subject: Less than a week...
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jill Stein for President 2024
body:
Last chance in 5 states

| | | [ ](https://www.jillstein2024.com/?e=e813143e1dc0d3b0ffcb007ffe357333&utm_source=jillsteinforpresident&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=ba_8_18_2_donors_lt_300_and_nd&n=1)
---
Peter, Jill Stein for President has had a fantastic week. We announced our powerful VP pick: Professor Butch Ware, an activist, dedicated educator, and honored historian whose work specializes in empire, colonialism, genocide and revolution. Just yesterday Jill and Butch won the Green Party nomination with over 98% of the vote. We had several great events over the past few days, including the [VP announcement](https://www.jillstein2024.com/r?u=cY9nTT8Dtw9WfEIqSAPi3Fopz1kPZTnL1qNLxzc06ApjCC6P4SANcrT9M6BIofF8W7QjgKcHmfK1pTYKZij4pg&e=e813143e1dc0d3b0ffcb007ffe357333&utm_source=jillsteinforpresident&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=ba_8_18_2_donors_lt_300_and_nd&n=2) which was viewed by tens of thousands of people across four platforms. We also had a fantastic [After Party event](https://www.jillstein2024.com/r?u=cY9nTT8Dtw9WfEIqSAPi3NGp6tsC5tkmzUKBM6M6-3yqwLSiAzpj0Z05PG9LLRixpa5gllKDVRAYieQs1jZvGQ&e=e813143e1dc0d3b0ffcb007ffe357333&utm_source=jillsteinforpresident&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=ba_8_18_2_donors_lt_300_and_nd&n=3) with comedian Ron Placone, who had us all in stitches. And even though we are nearly done wrapping up ballot access so we can move to get-out-the-vote, we still are fighting for ballot lines in 5 states. [_**We still need to raise thousands of dollars in the next few weeks - or millions of voters in Minnesota, Delaware, Alabama, Virginia, and Rhode Island will not have an anti-genocide, pro-worker, climate emergency candidate in November.**_](https://www.jillstein2024.com/ba?e=e813143e1dc0d3b0ffcb007ffe357333&utm_source=jillsteinforpresident&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=ba_8_18_2_donors_lt_300_and_nd&n=4) The deadline for collecting signatures in these states is coming up fast. In Minnesota and Delaware, we have only two days left! In Alabama and Virginia, the deadline is August 23rd, and Rhode Island’s deadline is September 6th. We are running out of time to ensure Jill gets on the ballot in these last few states. We also have to be prepared to fight off frivolous challenges from the anti-Democratic Party. Just this week we were challenged by the DNC in Wisconsin, **_a state where the Green Party already had ballot access_**! Fortunately, this attempt to kick Jill and Butch off the ballot was so absurd that it was dismissed immediately, but it shows how desperate the dirty Dems are to keep voters from having the choice of the anti-genocide, pro-worker, pro-planet ticket of Stein/Ware this November. We know we have been sending a lot of emails asking for donations, but it’s no exaggeration to say that if we don’t raise a significant amount of money in the next few days, Jill will lose ballot access in Minnesota, Delaware, Alabama, Virginia, and Rhode Island. **The good news is that if everyone who gets this email donates at least $2.40, we will raise enough money to get Jill on the ballot in all of these states. But we need everyone to pitch in now.** [**_Peter, we need supporters like you to give as much as you can today. Step up for Jill and real democracy RIGHT NOW by contributing now for Jill’s ballot access:_**](https://www.jillstein2024.com/ba?e=e813143e1dc0d3b0ffcb007ffe357333&utm_source=jillsteinforpresident&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=ba_8_18_2_donors_lt_300_and_nd&n=5)
---
| [](https://www.jillstein2024.com/ba?e=e813143e1dc0d3b0ffcb007ffe357333&utm_source=jillsteinforpresident&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=ba_8_18_2_donors_lt_300_and_nd&n=6 "DONATE NOW") [DONATE NOW](https://www.jillstein2024.com/ba?e=e813143e1dc0d3b0ffcb007ffe357333&utm_source=jillsteinforpresident&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=ba_8_18_2_donors_lt_300_and_nd&n=6)
---
We are not going to give up or capitulate to the parties of war and Wall Street. We are in this fight for the long haul, and, with your continued support, we will take the fight directly to the empire by exposing their corrupt, genocidal policies and challenging them on ballots across the country. In solidarity and gratitude, Jill Stein 2024
---
* * *
---
Paid for by Jill Stein for President 2024

| | Hi Peter,

My name is Christopher Zoeller and I joined the Maxwell Frost campaign as a student organizer because I was tired of Ron DeSantis standing in the way of MY rights.

Over the past year, I watched DeSantis do _everything_ in his power to force fascism onto students like me. He banned books, attacked LGBTQ+ youth, and signed a permitless-carry law that endangers thousands.

**I refused to stand on the sidelines and watch a far-extremist trample over everything I love about my state.** And Maxwell’s Organizing Program gave a Gen Zer like me the tools I need to make a difference in Florida politics. Because of this program I’m now working full-time as a campaign manager in Orange County.

**My success would have never happened without this program – so I know firsthand why more young people need to participate.** [**_That’s why I’m hoping you’ll help expand this important opportunity by chipping in $27 or more to Maxwell’s Year-Round Organizing Program._**](http://clicksp.frostforcongress.com/f/a/pzo_ybAifPQJ81vTm2e0CA~~/AAPPAAA~/RgRopL5eP0TNaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYWN0Ymx1ZS5jb20vZG9uYXRlL21hZi1lbS1wZ2U_cmVmY29kZT0yMDI0MDgxOF9lbV9mcl9iMV9jaHJpc3RvcGhlcl9lbiZhbW91bnQ9MjcmY2RtYz0ya2trd3lxeDVFdjRyRzRBYWpyUWlKczI4UkomcmVmY29kZTI9Mmtra3d5cXg1RXY0ckc0QWFqclFpSnMyOFJKJnJlZmNvZGVjZG1jPTJra2t3eXF4NUV2NHJHNEFhanJRaUpzMjhSSlcDc3BjQgpmu185wma1Cl4gUhRkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbVgEAAAAaQ~~) | [DONATE $27 TO SUPPORT STUDENT ORGANIZERS LIKE ME ➔](http://clicksp.frostforcongress.com/f/a/ZkmsWhsUtXpb-In1XQZZtw~~/AAPPAAA~/RgRopL5eP0TNaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYWN0Ymx1ZS5jb20vZG9uYXRlL21hZi1lbS1wZ2U_YW1vdW50PTI3JnJlZmNvZGU9MjAyNDA4MThfZW1fZnJfYjFfY2hyaXN0b3BoZXJfZW4mY2RtYz0ya2trd3lxeDVFdjRyRzRBYWpyUWlKczI4UkomcmVmY29kZTI9Mmtra3d5cXg1RXY0ckc0QWFqclFpSnMyOFJKJnJlZmNvZGVjZG1jPTJra2t3eXF4NUV2NHJHNEFhanJRaUpzMjhSSlcDc3BjQgpmu185wma1Cl4gUhRkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbVgEAAAAaQ~~)

clean_body: | ~~ | | Hi Peter, My name is Christopher Zoeller and I joined the Maxwell Frost campaign as a student organizer because I was tired of Ron DeSantis standing in the way of MY rights. Over the past year, I watched DeSantis do everything in his power to force fascism onto students like me. He banned books, attacked LGBTQ+ youth, and signed a permitless-carry law that endangers thousands. I refused to stand on the sidelines and watch a far-extremist trample over everything I love about my state. And Maxwell’s Organizing Program gave a Gen Zer like me the tools I need to make a difference in Florida politics. Because of this program I’m now working full-time as a campaign manager in Orange County. My success would have never happened without this program – so I know firsthand why more young people need to participate. ~~ | ~~ With abortion rights, democracy, and the future of our planet all on the ballot in November, we need all hands on deck to keep our organizing efforts going. Powering Maxwell’s Year-Round Organizing Program means you’ll have a direct impact on how many students on college campuses know their rights, register to vote, and change the course of Florida politics. Peter, if students like me are going to take on this fight and win, we need to show strength in people AND numbers. ~~ If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | ~~ | ~~ | ~~ | ~ | ~ | We can do this, Christopher Z. | ~~ Maxwell Alejandro Frost is an organizer representing Florida's 10th Congressional District. In 2022, he made history to become the first member of Gen Z elected to Congress. Maxwell isn't taking any corporate PAC, big sugar, or fossil fuel contributions. He needs your help to protect this seat for poor and working-class people. body:
I want to tell you what being a veteran means to me. From the yellow footprints at recruit training to the desert of Iraq, I hope this message finds you well.
| | | | [](http://links.americanlibertyalert.com/u/click?_t=3c9a9e018cb54768aae32f693c7987c9&_m=79bb9e4d80f949e1b3171508f06135c2&_e=i-2mGg5kUM5P2lltthNhHY_faCCJw1gCBfAf_vvoOT5fWkfGzILDvfR94NgD0RWHLOMWsMsxqL0ReDDOn_nO3-UofYwTTHq86jZZNlVBPFiFLSN-pNMRP-S6dJTNH2D7zeM6JvwmSJwr-qZo43d_TWAzE-lSiP7lQBsH8mLHtw7zixq5gTMk7F7vbPZP4q0HzoMu_YCLfRZSGB4I7rtQHJlF4Yd5uu-2xpztbowT4bP4CFrP79g5nwrGGVAD7m2NBUm_w8RJEfkHqiuC1onEx7_hgz-MLo-pwYerk-r9PwtpZfLklxvaAVClPKReiz75OmbrWYMa5pZ8Pmyb9pEmB5d1TPd-aKrqNe9H5l-HkwI3FOytRcfDWXmNRf5K-iMtGP-KHaqTPWVLi-s9vXJnz6e_38Sigutfv1DzRLsle8paget__510kLDyZtrmABP3k4ES7KLvfqj8jTMllKouSPnCnZ8Cw8ecMqbPiLT834JhqOq204I4zcFygwHkQJzJ)
---
|
---
Friend,
I want to take a moment to tell you about my path to becoming a United States Marine, and what being a veteran means to me.
I grew up in the small town of Middletown, Ohio.
Middletown was once an industrial powerhouse, but thanks to the unfair trade deals signed by our “leaders” in DC, the people of Middletown were left behind.
**_Like most of the enlisted Marines I served with, I joined the military to serve my country. It was also a way for a kid from a poor family to achieve the American Dream._**
When I got off the bus and stepped on the yellow footprints at Marine Corps Recruit Training, I honestly didn’t know what I was getting into.
But when my Drill Instructor handed me my Eagle, Globe, and Anchor and I earned the title of United States Marine, it was one of the proudest moments of my life.

[](http://links.americanlibertyalert.com/u/click?_t=3c9a9e018cb54768aae32f693c7987c9&_m=79bb9e4d80f949e1b3171508f06135c2&_e=i-2mGg5kUM5P2lltthNhHY_faCCJw1gCBfAf_vvoOT5fWkfGzILDvfR94NgD0RWHLOMWsMsxqL0ReDDOn_nO3-UofYwTTHq86jZZNlVBPFiFLSN-pNMRP-S6dJTNH2D7zeM6JvwmSJwr-qZo43d_TWAzE-lSiP7lQBsH8mLHtw7zixq5gTMk7F7vbPZP4q0HzoMu_YCLfRZSGB4I7rtQHJlF4Yd5uu-2xpztbowT4bP4CFrP79g5nwrGGVAD7m2NBUm_w8RJEfkHqiuC1onEx7_hgz-MLo-pwYerk-r9PwtpZfLklxvaAVClPKReiz75OmbrWYMa5pZ8Pmyb9pEmB5d1TPd-aKrqNe9H5l-HkwKxji0EEFAq59BnMlESLzjP08GcyyzlJvDfq69f7c-kyCtY3WzEz7ZZcYoty3AGhzYrVNbYBwhohxuFPH-K70AOp6T4_h_8YV1M2iO1fHafmbUwnlcvp16YOZiErjqUpQ_id7pDmpL7a9nwD0ExqD9R)
Compared to others I served with, I think my time in the Corps was rather unremarkable.
I deployed to Iraq, did my duty, and I’m proud of my service. But I was lucky. There were some scary moments, but it wasn’t like you’d see in the movies.
My time in the Corps was nothing compared to the sacrifices made by generations of Marines that came before me - and a lot in my own generation.
We ask so much of our men and women deployed around the globe. And they do it with honor and humility.
**_That’s what keeps me going every single day. Our veterans and servicemen, young and old, need to know we have their backs._**
President Trump was the best Commander-in-Chief of my lifetime, and if we’re going to get him back in the White House, it will all come down to your support.
**_[Kamala Harris is raising millions, so today, I’m humbly asking you to chip in just $5 to get President Trump back in the White House.>>](http://links.americanlibertyalert.com/u/click?_t=3c9a9e018cb54768aae32f693c7987c9&_m=79bb9e4d80f949e1b3171508f06135c2&_e=i-2mGg5kUM5P2lltthNhHY_faCCJw1gCBfAf_vvoOT5fWkfGzILDvfR94NgD0RWHLOMWsMsxqL0ReDDOn_nO3-UofYwTTHq86jZZNlVBPFiFLSN-pNMRP-S6dJTNH2D7zeM6JvwmSJwr-qZo43d_TWAzE-lSiP7lQBsH8mLHtw7zixq5gTMk7F7vbPZP4q0HzoMu_YCLfRZSGB4I7rtQHJlF4Yd5uu-2xpztbowT4bP4CFrP79g5nwrGGVAD7m2NBUm_w8RJEfkHqiuC1onEx7_hgz-MLo-pwYerk-r9PwtpZfLklxvaAVClPKReiz75OmbrWYMa5pZ8Pmyb9pEmB5d1TPd-aKrqNe9H5l-HkwIIp6px22JWbA2q9jGG9egRpeK9NeJRg7hn9xN3wRVPnky3fW5jNpOQcPCV239MuYk8Dhj9yH3PKEaqir-QgtO0T4PvoC9NuL0qFsdlG6U0LPWblv4tBNgmnv5usmQwgjXpjLGjcNc8ZxbijE-2Glxc)_**

[DONATE TODAY](http://links.americanlibertyalert.com/u/click?_t=3c9a9e018cb54768aae32f693c7987c9&_m=79bb9e4d80f949e1b3171508f06135c2&_e=i-2mGg5kUM5P2lltthNhHY_faCCJw1gCBfAf_vvoOT5fWkfGzILDvfR94NgD0RWHLOMWsMsxqL0ReDDOn_nO3-UofYwTTHq86jZZNlVBPFiFLSN-pNMRP-S6dJTNH2D7zeM6JvwmSJwr-qZo43d_TWAzE-lSiP7lQBsH8mLHtw7zixq5gTMk7F7vbPZP4q0HzoMu_YCLfRZSGB4I7rtQHJlF4Yd5uu-2xpztbowT4bP4CFrP79g5nwrGGVAD7m2NBUm_w8RJEfkHqiuC1onEx7_hgz-MLo-pwYerk-r9PwtpZfLklxvaAVClPKReiz75OmbrWYMa5pZ8Pmyb9pEmB5d1TPd-aKrqNe9H5l-HkwKEzHpsfJIshMqYdpgspyOo3A2YSwySBLKz-VM2chR_rBiKhRKBLV0CX6rLC-ziYzcNwDRhHrdUWMvXrShnD2oD-LjQDxKNJ745OYJRxTztuzoijsBRStfNvNrX5lxipeY9PvhFHwTqY3j-mVOzOdHF)
My time as a Marine taught me that every man has to do his part.
I won’t run from the biggest fights we face as a nation.

clean_body: I want to tell you what being a veteran means to me. From the yellow footprints at recruit training to the desert of Iraq, I hope this message finds you well. | | | | | Friend, I want to take a moment to tell you about my path to becoming a United States Marine, and what being a veteran means to me. I grew up in the small town of Middletown, Ohio. Middletown was once an industrial powerhouse, but thanks to the unfair trade deals signed by our “leaders” in DC, the people of Middletown were left behind. Like most of the enlisted Marines I served with, I joined the military to serve my country. It was also a way for a kid from a poor family to achieve the American Dream. When I got off the bus and stepped on the yellow footprints at Marine Corps Recruit Training, I honestly didn’t know what I was getting into. But when my Drill Instructor handed me my Eagle, Globe, and Anchor and I earned the title of United States Marine, it was one of the proudest moments of my life. Compared to others I served with, I think my time in the Corps was rather unremarkable. I deployed to Iraq, did my duty, and I’m proud of my service. But I was lucky. There were some scary moments, but it wasn’t like you’d see in the movies. My time in the Corps was nothing compared to the sacrifices made by generations of Marines that came before me - and a lot in my own generation. We ask so much of our men and women deployed around the globe. And they do it with honor and humility. That’s what keeps me going every single day. Our veterans and servicemen, young and old, need to know we have their backs. President Trump was the best Commander-in-Chief of my lifetime, and if we’re going to get him back in the White House, it will all come down to your support. My time as a Marine taught me that every man has to do his part. I won’t run from the biggest fights we face as a nation. If you give me this opportunity, you have my word that President Trump & I will fight tooth and nail to put you and your family FIRST. Thank you and may God bless you, JD Vance Future Vice President of the United States PS: If you can’t afford to donate because Kamala Harris has wrecked our economy, please save your donation for another time. I only ask that you please say a prayer for everyone currently serving in harm’s way. | | | | | | | Contributions to Trump National Committee JFC Inc. are not deductible for federal income tax purposes. ---
Sam Brown has been changing his tune on abortion access right before the election 👀, but we won’t let him run away from his extreme anti-choice record:
* In 2022, Brown completed a survey saying he does not support a woman’s right to choose, **_not even in cases of rape or incest_**.
* Brown served as the Nevada president and chairman for the Faith and Freedom Coalition,**which praised Texas’ six-week abortion ban** that outlaws the procedure before many women even know they are pregnant.
* Sam Brown strongly supported overturning Roe v. Wade. He was caught on tape saying that he**would not vote for someone who would continue to support Roe v. Wade** and stated that he will only support Justices who “understand the importance of protecting Life.”

It’s obvious that Sam Brown will say or do anything to get elected. **No matter what he says now, his actions and words make it clear: Brown can’t be trusted to stand up for Nevadans’ reproductive rights in the Senate.**
**[_If you think Nevada needs pro-choice leaders in office, chip in a donation of $10 or whatever you can give to the Nevada Democratic Party today._](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqu4ksFa5SF7IXH6Sr7Lz9yT_8CF8m0Ob5uWnWrf0uEpj3qsFu1qhIranEPWHVTW2REBSH_tSmMx2znwK1tsoQ5rOKreIsrCwcYYl0RlSEXxueFseFtT15SiBKQcgLFjgHiwNfDk27Xxn27h4Q2Agh7GluM44NFCv1hLArBYfKj0H3dXzyMYSNRtMyYYH9UMPpBe20PsW0KFGJkwU_iMKIojUXvBl1B1uo6gHxP8IyU5EsDeHo3JQdYy3jGyUF7wFfP_eqXptGkHlElvUBcOxp4TKh4pw4MWrLapVSX-eFBVzU6hHsbFH46vL9lKT9x7R8YAdZS8D38IATs9yToTzI8wwffogA4iQlsCu29V2NJwAkUHA5Bx8Pwsiq7ZtQ7fSBNQeM6XPKBuDEBobPQnkWN_8aLzuxokuKcznI16SeXvjg/490/p7qxwD5YRA-dLDY7QuP3fw/h1/h001.P0o9bBK6mMr8rSnTaNznlReEIW5svb9VbyRIQT3rYRA)**

clean_body: | | | | Sam Brown has been changing his tune on abortion access right before the election 👀, but we won’t let him run away from his extreme anti-choice record: In 2022, Brown completed a survey saying he does not support a woman’s right to choose, not even in cases of rape or incest. Brown served as the Nevada president and chairman for the Faith and Freedom Coalition,which praised Texas’ six-week abortion ban that outlaws the procedure before many women even know they are pregnant. Sam Brown strongly supported overturning Roe v. Wade. He was caught on tape saying that hewould not vote for someone who would continue to support Roe v. Wade and stated that he will only support Justices who “understand the importance of protecting Life.” It’s obvious that Sam Brown will say or do anything to get elected. The NRCC has been eyeing our district since I was first elected in 2018. They've tried to flip it every election since. They know that Pennsylvania, and especially our district, will be crucial in the battle for control of the House (and more!) this November.

The Republicans are feeling the pressure to maintain their slim House majority, and they see our district as a potential pick-up opportunity. They're preparing to support my extremist opponent, Ryan Mackenzie, and launch aggressive attack ads against me and our campaign.

[_**We need to be ready to counter these attacks and defend the progress we've made together. | | While Democrats are feeling energized across the country, we have to work to make sure that momentum continues. Because one way or another, we're still up against a formidable Republican money machine. Case in point: after the state saw notable ad investments from right-wing interest groups, **a new poll in Pennsylvania shows my friend Bob Casey leading by just 4 points.** If we lose Pennsylvania, it's virtually impossible for us to keep our razor-thin Senate majority. So with under 100 days left to go, we need to help Bob hold strong and protect our majority. He's a tireless champion for seniors, children and working families in the Senate. I've seen it firsthand as we've worked together to lower health care costs, protect seniors, defend democracy, and so much more. **He's no stranger to tough fights, but he's facing an opponent who can self-finance, and this is shaping up to be his closest race yet.** [**We need all hands on deck to keep Bob Casey in the Senate. clean_body: Pennsylvania is narrowing in the Republicans’ favor. | | | | While Democrats are feeling energized across the country, we have to work to make sure that momentum continues. Because one way or another, we're still up against a formidable Republican money machine. Case in point: after the state saw notable ad investments from right-wing interest groups, a new poll in Pennsylvania shows my friend Bob Casey leading by just 4 points. If we lose Pennsylvania, it's virtually impossible for us to keep our razor-thin Senate majority. So with under 100 days left to go, we need to help Bob hold strong and protect our majority. He's a tireless champion for seniors, children and working families in the Senate. I've seen it firsthand as we've worked together to lower health care costs, protect seniors, defend democracy, and so much more. He's no stranger to tough fights, but he's facing an opponent who can self-finance, and this is shaping up to be his closest race yet. = Donate Now If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly and split it between Bob Casey and Ron Wyden: | = | = ---|--- = | = = While we're working around the clock to elect Kamala Harris to the White House, we need to be focused on defending and strengthening our Democratic majority in the Senate so we can continue to build on the progress we've made, and push back against the extremist right-wing agenda. Thank you, Ron | | Paid for and authorized by Wyden for Senate. | This email was sent by Wyden for Senate P.O. name: Christina Bohannan
subject: Even today, Republicans want to make it harder for folks to vote.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Christina Bohannan for Congress
body:
We’ve come a long way since the 1920s but even today, extremist Republicans are trying to make it even harder for marginalized communities to vote.

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/91068673/492610307/175592731?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjIyOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwNjFiNDY4NC05MDVkLWVmMTEtOTkxYS02MDQ1YmRkYmZjNGIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=tlxmwyLcs76TBleGiwqIWjzt6ZYoyu5llS_UfLnXGH8=)

Peter,

On this day in 1920, the 19th Amendment was ratified, finally giving women the right to vote after years of hard work and determination.

**While the 19th Amendment was a monumental step forward, not everyone was able to enjoy suffrage with its passage.** Many Black and brown people were still left out of our democratic process for decades to come.

We’ve come a long way since the 1920s, but even today, extremist Republicans are trying to make it harder for marginalized communities to vote. To make matters worse, they are also going after women’s rights to make choices about their own bodies.

This much is clear: The GOP is trying to turn back the clock on all the progress we’ve made. **That’s why we need to win back the House majority.**

**[That’s where you come in. Can you chip in a few bucks to help me beat Mariannette Miller-Meeks and stand up for the rights of ALL Americans?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/91068677/492610314/175592731?refcode=em24_240818_19tha_fnd_gq_act___cb_ettx&utm_campaign=em24_240818_19tha_fnd_gq_act___cb_ettx&utm_medium=email&refcode2=061b4684-905d-ef11-991a-6045bddbfc4b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjIyOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwNjFiNDY4NC05MDVkLWVmMTEtOTkxYS02MDQ1YmRkYmZjNGIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=tlxmwyLcs76TBleGiwqIWjzt6ZYoyu5llS_UfLnXGH8=)**

clean_body: We’ve come a long way since the 1920s but even today, extremist Republicans are trying to make it even harder for marginalized communities to vote. | = Peter, On this day in 1920, the 19th Amendment was ratified, finally giving women the right to vote after years of hard work and determination. While the 19th Amendment was a monumental step forward, not everyone was able to enjoy suffrage with its passage. Many Black and brown people were still left out of our democratic process for decades to come. We’ve come a long way since the 1920s, but even today, extremist Republicans are trying to make it harder for marginalized communities to vote. To make matters worse, they are also going after women’s rights to make choices about their own bodies. This much is clear: The GOP is trying to turn back the clock on all the progress we’ve made. That’s why we need to win back the House majority. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = = = = = Thank you, Christina Bohannan = Christina Bohannan is a mom, law professor, former engineer, and state representative. name: The Democratic Party
subject: Why today:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Democratic National Committee, www
body:
There is a very good chance you didn't wake up this morning and think to yourself...
---
There is a very good chance you didn't wake up this morning and think to yourself, "Today is the day I am going to make a donation to the Democratic National Committee." Fair enough. But we hope you will make that donation before you go to sleep -- especially if you want to elect Kamala Harris, Tim Walz, and Democrats across the country this fall. Here's why: Donations in a few weeks -- when we're in the home stretch of this campaign -- are important. But to be totally upfront, **donations today, in the weeks before people will cast their first ballots, are even more important.** We have very real fundraising goals to hit before early voting starts. And for every goal we miss, there are difficult spending decisions we have to make, including cuts in key states. We don't want to do that. So we are asking: [**Can Democrats running for office everywhere count on you to contribute $7 directly to the DNC today? Help us reach our fundraising goals and we will put your donations to work to reach the voters we need to win in November.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-august-elect-dems-2024?amount=7&refcode=em_20240818_863_fr&refcode2=863_22930333_7mqliT&akid=863%2E22930333%2E7mqliT) _If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly._ | | | **[Donate $7](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-august-elect-dems-2024?express_lane=true&amount=7&refcode=em_20240818_863_fr&refcode2=863_22930333_7mqliT&akid=863%2E22930333%2E7mqliT)**

body:
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/91069809/492614259/472954119?refcode=AU_AZD_FR_TAN_GEN_AC90_20240818_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS8xMDU1MTYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiY2MwOTAwZjgtOTI1ZC1lZjExLTk5MWEtNjA0NWJkZGJmYzRiIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=t-q29T_lE2ZDf5wN--DwMD-sJ_uk-x6ZcQlA0A1HDhc=)
---
| | **100 years after citizenship, Indigenous peoples continue to fight to vote**
_— AZ Mirror, June 6, 2024_
* * *
_“Indigenous people are among the fastest-growing populations in the United States, according to the Native American Rights Fund,**but they are still subjected to voter suppression tactics that prevent their full political participation.”**_ | [SPLIT A CONTRIBUTION](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/91069810/492614260/472954119?refcode=AU_AZD_FR_TAN_GEN_AC90_20240818_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS8xMDU1MTYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiY2MwOTAwZjgtOTI1ZC1lZjExLTk5MWEtNjA0NWJkZGJmYzRiIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=t-q29T_lE2ZDf5wN--DwMD-sJ_uk-x6ZcQlA0A1HDhc=)
---
Making sure that every community has the opportunity to cast their ballot is central to the work we do as a state party.
Indigenous communities gained the right to vote a century ago, yet there are still systemic barriers that Indigenous voters in Arizona face that keep a large portion of voters from accessing the ballot box and making their voices heard.
**[Folks — organizers are working to register voters across the map and make sure that Indigenous communities are represented at the ballot box this November. Will you split a contribution with our team in Northeast Arizona to help fuel voter registration in Indigenous communities in Arizona?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/91069811/492614262/472954119?refcode=AU_AZD_FR_TAN_GEN_AC90_20240818_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS8xMDU1MTYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiY2MwOTAwZjgtOTI1ZC1lZjExLTk5MWEtNjA0NWJkZGJmYzRiIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=t-q29T_lE2ZDf5wN--DwMD-sJ_uk-x6ZcQlA0A1HDhc=)**

Indigenous communities gained the right to vote a century ago, yet there are still systemic barriers that Indigenous voters in Arizona face that keep a large portion of voters from accessing the ballot box and making their voices heard. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through to the Arizona Democratic Party and the Northeast Arizona Democrats immediately: | = = | = = | = = Organizers have to face geographical isolation between communities, physical environments that can be hard to navigate, and technological barriers that can inhibit the registration process. name: INDems
subject: Banks continues to run from debates
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Indiana Democratic Party, www
body:
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP03/1/67635/images/IDP%20logo.jpg]
Peter,

In July, the Indiana Debate Commission extended invitations for candidates vying for Indiana’s open U.S. Senate seat. Democrat Valerie McCray and Libertarian Andrew Horning have already indicated their willingness — but Banks refuses to do so.

Instead of giving Hoosiers a fair chance ahead of election night to consider these candidates' platforms, Banks has continued to be unresponsive to the invitation. His silence is a disservice to voters, and it shows that despite big-money donors, Banks has competition worth fearing.

To help us oust Jim Banks entirely, will you rush a split donation to the Indiana Democratic Party and Valerie McCray’s campaign? Your generosity helps us connect with voters so that Hoosiers know their options and the facts before going to the voting booth. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mccraysplit]

Remember, elections belong to the people, not the politicians, and so we urge you to hold Banks accountable for his lack of transparency this November. We can’t wait to see you at the polls.

Thanks,
INDems

Indiana Democratic Party
101 W Washington St., #1110E
Indianapolis, IN 46204

name: Sarah at JanePAC
subject: From a Proud Childless Cat Lady

body:
I need to come clean.

| [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/91070596/492617045/1328794144?refcode=ea.e3c5062f-965d-ef11-991a-6045bddbfc4b&ms=ea.e3c5062f-965d-ef11-991a-6045bddbfc4b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImUzYzUwNjJmLTk2NWQtZWYxMS05OTFhLTYwNDViZGRiZmM0YiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=WGvJtcNrPkv0idCxIKHC9edGqFXXx5pSKRheY4JKJ7A=&emci=596ec20f-d35b-ef11-991a-6045bddbfc4b&emdi=e3c5062f-965d-ef11-991a-6045bddbfc4b&ceid=4823105)
---
Dear friends, I’m Sarah, the Executive Director of the Jane Fonda Climate PAC. Usually these emails focus on our latest endorsements, updates about our work, and important climate news. But today I’d like to share a little bit about myself, and even come clean about something. I’ll just cut to the chase — I am a proud, childless cat lady. Recently, JD Vance made some comments that really struck a chord. He took a swipe at women like me — childless, passionate about what we believe in, and maybe a bit too obsessed with our furry friends. But you know what? I wouldn’t trade anything for my cats! Just look at them! This is Link and Rae, hanging out on the couch. [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/91070597/492617046/2105508926?refcode=ea.e3c5062f-965d-ef11-991a-6045bddbfc4b&ms=ea.e3c5062f-965d-ef11-991a-6045bddbfc4b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImUzYzUwNjJmLTk2NWQtZWYxMS05OTFhLTYwNDViZGRiZmM0YiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=WGvJtcNrPkv0idCxIKHC9edGqFXXx5pSKRheY4JKJ7A=) I adopted Link and Rae when they were just 5 weeks old. A co-worker found them on the side of the road, they were both wet and cold, and Link was very sick. The shelters were all full. So I did what any _childless cat lady_ would do, I took them in! In any case, this email isn’t just about a silly label. It’s about standing up against the weird, backward kind of thinking that Vance and others like him represent. I believe that we, the childless cat ladies, the dog dads, the devoted parents, and everyone in between, are a powerful force when we come together. Let’s show JD Vance that when people who care deeply about the future of our planet unite in a common cause, we can make a real difference. That’s what JanePAC is all about — uniting so many diverse, unique people and communities around one cause: electing leaders who will fight for real, lasting climate progress. Will you chip in today to help the Jane Fonda PAC continue our work electing leaders who don’t just pay lip service to issues to rile people up, but are actually committed to fighting for a better, greener future for all of us — cats, dogs, and humans of all ages? | [**DONATE**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/91070598/492617047/2105508926?refcode=ea.e3c5062f-965d-ef11-991a-6045bddbfc4b&ms=ea.e3c5062f-965d-ef11-991a-6045bddbfc4b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImUzYzUwNjJmLTk2NWQtZWYxMS05OTFhLTYwNDViZGRiZmM0YiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=WGvJtcNrPkv0idCxIKHC9edGqFXXx5pSKRheY4JKJ7A=)
---
Thank you for standing with me, Link, Rae, Jane, and our team!
Sarah
Executive Director
Jane Fonda Climate PAC
P.S. Please enjoy these bonus pictures of Link and Rae.
[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/91070599/492617048/2105508926?refcode=ea.e3c5062f-965d-ef11-991a-6045bddbfc4b&ms=ea.e3c5062f-965d-ef11-991a-6045bddbfc4b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImUzYzUwNjJmLTk2NWQtZWYxMS05OTFhLTYwNDViZGRiZmM0YiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=WGvJtcNrPkv0idCxIKHC9edGqFXXx5pSKRheY4JKJ7A=) | [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/91070600/492617049/2105508926?refcode=ea.e3c5062f-965d-ef11-991a-6045bddbfc4b&ms=ea.e3c5062f-965d-ef11-991a-6045bddbfc4b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImUzYzUwNjJmLTk2NWQtZWYxMS05OTFhLTYwNDViZGRiZmM0YiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=WGvJtcNrPkv0idCxIKHC9edGqFXXx5pSKRheY4JKJ7A=)

clean_body: I need to come clean. | Dear friends, I’m Sarah, the Executive Director of the Jane Fonda Climate PAC. Usually these emails focus on our latest endorsements, updates about our work, and important climate news. But today I’d like to share a little bit about myself, and even come clean about something. I’ll just cut to the chase — I am a proud, childless cat lady. Recently, JD Vance made some comments that really struck a chord. He took a swipe at women like me — childless, passionate about what we believe in, and maybe a bit too obsessed with our furry friends. But you know what? I wouldn’t trade anything for my cats! Just look at them! This is Link and Rae, hanging out on the couch. = I adopted Link and Rae when they were just 5 weeks old. A co-worker found them on the side of the road, they were both wet and cold, and Link was very sick. The shelters were all full. So I did what any childless cat lady would do, I took them in! In any case, this email isn’t just about a silly label. It’s about standing up against the weird, backward kind of thinking that Vance and others like him represent. I believe that we, the childless cat ladies, the dog dads, the devoted parents, and everyone in between, are a powerful force when we come together. Let’s show JD Vance that when people who care deeply about the future of our planet unite in a common cause, we can make a real difference. That’s what JanePAC is all about — uniting so many diverse, unique people and communities around one cause: electing leaders who will fight for real, lasting climate progress. Will you chip in today to help the Jane Fonda PAC continue our work electing leaders who don’t just pay lip service to issues to rile people up, but are actually committed to fighting for a better, greener future for all of us — cats, dogs, and humans of all ages? | = Thank you for standing with me, Link, Rae, Jane, and our team! Sarah Executive Director Jane Fonda Climate PAC P.S. Please enjoy these bonus pictures of Link and Rae. = | = ---|--- | = | = = Follow along: | | ---|---|--- Paid for by Jane Fonda Climate PAC, not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee. Jane Fonda Climate PAC 600 Pennsylvania Ave SE #15180 Washington, DC 20003 United States

name: Mayra Flores
subject: Conceded my election.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Service and Honor
body:
Everyone expected me to just walk away – but I’m not someone who ever, ever gives up.
This is probably the hardest email I’ve ever written.

| |
---
| | | | | | | | Friend --
I wish things would have gone a different way... | **_Democrat Vicente Gonzalez holds back Republican surge, returns 34th Congressional District to Democratic control._**
---

This is probably the hardest email I've ever written.

**I 'm Mayra Flores, the America First Hispanic woman running in the biggest race in the nation.**

After we made history and flipped a blue seat red for the first time in 100 years, the Democrats threw the kitchen sink at me, **and I had to concede my race. **

[](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=a7a2ff3eb52547218d1d4ecbf926e320&_e=pKw7Uc9uSXTSZT0xe5hFk4pF2FrGMpMfGImh0iy_Fnznt4VtSZYo3nWfVL4oX4NmIw-CzKBuz9IiSPbkIh7lM05X8E7XL7MoUGushpuqaEJeIkwX3yeouJf_limkvH5gRHZEJRKxmhzT34vYdTuikZlMTJuyY1LrfXPzFAr9j0XZK2bbcpMJQfJ3zvIZFPruLI0yXRIiYppgaPZV90pm5szPbxPk4bh2tbBBf444fnpF5zo5vq29HOT5FDPs1myWGjVzuz1LjjM_h9W1OR3MUCH8Jjo30XyVhWWmjVr42fqIyl0L8RaZQmLVEhZVS655OLvJujtKf_BPGgADGkyELIQr97R-vVuTQ6XdF3y0YwSQsNHLhnpRRvUe77KXX7dhZyeKmmpH2MTXGss3EWaLlpeWs3hJI6bmFI4jJrv6i0y5MW4QENfrsZk0YMrjoHyT)

---
Everyone expected me to just walk away - _but I 'm not someone who ever, ever gives up._

I'm taking a leap of faith here and have thrown my name on the ballot once again.

The Democrats overpowered us in this race before - _and now all indicators are pointing toward this election being a complete toss-up._

My stomach is in knots - **the Democrats have already raised an astonishing $30 MILLION, and Kamala Harris just raised $100 million bucks**(I know, I can't believe anyone would give her money either...but they do).

**That 's why I'm humbly asking for your help: _[Will you step up and chip in just a few bucks in the next hour to help us counter this massive Left-wing onslaught?](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=a7a2ff3eb52547218d1d4ecbf926e320&_e=pKw7Uc9uSXTSZT0xe5hFk4pF2FrGMpMfGImh0iy_Fnznt4VtSZYo3nWfVL4oX4NmIw-CzKBuz9IiSPbkIh7lM05X8E7XL7MoUGushpuqaEJeIkwX3yeouJf_limkvH5gRHZEJRKxmhzT34vYdTuikZlMTJuyY1LrfXPzFAr9j0XZK2bbcpMJQfJ3zvIZFPruLI0yXRIiYppgaPZV90pm5szPbxPk4bh2tbBBf444fnpF5zo5vq29HOT5FDPs1myWGjVzuz1LjjM_h9W1OR3MUP2QQOaCfXogBDMr4F3XuDuGT1CIm0go1LTKmFO2kfAHMToTljYMoNfCINryfzjR3PQk6Etj_vYRkQx7Aejf8Q7L4P2cHzS5q8VbEnbLDZiX95g19VjDL8u4TwazdVGj5mxv4qILBVSpgrGbcg_I5-PZEx5lzlJlvWTsYxx0WbaG "Will you step up and chip in just a few bucks in the next hour to help us counter this massive Left-wing onslaught?")_**

I'll just tell you: I'm afraid to see what happens if this email doesn't work.

**The Democrats & the media hacks are terrified of me - that's because as a young Hispanic female, I obliterate every woke narrative they push. So, they will truly do anything to destroy me.**

The Democrats know that if they lose the Hispanic vote, it's over for them. _Forever._

I'm opening my heart to you here: Please, please help out:
| | | [**CONTRIBUTE**](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=a7a2ff3eb52547218d1d4ecbf926e320&_e=pKw7Uc9uSXTSZT0xe5hFk4pF2FrGMpMfGImh0iy_Fnznt4VtSZYo3nWfVL4oX4NmIw-CzKBuz9IiSPbkIh7lM05X8E7XL7MoUGushpuqaEJeIkwX3yeouJf_limkvH5gRHZEJRKxmhzT34vYdTuikZlMTJuyY1LrfXPzFAr9j0XZK2bbcpMJQfJ3zvIZFPruLI0yXRIiYppgaPZV90pm5szPbxPk4bh2tbBBf444fnpF5zo5vq29HOT5FDPs1myWGjVzuz1LjjM_h9W1OR3MUA-Q4Gb7lx5HoYrgh1M2-QVR6eA42myXV2HTxdEctoWSEAchegiQVEXEPWYBZZhcSKkAWeAVKNLwptAoAn9IQeoXqmLYMkJ3R3n3ZLwtBM1i8-8JIsCfiKGDUK9V3PbE5SzP647XGzOZHiX0XFzetIEav6hklGl_TY0XfuJwHbzE)

clean_body: Everyone expected me to just walk away – but I’m not someone who ever, ever gives up. This is probably the hardest email I’ve ever written. | | | | | | | | | | Friend -- I wish things would have gone a different way... | Democrat Vicente Gonzalez holds back Republican surge, returns 34th Congressional District to Democratic control. This is probably the hardest email I've ever written. I 'm Mayra Flores, the America First Hispanic woman running in the biggest race in the nation. After we made history and flipped a blue seat red for the first time in 100 years, the Democrats threw the kitchen sink at me, and I had to concede my race. Everyone expected me to just walk away - but I 'm not someone who ever, ever gives up. I'm taking a leap of faith here and have thrown my name on the ballot once again. The Democrats overpowered us in this race before - and now all indicators are pointing toward this election being a complete toss-up. My stomach is in knots - the Democrats have already raised an astonishing $30 MILLION, and Kamala Harris just raised $100 million bucks(I know, I can't believe anyone would give her money either...but they do). That 's why I'm humbly asking for your help: "Will you step up and chip in just a few bucks in the next hour to help us counter this massive Left-wing onslaught?" I'll just tell you: I'm afraid to see what happens if this email doesn't work. The Democrats & the media hacks are terrified of me - that's because as a young Hispanic female, I obliterate every woke narrative they push. So, they will truly do anything to destroy me. The Democrats know that if they lose the Hispanic vote, it's over for them. Forever. I'm opening my heart to you here: Please, please help out: | | | God bless you, and God bless America. Mayra Flores America First Candidate Texas Congressional District 34 | | Paid for by Service and Honor A joint fundraising committee established by Jake Ellzey for Congress and 31 Days PAC PO BOX 30844 Bethesda, MD 20824

**Over $6 million in MAGA ads attacking Democrats will blanket California.**

body:
[ https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/30130?t=1007&amount=25&akid=2263%2E52803%2E3JTpVM ][IMG]

I’m reaching out because we’ve just had a major setback, and I’m really
hoping you can help my campaign turn things around,
Peter.

For context, Republican Larry Hogan has already been up on the air running
misleading TV ads that deceive voters about his priorities and his record.

Marylanders need to hear the truth about Hogan, which is why we’ve decided
to launch a daily $15,000 fundraising goal to boost our own general
election ads.

But I just took a look at our ActBlue, and we’re way behind where we
should be at this point. We need to hit this goal by midnight, and we’re
only halfway there.

[ https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/30130?t=1008&amount=25&akid=2263%2E52803%2E3JTpVM ]Can I count on you to pitch in a grassroots donation of
$25 ASAP?
If everyone reading this email chipped in before closing out, we could put
ourselves back on track to hit this benchmark before midnight.

[ https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/30130?t=1009&amount=25&akid=2263%2E52803%2E3JTpVM ]Donate
$25

[ https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/30130?t=1010&amount=35&akid=2263%2E52803%2E3JTpVM ]Other Amount

This is a critical moment in our race,
Peter, so I hope I can count on
your support.

Together,

Angela Alsobrooks

The answer is simple: [Join The New York Sun today](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=8b5b2f1294a2458dafa76fea6b200f13&_e=AAYylLX9mMI2xaFAPYAsedHDnNsJvb7Ca59SHxCyzyjgKleXFx7QpQ4WvRqvAxqQpJertwqsMl-aO1Z-_Ty6s2IDGjenR1muwN5Uz3wYqh18a2Yzc2YROOAvGHVZMjb9jYmYqSozxh3jgszt34syyc7w1PqAkbMvqw2qyVFXE_SGBgYwh6pKjMRLsEPzTj5dmxRIn3vZsViAmHc8Ysb5P7cBBdAQht5-mHXPNIhJs9Np-Yh93Jd0HsdZZDpfJ-6pzbpMteYwRGJk29RmVLnNfP8XVXvQorNTdSksIkEBLC0Iify00T0L9Afu7SdyDGBCpKwmHlRo4-AY_CvBThJJ_vQZ3yuD_4XFLlV_isF05dHtKrX349twPQqOAq9lwUKe2tMfViRzB3Gmq5LEjl1RtJ6W2E85liY8tMayLIte-eVSJrBnHSQ6sVmsWGprgY0A). It's time to join the movement to rebuild a better newspaper. It's time to join The New York Sun. Founded in 1833 - eighteen years before the Times - the Sun has been on the right side of history at every turn. The Sun is truly America's newspaper. It answers only to the American people. name: John Fetterman
subject: déjà vu...
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TAMMY BALDWIN FOR SENATE
body:
| Republicans recruited a right-wing California megamillionaire to run against Tammy Baldwin.
# [](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/67?t=1&akid=3375%2E35263%2EBKpYeT)
[](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/2155?c0=tbe-em-aug24.RD8FO-&refcode=AU_STB_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20240818_PM1_V1_S1&t=4&akid=3375%2E35263%2EBKpYeT) Hey Peter, it’s John. Have you heard about what Republicans are cooking up in Wisconsin’s battleground Senate race? Mitch McConnell handpicked a right-wing California megamillionaire to run against Tammy Baldwin in Wisconsin. _Yup, you read that right._ 🙄 California bank owner, Eric Hovde, might be running for Senate in Wisconsin, but his California ties run deep — think $7M Laguna Beach mansion 🌴, owner of a $3 billion California bank 💸, Orange County mainstay 🍊 — you get the picture. When I heard McConnell picked this guy to help the GOP flip the Senate red, I couldn’t help but feel a little déjà vu. Senate Republicans ran the same playbook in 2022 when they recruited New Jersey’s own Dr. Oz to run against me in Pennsylvania. _We know how that turned out..._ But Eric Hovde is spending million$ of his own personal fortune to dispel these carpetbagger claims and attack Tammy Baldwin. **_If you look at the polls, it’s looking like his strategy in working with this race now statistically tied._** Tammy Baldwin needs your help to fight back and defend this seat, because nothing short of our Senate majority is on the line if Republicans flip Wisconsin red. [**So, Peter, can I count on you to chip in to Tammy’s campaign today and help defend our Senate majority from out-of-state, right-wing megamillionaires like Eric Hovde?**](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/2155?c0=tbe-em-aug24.RD8FO-&refcode=AU_STB_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20240818_PM1_V1_S1&t=5&akid=3375%2E35263%2EBKpYeT) _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [CHIP IN $5 NOW](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/3663?c0=tbe-em-aug24.yJoPO5&refcode=AU_STB_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20240818_PM1_V1_S1&t=6&akid=3375%2E35263%2EBKpYeT)

Have you heard about what Republicans are cooking up in Wisconsin’s battleground Senate race? Mitch McConnell handpicked a right-wing California megamillionaire to run against Tammy Baldwin in Wisconsin. Yup, you read that right. 🙄 California bank owner, Eric Hovde, might be running for Senate in Wisconsin, but his California ties run deep — think $7M Laguna Beach mansion 🌴, owner of a $3 billion California bank 💸, Orange County mainstay 🍊 — you get the picture. When I heard McConnell picked this guy to help the GOP flip the Senate red, I couldn’t help but feel a little déjà vu. Senate Republicans ran the same playbook in 2022 when they recruited New Jersey’s own Dr. Oz to run against me in Pennsylvania. We know how that turned out... But Eric Hovde is spending million$ of his own personal fortune to dispel these carpetbagger claims and attack Tammy Baldwin. If you look at the polls, it’s looking like his strategy in working with this race now statistically tied. Tammy Baldwin needs your help to fight back and defend this seat, because nothing short of our Senate majority is on the line if Republicans flip Wisconsin red. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | | Thank you for everything you do! 🙏 ♥️ John John Fetterman U.S. Senator from Pennsylvania P.O. Contributions or gifts to The Real Texas PAC are not tax deductible. Contributions from corporations, labor organizations, treasury funds, and federal government contractors are prohibited. name: Harris-Walz HQ
subject: Have you been waiting for the perfect time?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Harris for President
body:
Today is that day, Peter. | | |
---
Peter, If you’ve been waiting for the *perfect* time to donate to Kamala’s presidential campaign, we’re here to tell you that TODAY is that day. Why today? There are the obvious reasons: to defend democracy, restore reproductive freedom, and prevent Donald Trump from taking back the White House. **But there’s also the practical reason: We have very real fundraising goals we need to reach.** Peter, they’re not arbitrary goals -- they’re numbers our team has written into the budget. They’re numbers that will allow us to overcome what Trump and the MAGA Right are spending to defeat us. And transparently, almost all of our donations come in response to emails like this one. **Kamala knows that not everyone can give to _every_ email we send. But today, she’s hoping she can count on you to give to this one.** [**Will you donate $25 -- or whatever amount is meaningful to you -- to help Kamala and Tim win this election in November and make history?**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.NV3IV8RXB3BPG-RgoenRivizIuY7_hyRTlr0Ev1A4jyRess_Z46ivJQExIi6hcFAcJnANik16-vDfNuYKO7yv7zUrl2iH2co_MVaGhsauw2MkaBuAFsm-ueUO2e4TyzX75KehYI0jd91zGFt_4FCQBLVCPAXTsezVzvSSwsuTrgeOOuC7fCLiBqXb0AFMaZW8gaLyGcNwIalTasP9-ga2xt6O1tLbkYj9L69ElhhsPWeRz2htnaFnf1_l70eZr5s7099_hy5T6ADi6LvNPiI8LDPmeuTRUQnXRItpzDu2VQY23pQdoUwU7sFuDTpfFCaY6mpiDAf_JXRjrTovhthg57Cjp4G0RT3UPILpE1zYsocyySpZRu16C5Sut2wysXKBp_b3PORs5NZ0RAyUBpl1vyMvpZbuy9JWSeDG9otwIU3VVInnxrst6CdbjLwZWU4AUufcWy2JQjP-r54y5vQTh7DC2_ut_Dfo2qVCn5VA7-Uko5oYCBdDrRorquCeswqxto_-7DN6CC2_AEgWxsYrWoUrze_C4uxzkVv0EHAXqlSLG9f39e8xvpYHOXLKlO1/490/eOwiA3dPSEaiiAV3Ee02rQ/h0/h001.4hJzU1sdPOZrrNgsYc59516LxlS04VbC76bAgVA4e5k) | If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:

clean_body: Today is that day, Peter. | | | Peter, If you’ve been waiting for the perfect time to donate to Kamala’s presidential campaign, we’re here to tell you that TODAY is that day. Why today? There are the obvious reasons: to defend democracy, restore reproductive freedom, and prevent Donald Trump from taking back the White House. But there’s also the practical reason: We have very real fundraising goals we need to reach. Peter, they’re not arbitrary goals -- they’re numbers our team has written into the budget. They’re numbers that will allow us to overcome what Trump and the MAGA Right are spending to defeat us. And transparently, almost all of our donations come in response to emails like this one. Kamala knows that not everyone can give to every email we send. But today, she’s hoping she can count on you to give to this one. | If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | | | | | Thank you in advance for doing your part today. Your contributions do not go unnoticed. Harris-Walz HQ | | | ---|---|---

name: Bob Casey
subject: This note
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BOB CASEY FOR SENATE INC
body:
# [](https://go.bobcasey.com/go/181?t=1&akid=3905%2E552475%2EqP1qZ8)
Hi Peter — my Campaign Manager, Tiernan, just showed me her to-do list. With more and more to get done each day as our campaign kicks into high gear in these final three months, I wanted to help her out by reaching out to our top supporters.
**[Will you help make sure our campaign has the resources necessary to compete against Dave McCormick by chipping in $5 or any amount today?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20240818-3?recurring=1&refcode=em2024818-3&refcode2=3905_552475_qP1qZ8&akid=3905%2E552475%2EqP1qZ8)**
Here’s the note she shared with me:
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20240818-3?recurring=1&refcode=em2024818-3&refcode2=3905_552475_qP1qZ8&akid=3905%2E552475%2EqP1qZ8)
This is the toughest race of my career, and we’re almost certain to see record-breaking ad spending in Pennsylvania. This is a critical battleground, and with GOP billionaires blanketing the Commonwealth with dark money and the active support of Trump and Vance, we need to keep up our fundraising.
The only way we’ll be able to execute every part of our campaign plan and stop the GOP from buying this Senate seat is with your help. I’m hoping you can help Tiernan check off some of these important items on her to-do list by chipping in right now.
**[Whatever you can give will help us reach every corner of the Commonwealth, and win this thing.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20240818-3?recurring=1&refcode=em2024818-3&refcode2=3905_552475_qP1qZ8&akid=3905%2E552475%2EqP1qZ8)**
_Please use the links in this email to start a weekly donation through ActBlue._
[Donate $15 »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20240818-3?recurring=1&amount=15&refcode=em2024818-3-el&refcode2=3905_552475_qP1qZ8&akid=3905%2E552475%2EqP1qZ8) [Donate $25 »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20240818-3?recurring=1&amount=25&refcode=em2024818-3-el&refcode2=3905_552475_qP1qZ8&akid=3905%2E552475%2EqP1qZ8) [Donate $50 »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20240818-3?recurring=1&amount=50&refcode=em2024818-3-el&refcode2=3905_552475_qP1qZ8&akid=3905%2E552475%2EqP1qZ8) [Donate $100 »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20240818-3?recurring=1&amount=100&refcode=em2024818-3-el&refcode2=3905_552475_qP1qZ8&akid=3905%2E552475%2EqP1qZ8) [Donate $250 »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20240818-3?recurring=1&amount=250&refcode=em2024818-3-el&refcode2=3905_552475_qP1qZ8&akid=3905%2E552475%2EqP1qZ8) [Other amount »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20240818-3?recurring=1&refcode=em2024818-3&refcode2=3905_552475_qP1qZ8&akid=3905%2E552475%2EqP1qZ8)
---
Thank you, Peter, for all you do.
With gratitude,
Bob Casey

name: Team McBride
subject: Not everyone knows this
disclaimer_text: Paid for by McBride for Delaware
body:
We need your help.
#
We know that Sarah is an effective legislator who can get big things done:
* Sarah led the fight to successfully pass paid medical and family leave.
* She made healthcare more affordable and available.
* She took on the NRA and fought for the most significant gun safety package in Delaware history.

But not _everyone_ does.
**That’s why we need YOUR help to make calls to voters and spread the word about why Sarah is the best person to represent Delaware in Congress.** [**Can you sign up to phonebank with us before the September 10th primary?**](https://www.mobilize.us/sarahmcbride/event/660866/?utm_source=em20240818-1-1028)
[****](https://www.mobilize.us/sarahmcbride/event/660866/?utm_source=em20240818-1)
**[Sign up »](https://www.mobilize.us/sarahmcbride/event/660866/?utm_source=em20240818-1-1028)**
We will train you on all the tools we use to make calls. All you’ll need is a good internet connection, your computer, a phone, and your enthusiasm!
See you there,
Team McBride

clean_body: We need your help. We know that Sarah is an effective legislator who can get big things done: Sarah led the fight to successfully pass paid medical and family leave. She made healthcare more affordable and available. She took on the NRA and fought for the most significant gun safety package in Delaware history. But not everyone does. That’s why we need YOUR help to make calls to voters and spread the word about why Sarah is the best person to represent Delaware in Congress. We will train you on all the tools we use to make calls. All you’ll need is a good internet connection, your computer, a phone, and your enthusiasm! See you there, Team McBride

**Projection** is a psychological defense mechanism where a person avoids recognizing their own faults by projecting them onto someone else. This literally defines Democrats today. Consider this... 1) Kamala Harris says Donald Trump is **_"afraid"_** to debate her despite the fact she can't speak off the cuff for more than 30 seconds before she spirals into a circular word salad of meaningless nonsense or erupts into a fit of obnoxious cackling. It's why Harris won't do interviews and why she is "afraid" to debate Donald Trump. 2) Tim Walz says JD Vance is _**"weird"** _despite the fact that Walz, as governor, put tampons in boys' bathrooms and went to Communist China for his honeymoon. Now, that's weird. 3) And now the Harris-Walz campaign is accusing Donald Trump and JD Vance of being **"_weak on border security"_ **despite Harris vowing to eliminate ICE and Walz vowing to start a "ladder factory" to help illegal immigrants invade our country. The Democrats have officially become the **Party of Projection**. And now, with the support of the legacy media, America will become the victim of their evil PSYOP unless we fight back! Here's how ... Democrats pushed Joe Biden out of the race to achieve one primary goal – to protect their Senate candidates in down-ballot races. You see, Democrats believe they must have a "Senate firewall" to stop President Trump's second-term agenda if he wins the White House. **Therefore, there is no better way to make them pay than to DEFEAT the very Senate candidates they seek to protect.** **[**Please take action to help defeat liberal Senate candidates and elect strong conservatives!**](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=10122d54177c46799e32d333352a43df&_e=YhDoGyQ7Lxmwk_WemQGUPjKgXQLo5YlZ7asU6b4LqCI_0nICp4nfE8BWUFjqiPM_MvP-yQNvbc_HTYqZQ34fcvrwprUsKQnxY4PIs4XnZ9De6tzfJooetov9Ry6wh8W2C2ftvnycIlwOz_QeNjJ0Vd7swb9ydaHKZNORZgFgXaWUvnbsaDPKgKoqmDuJm5wYmglGGVknnoOLxgJBV0Zt6mU-BHeyzZP2XMB5zJzC9HEZtzwrcZSq1DeKiuhvgajh)** We have identified eight battleground Senate races where your help is urgently needed.

The most expensive vehicle to operate in Michigan in 2024 is your shopping cart thanks to the Democrats. And while pockets are pinched, the Democrats are trying to force you to buy an electric vehicle. _Better get a long extension cord!_ My opponent Shanghai Slotkin wants to ban gas and diesel cars! Her EV mandates will kill jobs across our auto industry. _That’s wrong for Michigan and wrong for America._ _[It’s clear as day that the radical Democrats are out of touch. They don’t know what it's like to live paycheck to paycheck or to fill up their gas tank.](http://links.rogersforsenate.com/u/click?_t=b90de78796ce4ce596523293a2b8ff82&_m=caee5d50796d4afb86ea7b3cf47b7877&_e=TsrsGOfleqYtmdxtbIoI0m_ilDCCiOm5OIR0-POnj1Cvy3wKo0Ztpc7O7aOCec1_HjK2q3LLfD0yqj7xSDCa_b6oWblj1NvIzVADZDJkuSBqUotEItf1-Z8LFYjI7qxUvrs812L_Ifqs8HmM_Qm7ZPPcL9oZPogAfl2dE2IJMIlRCgYvgL_ZXlOWzbf3zex97J8UDgyiphbM-H5lBLQGIjx25hk1KS2RHL1pFZd_K3pzddt_v3-w3kKGiuyy0iudEv9VskaLqTbL_FrLm6qs0brLiWFoyFyt7PWpiNmURLKcU87mjjodB_IHZmdUm9h-ocBZLDaTMxWFWPT0GJgjVrEMW2MaE8Fz3K8HWqV4g209v5KoMLwY_JiAXpNdd6anh_s1CvTIYyF5OPX-MoVgv_ruKZdo1rdMU9L6b8LRd5pjLSCXyyGfJ6CTldCCKytw-Xn8SvAMoT09phDjetzVEbNNGW2T7IA3g-jI3sgZ5DDhtjQ-BpVrgH1CIsNosBeo)_ **[It’s time we change Washington, and put hard working American families first. clean_body: As JD and I said on our campaign stop together, it’s time we change Washington, and put hard working American families first. Don’t you agree? | | | We don't want you to leave! But we understand if you don't want to receive these emails anymore. Click to unsubscribe. Friend, I was so happy to join future Vice President JD Vance on the campaign trail in Kent County, Michigan, where we got to speak with workers at a family-owned trucking company. I’m proud to support the blue collar Americans who built this country, and I’m running to represent them in the U.S. Senate! With an America First majority in the Senate and President Trump and JD Vance in the White House, we will Get America Back On Track. The most expensive vehicle to operate in Michigan in 2024 is your shopping cart thanks to the Democrats. And while pockets are pinched, the Democrats are trying to force you to buy an electric vehicle. Better get a long extension cord! My opponent Shanghai Slotkin wants to ban gas and diesel cars! Her EV mandates will kill jobs across our auto industry. That’s wrong for Michigan and wrong for America. Thanks for your support, Mike Rogers PS – I’m raising money for President Trump and JD Vance in addition to my own Senate campaign. | | | | | I’m now neck-and-neck in the polls with my radical Democrat opponent. President Trump and I are in a strong position to WIN Michigan and flip the Senate majority. But I’m not taking anything for granted. It’s time to put the pedal to the metal and work even harder. Thank you for your generous support. Together, we will Get America Back on Track. Paid for by Rogers for Senate. | | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.commailto:mark@convert-digital.com. Guy Reschenthaler. Vance didn't waste any time in continuing to denigrate Gov. Tim Walz's honorable service to our country and promoting the extreme Trump-Vance Project 2025 agenda, which would gut the benefits and healthcare our veterans have earned. As a retired U.S. Army Major and candidate for Congress, I'm not letting these attacks go unanswered. And I'll continue to hold my opponent accountable for his vote against the PACT Act, which provided support for veterans exposed to toxic substances. I'm proud to share the ticket with Kamala Harris and Tim Walz, who truly respect our service. We're on the ground here, doing the hard work to win one of the key districts needed to keep Pennsylvania blue. **But with Vance campaigning in this district, we must fight back. clean_body: | | Friends, it's Chris Dziados. I'm following up on the important goal I set after JD Vance came to PA-14, the House district in battleground Pennsylvania that I'm running to flip blue. A visit he used to further denigrate Gov. Tim Walz's service to our country. As a U.S. Army veteran, I'm proud to be a part of this Democratic ticket. After Vance's stop here, I set a goal of raising $14,000 this weekend to double down on our efforts to get out the vote for Harris/Walz and to flip this seat. = If you've saved your payment info with ActBlue Express, your contribution will process immediately. Otherwise, you'll be directed to a donation page.= Thank you for standing with us. \- Chris Original Message: Friends, Yesterday, JD Vance came to PA-14, where I'm fighting to unseat one of MAGA's most extreme members, Rep. Guy Reschenthaler. Vance didn't waste any time in continuing to denigrate Gov. Tim Walz's honorable service to our country and promoting the extreme Trump-Vance Project 2025 agenda, which would gut the benefits and healthcare our veterans have earned. As a retired U.S. Army Major and candidate for Congress, I'm not letting these attacks go unanswered. And I'll continue to hold my opponent accountable for his vote against the PACT Act, which provided support for veterans exposed to toxic substances. I'm proud to share the ticket with Kamala Harris and Tim Walz, who truly respect our service. We're on the ground here, doing the hard work to win one of the key districts needed to keep Pennsylvania blue. But with Vance campaigning in this district, we must fight back. That's why I've set an emergency goal to raise $14,000 this weekend. We need every dollar to double down on our efforts to get out the vote for Harris/Walz and win this race. = If you've saved your payment info with ActBlue Express, your contribution will process immediately. Otherwise, you'll be directed to a donation page.= Thank you for your support, and to all those who have served, thank you for your sacrifice. In Service, Chris Dziados Major, U.S. Army (Ret.) | Chris Dziados is a proud U.S. Army veteran and the Democratic candidate for Congress in PA's 14th District. His campaign to defeat one of the ultra-right's most extreme members is building some serious momentum. clean_body: When you make a donation to the DLCC, whether it’s $7 or $250, your gift will have a HUGE impact. Not just for yourself, but for your friends, family, and Americans across the country. | | | | | ---|--- 336 million Americans. That’s who you are fighting for when you A lot of times, we talk about how your donation can help power campaigns, provide state Dems with the necessary resources to win, or be the driving force behind defeating extreme Republicans – and, don’t get us wrong, that’s all true. But your donation also helps the hundreds of millions of Americans who may not have the funds to chip in, but are counting on better access to health care, voting, gun safety, LGBTQ+ protections, and so much more. When you make a donation to the DLCC, whether it’s $7 or $250, your gift will have a HUGE impact. Not just for yourself but for your friends, family, and Americans across the country. name: LinebergerforUSCongress
subject: Update from Lineberger for US Congress – August 18th, 2024
body:
Hi Friends of Lineberger for US Congress!

*Get Engaged*. *Stay engaged*. We are down to within the last 79 days
until the election is complete.
October 7th is the last day to register and be able to vote in this
election.
October 21 marks the start of early voting. November 5th is election day!
*What we do now will make all of the difference in the quality of our lives
post-election*.

Big picture items:

500 yard signs have arrived.
I have a list of about 40 people who requested signs from our phone
bank calls and block walks that need to be delivered.
We need to start putting some in key visible places. Neighborhood
yards are better. Prominent corner lots are best.
This is a task that could use some volunteers. If they go to homes,
then we are done.
If we get permission and put them in public places, then we need to
map them to make sure we collect them after the election.

A couple bigger / different events are coming up.

Football Fun with Ernest Lineberger for US Congress on Saturday, September
21st at UNT DATCU stadium.
There is a special promotion where half of the football admission
price goes to LISD LEF (Lewisville Independent School District Educational
Foundation).
We will host a tailgate before the game where we can have our signs
and share our message.
During the game we can sit together in the end zone seating. We are
buying 50 T-shirts to help us stand out.
Here is the link for tickets: https://fevo-enterprise.com/event/LEF
Try to get seating section 312, but any is ok.
Game time is still TBA. I will publish a mobilize when the time is
known (mobilize requires a time).

CCA (Christian Community Action) does a lot of good work in the community
with food pantry, job training, counseling and more. They are having a
fundraising 5K on Saturday, September 28th, in Old Town Lewisville. We are
planning to support. At a minimum, we will show up to run in our
‘Lineberger’ T-shirts. If allowed, we will have a booth where we can share
our message.

Digital Media Campaign is about to kick off. This is the heavy hitter that
is going to get us more exposure than any of our earlier activities. These
are the short ads that show on digital devices to get a free service. We
should be able to get over one million impressions. That will help get our
name recognition up.

Print ads. So far, I have agreed to one quarter page ad in the Cross
Timbers Gazette September issue. I need to approach more outlets like the
Denton Record Chronicle and Texas Tribune (others?) to get their rates.
This is actually more to begin a relationship with the paper, but may help
our name recognition as well.

If any of you want to play a role in any of these activities or efforts, I
can always use the help.

That said, I want to give a huge shout out to all of you who are already
working it! Thank you!
Block Walkers – of the group variety typically on Saturday
mornings, and the regional ones doing it on their own or in small groups.
Phone Bankers – We haven’t had a phone bank event, but we
have trained a crew working it on their own schedule.
Postcards – We bought 10,000 and have handed out 6,750 to be
addressed and mailed so far.
Thank you so much for all you are doing to help in these
efforts!

With that in mind, here is what’s coming up soon.

Sunday, August 18th, 6-7PM, Virtual, Answer the Call with Denton County
Democratic Party

Monday, August 19 – 22, Democratic National Convention, Chicago
(Not going personally, but very excited about it. Should be
good energy!)

Wednesday, August 21st, Flower Mound Area Democrats General Meeting

Thursday, August 22nd, NAIFA Legislative Reception, Addison, TX
This will be a multi-party reception with Insurance and
Finance professionals

Friday, August 23rd, 6:30 - 8:30 PM, Frisco Area Democrats Happy Hour,
Jakes Burgers and Beer, 6195 Main St, Frisco, TX

Saturday, August 24th, Block Walking, 9 AM to Noon, Flower Mound, Precinct
3139
Meeting at Walmart Neighborhood Market, 2800 Flower Mound Rd,

clean_body: Hi Friends of Lineberger for US Congress! Get Engaged. Stay engaged. We are down to within the last 79 days until the election is complete. October 7th is the last day to register and be able to vote in this election. October 21 marks the start of early voting. November 5th is election day! What we do now will make all of the difference in the quality of our lives post-election. Big picture items: 500 yard signs have arrived. I have a list of about 40 people who requested signs from our phone bank calls and block walks that need to be delivered. We need to start putting some in key visible places. Neighborhood yards are better. Prominent corner lots are best. This is a task that could use some volunteers. If they go to homes, then we are done. If we get permission and put them in public places, then we need to map them to make sure we collect them after the election. A couple bigger / different events are coming up. Football Fun with Ernest Lineberger for US Congress on Saturday, September 21st at UNT DATCU stadium. There is a special promotion where half of the football admission price goes to LISD LEF (Lewisville Independent School District Educational Foundation). We will host a tailgate before the game where we can have our signs and share our message. During the game we can sit together in the end zone seating. We are buying 50 T-shirts to help us stand out. Here is the link for tickets: Try to get seating section 312, but any is ok. Game time is still TBA. I will publish a mobilize when the time is known (mobilize requires a time). CCA (Christian Community Action) does a lot of good work in the community with food pantry, job training, counseling and more. They are having a fundraising 5K on Saturday, September 28th, in Old Town Lewisville. We are planning to support. At a minimum, we will show up to run in our ‘Lineberger’ T-shirts. If allowed, we will have a booth where we can share our message. Digital Media Campaign is about to kick off. This is the heavy hitter that is going to get us more exposure than any of our earlier activities. These are the short ads that show on digital devices to get a free service. We should be able to get over one million impressions. That will help get our name recognition up. Print ads. So far, I have agreed to one quarter page ad in the Cross Timbers Gazette September issue. I need to approach more outlets like the Denton Record Chronicle and Texas Tribune (others?) to get their rates. This is actually more to begin a relationship with the paper, but may help our name recognition as well. If any of you want to play a role in any of these activities or efforts, I can always use the help. That said, I want to give a huge shout out to all of you who are already working it! Thank you! Block Walkers – of the group variety typically on Saturday mornings, and the regional ones doing it on their own or in small groups. Phone Bankers – We haven’t had a phone bank event, but we have trained a crew working it on their own schedule. Postcards – We bought 10,000 and have handed out 6,750 to be addressed and mailed so far. Thank you so much for all you are doing to help in these efforts! With that in mind, here is what’s coming up soon. Sunday, August 18th, 6-7PM, Virtual, Answer the Call with Denton County Democratic Party Monday, August 19 – 22, Democratic National Convention, Chicago (Not going personally, but very excited about it. Should be good energy!) Wednesday, August 21st, Flower Mound Area Democrats General Meeting Thursday, August 22nd, NAIFA Legislative Reception, Addison, TX This will be a multi-party reception with Insurance and Finance professionals Friday, August 23rd, 6:30 - 8:30 PM, Frisco Area Democrats Happy Hour, Jakes Burgers and Beer, 6195 Main St, Frisco, TX Saturday, August 24th, Block Walking, 9 AM to Noon, Flower Mound, Precinct 3139 Meeting at Walmart Neighborhood Market, 2800 Flower Mound Rd, Flower Mound, TX 75022 Link to RSVP and details: Saturday, August 24th, LBJ Obama Dinner, DCDP, Hilton Garden Inn, Lewisville Sunday, August 25th, Morning, Visit and worship with another Church somewhere in our district We get to see more aspects of our community and they get to know us better. Monday, August 26th, Receive and begin answering League of Women Voters Candidate Questionnaire for submission no later than August 30th Also, a Dallas Morning News Questionnaire is coming this week Saturday, August 31st, Block Walking, 9 AM to Noon, Revisit Castle Hills, Precinct 2096 Meeting at Castle Hills Community Center, 2501 Queen Margaret Dr, Lewisville TX Link to RSVP and details: To donate, just go to the regular donation link on the campaign website, . Everything you do to support us in our efforts to get our message out, support our campaign financially, and your own personal efforts to share our message are making a difference. Thank you! Giving Voters a Better Choice and Hope for a Better Future! Ernest Lineberger Your Democratic Nominee for US House for TX CD26.

name: Rashida Tlaib
subject: RE: Sign on to support public health alternatives to policing:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rashida Tlaib for Congress
body:
To keep our communities safe from police violence and create true public safety for all of us, we need policies like the People's Response Act | | | [](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.X6XUC7u8ppFLNtMO_55SZlNseb7gEYIOhm_EWnhzEOZKmTtnV3k2h4V2x_O3H7rdW2az5rgktBwzxQ8Ml9Wgkmv85qW-UsBonL4KRa0bcNqdICU6T3NBDdNIZG7w7wEWc-6kVThmY0fQknoUXPWx2l1whPjLVZguvCcd1K8deQLEVrbYfpGhFs4svuU3-d5Isy8WjbqJ0ds4L20DyEw5DZRkVpcPgiWrpJoddXparKNkHJLfW92GcNYVjmeyYQHgLLjPuHvMfNFOnvedckLnvTo8HYCHxVAHWp22pnTj2Gu43IlF1Cwma35yjyNyLvNYGPqcN8q8daCbfgrq5al8bHANwnoNSxBsx7Kqb2h_pAs/490/pWUjrI87TFWWW4vuqS1N4Q/h0/h001.B3rVSmi2Z9xYHB2e1yVpHKinc0y7DZV8yJI6ATDr9CQ)
---
Friend, After Sonya Massey reached out for help last month, a police officer shot and murdered her in her own home. She should still be alive today. Many Black and marginalized Americans avoid calling the police when they’re undergoing difficult emergencies, because they fear police violence. Sonya Massey knew this, which is why after she called 911 during a mental health crisis, she asked police to not hurt her once they arrived. Her mother also previously told 911 dispatchers that Sonya was not dangerous, asking them not to send any police officers to Sonya’s home and saying "I'm scared of the police." **To save lives, we need alternative crisis responses that center care and safety -- not armed police who regularly kill Black Americans.** Instead of punitive and violent responses to crises, appropriately trained and unarmed health experts should be sent to support people experiencing health emergencies. That’s part of how we address the urgent crisis of racist police violence. [**I’m a co-sponsor of Rep. Cori Bush’s _a_ , which re-envisions public safety and invests in public health alternatives to policing. Will you join me by signing on in support of this legislation?**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoUsWLkUMWlo_0JmZttSlm38fpUT9zwDeUV848vbsvJkoDoc0_X-JrXvGQGWIwM3A6u6ZyGf6U53_URSs8tj5IjphwpcOSCQl8uMWC7jMVER-XJdrL7FF7gje0w-V39oXcspKLhasdeTSn4BicdAvxnAMOFZdvF9_iuLPusQ_5jBY6ithDbcHggy8xCbPtMEyErQwdfQwZH-HPdHUoRIxNs_0pn4xqmqqUPFvYD3Rw-6ASlVO5lHrrNvCBsVVdrUqTy8yVqSxvfNX5a2HGqSW-zEUc2o7nv4OK1xcTxk5D90Rr054t_M9RcIQr3-dNPggiDc-jRkH_aGGUvO0oKPpmdpxG7bUL_ZksUcJSj0X_mFrJyG7XRQNf-a-Q82JicUDZw/490/pWUjrI87TFWWW4vuqS1N4Q/h1/h001._k5ITFZKcyO-rDvA8rvtGWz2CFXtk9krgPk6Ea95-b8) | [SIGN ON](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoUsWLkUMWlo_0JmZttSlm38fpUT9zwDeUV848vbsvJkoDoc0_X-JrXvGQGWIwM3A6rcljOTR6weaqJDKSu13YiwEPFJubBJ39wSzCv3GD7JZJmIWGiSrJHBfVCX3mD5jh_SzfF-uK5xo_osivzgjYNct8h3tz0XQw1OXJOmLSmnf2DI-lNYKeuyhOD-xtHiOd6EGG8RmYZgZK5DPdIE8FizAbWZqAtI7zQcWGkcpIstmUkrMNLMNX3quuNRrKxXzR_ExA42KHkY1FB8fLcN1cRrjVxFAyuqOUWEqtuRwWw6ckxwkveNyZgdcDt-yjgwKzJBjPjMYopvYMXGH_vbNovTb87R9xCp2MXvENu1vUJq-L8vZzW7iG1KIS2QCNngasA/490/pWUjrI87TFWWW4vuqS1N4Q/h2/h001.sJdRWH0aAQyDvkRBjgVZVm2pHfwPucrVeWTaBs__Inc)
---
In Congress, Cori Bush and I have advocated against ever-growing spending on police and military budgets, instead calling for much-needed investments in marginalized communities. **We understand that spending more on police budgets doesn’t keep our communities safe. In fact, it keeps Black and brown communities in fear of regular harassment and violence.**
That’s why we need policies like the _People's Response Act_ , which would:
* Create a Division on Community Safety within the Department of Health and Human Services to **coordinate non-carceral, non-punitive, health-centered investments in public safety**.
* Launch a **f****ederal first responders unit** to support states and local governments with emergency health crises.
* Provide $11 billion in grant funding for community-based organizations and state and local governments to **fund public safety and improve crisis response**.
* Establish a $2.5 billion First Responder Hiring Grant to create thousands of jobs and **provide funding for governments and organizations to hire emergency first responders** such as licensed social workers, mental health counselors, substance use counselors, and peer support specialists.

My sister in service Congresswoman Cori Bush has been calling to end the harms of our racist criminal legal system since she was on the streets of the Ferguson Uprising as an activist and a nurse. Cori herself was violently brutalized by police while trying to help a woman with a medical emergency at a protest.
Her lived experience, and the experiences of Black people across the country, shows why we must move funds away from state-sanctioned violence and instead invest in real public safety.
[**Please add your name in support of the _People's Response Act_ to help keep our communities safe from police violence and create true public safety for all of us.**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoUsWLkUMWlo_0JmZttSlm38fpUT9zwDeUV848vbsvJkoDoc0_X-JrXvGQGWIwM3A6o0gWUOyNU4AotAODvTrTSNV7C5uGrUX6woERTpwDd3w3OMFlpJGEP1eUCpAMQD0tOQxR06s90s135KvS3-qA0JE5-dtsU0Ct7IdvQxTz6OlDRvRcUpj9KRYCaekkE3v2qFkcm7NEIN5CMH-etmkP9-vzxCyulUOfFZVCFxUXBXQykmEsHRbmk9P0Jrkm6TzczZLsnqJ5INhcV-226I4pFrHTc7IJrLOwueTbH0YtO6fuWrFsn9BtTOq_04jok3zZruWgAcQQzHn9P0IfzB7geQx9P5uCr9DLdh_KeMyzmliGk3ShDrYfG5rx8s9dH1_EQ/490/pWUjrI87TFWWW4vuqS1N4Q/h3/h001.WkS8g8CGzwB3Y6LMegT2CPdqL5P5bIro-cwoqH5ZUzc)
Together, we’ll keep fighting back against systemic racism and dehumanization. Together, we can build a more just criminal legal system and a world that truly values people’s safety and well-being.
In solidarity,
Rashida
* * *
