name: Ali For Congress
subject: An Amazing Week in D12
body:
News from the campaign trail and upcoming events.
| | **Can't see this message?_[View in a browser](https://shoutout.wix.com/so/d6P5d3G5H/c?w=2HzjaWz9fvPaVRK8wyPRf6oBQZgU3IXb1lxB5pMqq3Q.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9zaG91dG91dC53aXguY29tL3NvL2Q2UDVkM0c1SD9sYW5ndWFnZVRhZz1lbiIsIm0iOiJtYWlsIiwiYyI6IjI4NmFmOTdkLTczMWQtNDc2Mi04ZGI5LWVkMDA2MmI0NzNkYyJ9)_**
---
| | |
---
| |
# Updates from Team Ali
---
| |
---
| | It's been a busy week on the campaign trail! We have 79 days to the most important election of our lifetime and we need to finish strong! I will continue to fight for every vote, in every corner of our district! If you haven't made a contribution yet, it is more important than ever that you give what you can to help us take back the 12th District!
---
| | |
---
| |
---
|
### Doors win wars!
###
We spent time with the Trump Force 47 Captains and The Turning Point Action volunteers knocking doors for President Trump and our amazing slate of republican candidates.
---
| [**JOIN TRUMP FORCE 47**](https://shoutout.wix.com/so/d6P5d3G5H/c?w=x3ua8-SN4W9TX0TUV5FhePXJAyFY9Wnk_vkBEmxNvNU.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly90cnVtcGZvcmNlNDcuY29tLyIsInIiOiIwODUwNTdlYi1mNjYyLTRmMTAtZmQxMi05ZTdhODk4MGI0ZTgiLCJtIjoibWFpbCIsImMiOiIyODZhZjk3ZC03MzFkLTQ3NjItOGRiOS1lZDAwNjJiNDczZGMifQ)
---
| | |
---
| |
### Backing the Blue with RWGC
I was honored to lead the Republican Women of Greater Charlotte's Back The Blue Luncheon in prayer. Joe Gamaldi the VP of the National Fraternal Order of Police did an amazing job filling us in on how we can support our men and women in law enforcement.
---
| [**Learn more about the Fraternal Order of Police**](https://shoutout.wix.com/so/d6P5d3G5H/c?w=b5rnTcNrKhl8SFVvK3l4ij8BYZxCIpoIZMapDNnRFK4.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9mb3AubmV0LyIsInIiOiIxNzkzNjc1Yi1hZjg4LTQ5YTQtOWEwOS1lMTk2ZGNmNDQ2NGQiLCJtIjoibWFpbCIsImMiOiIyODZhZjk3ZC03MzFkLTQ3NjItOGRiOS1lZDAwNjJiNDczZGMifQ)
---
|
---
| | |
---
| |
---
|
### Moms For Liberty Back to School Supply Giveaway
###
Moms for Liberty sponsored a wonderful back-to-school supply drive that allowed us to talk with the voters in west Charlotte. More and more, black voters are realizing that conservatives share their values and want to improve their community!
---
| [**Moms for Liberty**](https://shoutout.wix.com/so/d6P5d3G5H/c?w=LkflFSoIQZP8_e_iZVB9MDOTqW0gl7tQfAp_YCMq8TQ.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9wb3J0YWwubW9tc2ZvcmxpYmVydHkub3JnL2NoYXB0ZXJzL21lY2tsZW5idXJnLWNvdW50eS1uYy8iLCJyIjoiYTg5MmRmN2EtOWY1Yy00ODkwLTI3ODQtNTA1ODA0NWMwNTQyIiwibSI6Im1haWwiLCJjIjoiMjg2YWY5N2QtNzMxZC00NzYyLThkYjktZWQwMDYyYjQ3M2RjIn0)
---
| |
### Stonewall Jackson Apts. Back to School
West Blvd Ministry & Vizion Church Back To School Neighborhood Cookout at Stonewall Jackson Apartments was a huge success. Thanks to Bart and his team for the work they are doing to support families!
---
| [**Learn more about West Blvd. Ministry**](https://shoutout.wix.com/so/d6P5d3G5H/c?w=SkLmOzAOeKzNosBMG6HY107FUzJtREvuk5LooPNiwJM.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly93ZXN0Ymx2ZG1pbmlzdHJ5Lm9yZy8iLCJyIjoiZDJmZGYxMWMtZDhlYi00NjVlLWJiZWMtMzRkOWQ5NWYzNTVmIiwibSI6Im1haWwiLCJjIjoiMjg2YWY5N2QtNzMxZC00NzYyLThkYjktZWQwMDYyYjQ3M2RjIn0)
---
|
---
| |
---
|
### Ali for Congress Smoke Shop Tour
In our effort to meet voters where they are we kicked off our Smoke Shop Tour at Natural Vibes Smoke Shop! Thanks to Shop owner K Breezy and Carlos from Superia Ent. for organizing a great event1
---
| [**Natural Vibes Smoke Shop**](https://shoutout.wix.com/so/d6P5d3G5H/c?w=x4bZcWKzHQFUR64hupmhzA-VDvPXusAxlmT9GrUWnkU.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9uYXR1cmFsdmliZXNtb2tlc2hvcC5jb20vIiwiciI6ImQ2YjZiYjNkLTcyMDItNGY2NS1hNDcyLTU2NWQ1M2I3NjNlYyIsIm0iOiJtYWlsIiwiYyI6IjI4NmFmOTdkLTczMWQtNDc2Mi04ZGI5LWVkMDA2MmI0NzNkYyJ9)
---
| |
### The Park Church
I was humbled to be recognized at the Park Church. Thanks to our RNC Committeewoman Kysha Brassington for joining me and helping the voters of Charlotte see Republicans front and center in their communities.
---
| [**Learn more about The Park Church**](https://shoutout.wix.com/so/d6P5d3G5H/c?w=uEWUrUuRJ7VZd5dbW2IgnU94GdhuxWXA71uJatvx3Bk.)

| | UPCOMING EVENTS

We have 79 days to the most important election of our lifetime and we need to finish strong! I will continue to fight for every vote, in every corner of our district! If you haven't made a contribution yet, it is more important than ever that you give what you can to help us take back the 12th District! | | | | | | Doors win wars! We spent time with the Trump Force 47 Captains and The Turning Point Action volunteers knocking doors for President Trump and our amazing slate of republican candidates. | | | | | | Backing the Blue with RWGC I was honored to lead the Republican Women of Greater Charlotte's Back The Blue Luncheon in prayer. Joe Gamaldi the VP of the National Fraternal Order of Police did an amazing job filling us in on how we can support our men and women in law enforcement. | | | | | | | | Moms For Liberty Back to School Supply Giveaway Moms for Liberty sponsored a wonderful back-to-school supply drive that allowed us to talk with the voters in west Charlotte. More and more, black voters are realizing that conservatives share their values and want to improve their community! | | | Stonewall Jackson Apts. Back to School West Blvd Ministry & Vizion Church Back To School Neighborhood Cookout at Stonewall Jackson Apartments was a huge success. Thanks to Bart and his team for the work they are doing to support families! | | | | | Ali for Congress Smoke Shop Tour In our effort to meet voters where they are we kicked off our Smoke Shop Tour at Natural Vibes Smoke Shop! body:
There’s one more thing you should know about Greg Gianforte...

Ryan Busse puts principles over politics. If you’d like to unsubscribe, [click here.](https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/KuMB1syMs0W9O3v5MuCvqQ2?unsubscribedata=d6WRD%2BqTkBpnKptUEhaaJ3PvEFGydwjh3pe6CAQCjZ7kSIRThh4zFQCabYf6%2BaTG0QQQ20E1kLbjibOXml8qz073JhVXuQEFFOKEef8W%2BcG1CX9NctOFGKSh6QVVyBMdFRs2T87vEp1F59NyUtF1DTqnFKi2%2BkQiuRYJHosLjOnBoVrkLrnl2eGYDQOrHkDt%2BpGkC0%2FGeDrzfa1k9t0yRERSaWiK7GXoUsELijWMrmB3l61JrH91XTzebQAqtvNfygyNQVcpV5L%2FA3IY2Ky4ZyROChJ79%2FTL%2BWrhwr8NETIjTjfrsIMIpVuTL4cc31%2B2i%2FXHvP0tx%2FuM0w%2B5TGc4scMo7Kv9rUAnq7kF%2BXEDlnKJdLzmjLyty%2B68aBPO%2BdMBivZIG%2BKBrkd8YP3tHfbpX5mHa%2BpIPSyOx9fJIj2JwzxP5yCkqDLKlB3I3xUpSPex)

Peter, you’ve heard a lot about Greg Gianforte. As Governor, he’s spent his time:
* Raising property taxes on hardworking families while lowering his own
* Gutting our public schools and locking up our public lands
* Flying around in his private jet to be anywhere BUT Montana

But there’s one more thing you should know about Greg... **_he’s just plain weird._** [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/91072665/492624906/818021185?amount=10&source=SBD_RB_EM_FR_081824_1_1_Weird_r&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDgzNDciLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNTUxZDE5MzEtYTI1ZC1lZjExLTk5MWEtNjA0NWJkZGJmYzRiIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=u4eztuoHLUr8xSxUbhYb6mdVOoDZt5gBL4TAJpcbPUY=) If you know what’s going on here, give us a shout. Because we certainly can’t figure it out here at Busse HQ. We do know one thing for sure — and that’s what Gianforte **_ISN’T_** doing: representing the interests of everyday Montanans. The good news? While he’s out vacationing at one of his mansions or flying around the country in his private jet, we’re putting boots on the ground across Montana to give him the boot this November — but I need your help to make it happen. [So, on this special meat day, will you commit to chipping in $10 or any amount to take back the place we call home this November?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/91072666/492624907/818021185?amount=10&source=SBD_RB_EM_FR_081824_1_1_Weird_r&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDgzNDciLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNTUxZDE5MzEtYTI1ZC1lZjExLTk5MWEtNjA0NWJkZGJmYzRiIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=u4eztuoHLUr8xSxUbhYb6mdVOoDZt5gBL4TAJpcbPUY=) | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process now.

For more than 25 years, Ryan was a successful gun industry executive. But he also saw how unchecked extremism could take away American freedoms and even jeopardize our democracy. Ryan sees the same thing happening to Montana: wealthy extremist Greg Gianforte bought his seat with his own millions, and now he’s raising our taxes in order to give tax breaks to corporations, making Montana unaffordable, defunding our public schools, locking up our public lands, hijacking our freedoms, and rigging the system for the rich.

Ryan chose Raph Graybill as his running mate because no Montanan has done more to protect constitutional rights and freedoms from Greg Gianforte. Since Gianforte became governor, Raph has blocked more than a dozen different unconstitutional laws that invaded Montanans’ constitutional rights.

**Ryan and Raph are running as champions for ALL Montanans and to Get Our Montana Back!**

clean_body: There’s one more thing you should know about Greg Gianforte... Ryan Busse puts principles over politics. If you’d like to unsubscribe, | | Peter, you’ve heard a lot about Greg Gianforte. As Governor, he’s spent his time: Raising property taxes on hardworking families while lowering his own Gutting our public schools and locking up our public lands Flying around in his private jet to be anywhere BUT Montana But there’s one more thing you should know about Greg... he’s just plain weird. = If you know what’s going on here, give us a shout. Because we certainly can’t figure it out here at Busse HQ. We do know one thing for sure — and that’s what Gianforte ISN’T doing: representing the interests of everyday Montanans. The good news? While he’s out vacationing at one of his mansions or flying around the country in his private jet, we’re putting boots on the ground across Montana to give him the boot this November — but I need your help to make it happen. = | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process now. | = | = | = | = | = | = — Ryan Busse | | | ---|---|--- = For more than 25 years, Ryan was a successful gun industry executive. But he also saw how unchecked extremism could take away American freedoms and even jeopardize our democracy. Ryan sees the same thing happening to Montana: wealthy extremist Greg Gianforte bought his seat with his own millions, and now he’s raising our taxes in order to give tax breaks to corporations, making Montana unaffordable, defunding our public schools, locking up our public lands, hijacking our freedoms, and rigging the system for the rich. Ryan chose Raph Graybill as his running mate because no Montanan has done more to protect constitutional rights and freedoms from Greg Gianforte. Since Gianforte became governor, Raph has blocked more than a dozen different unconstitutional laws that invaded Montanans’ constitutional rights. Ryan and Raph are running as champions for ALL Montanans and to Get Our Montana Back! | = = PAID FOR BY BUSSE FOR MONTANA • DEMOCRAT • PO BOX 8537 • KALISPELL, MT 59904 If you would like to unsubscribe, click here: To receive less email from us, . name: Lisa's iPhone
subject: Need your help by TONIGHT
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Lisa Blunt Rochester for Senate
body:
Hi folks, it’s Lisa.
I’m so thankful for everyone who has donated to help my campaign reach its mid-month goal, but we still need to raise $25,000 by midnight **TONIGHT**. If we don’t meet our goal, we won’t have the resources we need to fight back against GOP attacks on my campaign.
Historically, Black women only raise one-third of what their white counterparts raise. And my self-funding opponent will write blank checks to boost his campaign on a dime, while we rely on grassroots supporters like you.
With a _one-seat majority_ in the Democratic Senate, we need to have the resources to make sure we defend and expand our majority in November.

So much is at stake in this election – and we can’t slow down now. That’s why I’m asking:
**Will you please step up and support my campaign right now? I’m attaching a unique link below for you to donate any amount before midnight:**

**[https://secure.actblue.com/donate/LBRAugust2024MidMonth=dpwillis67@gmail.com](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/91073055/492626164/-843060894?&amount=other&source=LOC_EM_FR_2024.08.18_LBR-MM1_B1_F1_S1_C1_30OP_N-T1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85Mjg3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiNDUwYzM5Ny1hMzVkLWVmMTEtOTkxYS02MDQ1YmRkYmZjNGIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=elRdP-C1mJlo5tn_mhbVk86wsEwGn1ZirYwsaNZLrp4=)**

Lisa

name: Ryan Feldman
subject: Our strategy to win
body:
Behind the scenes

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/91073300/492627011/-1463099547?refcode=-header-&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDMxMTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNTdmN2YxZDctYTQ1ZC1lZjExLTk5MWEtNjA0NWJkZGJmYzRiIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=rtYZr36C5NuW5e16ayQ90vdV9R0Olj5FxPjw3GpHJUM=) | Hey Peter, If you see Team Harder out there knocking on doors, give ‘em a shout! 👋 **[The election is coming up quickly and now is the time to build our support throughout the district before things get super hectic! Can you please rush in a donation so our volunteers have everything they need from clipboards and pens to campaign literature?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/91073301/492627014/-2081705138?&refcode=E9960-20240818-CampaignStrategy-SL-2024Race&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDMxMTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNTdmN2YxZDctYTQ1ZC1lZjExLTk5MWEtNjA0NWJkZGJmYzRiIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=rtYZr36C5NuW5e16ayQ90vdV9R0Olj5FxPjw3GpHJUM=)** **[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/91073303/492627015/-2081705138?&refcode=E9960-20240818-CampaignStrategy-Image-2024Race&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDMxMTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNTdmN2YxZDctYTQ1ZC1lZjExLTk5MWEtNjA0NWJkZGJmYzRiIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=rtYZr36C5NuW5e16ayQ90vdV9R0Olj5FxPjw3GpHJUM=)** Our field strategy is simple (but not easy). We know that the best way to persuade an undecided voter is to talk with them face to face. So, we’ve spent the past year building volunteer teams that will talk to their neighbors about why we need Josh in office. This includes knocking on doors, house parties, phone calls - you name it and we have a volunteer team doing it! It’s so important we tell voters about Josh now since ballots are going out in a little over a month. We cannot let them be misled by the lies our MAGA opponent is spreading. We need them to hear the truth - and it can’t come soon enough! **I’m happy to share that last weekend we had our biggest volunteer day EVER and we spoke to thousands of voters.** But now we need to re-supply our volunteer teams with more resources like pens, clipboards, and campaign lit to reach even more voters before it’s too late. **[We’re counting on your support to make sure we’re successful! Can you please rush in a donation now that ballots are going out to help us win this election?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/91073304/492627017/-2081705138?&refcode=E9960-20240818-CampaignStrategy-SL-2024Race&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDMxMTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNTdmN2YxZDctYTQ1ZC1lZjExLTk5MWEtNjA0NWJkZGJmYzRiIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=rtYZr36C5NuW5e16ayQ90vdV9R0Olj5FxPjw3GpHJUM=)** The election is coming soon - we can’t wait! \- Ryan Feldman
Campaign Manager, Josh Harder
---
* * *
You are receiving this email because Congressman Josh Harder is one of our last lines of defense to protect our democracy against MAGA extremists like Donald Trump and Marjorie Taylor Greene. [**Your support is critical so we can build the grassroots movement we need to win in 2024. Our race will be competitive and Josh doesn't take a dime of corporate PAC money, so please chip in now to our campaign.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/91073307/492627018/-1463099547?refcode=E9960-20240818-CampaignStrategy-footer-2024Race&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDMxMTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNTdmN2YxZDctYTQ1ZC1lZjExLTk5MWEtNjA0NWJkZGJmYzRiIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=rtYZr36C5NuW5e16ayQ90vdV9R0Olj5FxPjw3GpHJUM=) [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/91073309/492627022/-1463099547?refcode=E9960-20240818-CampaignStrategy-footer-2024Race&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDMxMTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNTdmN2YxZDctYTQ1ZC1lZjExLTk5MWEtNjA0NWJkZGJmYzRiIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=rtYZr36C5NuW5e16ayQ90vdV9R0Olj5FxPjw3GpHJUM=) [DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/91073311/492627024/-1463099547?refcode=E9960-20240818-CampaignStrategy-footer-2024Race&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDMxMTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNTdmN2YxZDctYTQ1ZC1lZjExLTk5MWEtNjA0NWJkZGJmYzRiIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=rtYZr36C5NuW5e16ayQ90vdV9R0Olj5FxPjw3GpHJUM=) If you would like to receive fewer emails, we understand. [Click here](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/91073314/492627026/-1814317133?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDMxMTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNTdmN2YxZDctYTQ1ZC1lZjExLTk5MWEtNjA0NWJkZGJmYzRiIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=rtYZr36C5NuW5e16ayQ90vdV9R0Olj5FxPjw3GpHJUM=&emci=4c83393c-9e59-ef11-991a-6045bddbfc4b&emdi=57f7f1d7-a45d-ef11-991a-6045bddbfc4b&ceid=6455652) to sign up for only the most important updates, or you can [unsubscribe](https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/7te8sxLvVUSDWs_e-jVleA2?unsubscribedata=A6IB3aAef7qmO36UoZ7dflPa6MgJFPHyUJq4cM%2B3Sryf1ZZ8oQbiaMWWPXwTRpTuSUKv7GIQSYaiWYKg1sgDkV5BueARSES1TB7SH0YsGMFkirkbGyhJQIA%2F75bMLzxQIETkDe2Cf4rFUc77NmV38GkFQUrKYEUI%2B8G%2FBSGUoORnBgPzn8JhGigNIIi8FpK5G%2B%2B%2F4bK4ePUbpk1O%2Bq5uWTNPbmAfVBljtqTXd%2BLgqyToR1ugBx%2Bzd8%2B%2Bzus3O61ftO%2FSOv2AvKEbMA0nytQqsWCKaH6i%2F9TmMe%2FQ4bxMAmB7slZM6Rl69CWsKHd7FNNnESspHovhcYGlimcJVAqTg%2Bau3fjmYEHG3TMsI7sDJRFq6q%2FsG5oBRC1Rt3pLv76Pmx3r%2BgRGYlbDJBgaj4InwNmV%2B11MXD%2F8nS9So%2FeJ%2FrU7d08y6CYoJ74Fr3P0agiy). body:
Voter Action Project Logo [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-weekly?refcode=081824_2&amount=25]
Kenosha News: Wisconsin Supreme Court reverses previous decision, allows absentee ballot drop boxes [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-democracy?refcode=081824_2&amount=25]
To quote the president, Team: This "is a big f-ing deal".
The Wisconsin Supreme Court made a key pro-voter ruling and reversed its previous two-year-old decision banning absentee ballot drop boxes . This current, liberal-controlled court made the change from the previous, conservative high court, which banned drop boxes in a highly politicized decision after pressure from opponents of voting rights.
Essentially, the 4-3 ruling means that freestanding, mailbox-like drop boxes — which Wisconsin used effectively, safely, and securely in previous elections — can again be used to collect absentee ballots this fall.
Wisconsin's elected officials are thrilled and ready to comply: “ Allowing eligible voters an accessible and secure way to cast a ballot just makes sense ,” Madison Mayor Satya Rhodes-Conway said. She added that “ Madison is ready to follow the law and promote democracy .”
Team: This decision shows how we can win in our fight to defend access to the ballot and increase voter participation across this country. Pitch in $25 or whatever you can today to help defend the use of mail-in ballots, drop boxes, and so many more ways to vote nationwide >> [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-democracy?refcode=081824_2&amount=25]

clean_body: Voter Action Project Logo [] Kenosha News: Wisconsin Supreme Court reverses previous decision, allows absentee ballot drop boxes [] To quote the president, Team: This "is a big f-ing deal". The Wisconsin Supreme Court made a key pro-voter ruling and reversed its previous two-year-old decision banning absentee ballot drop boxes . This current, liberal-controlled court made the change from the previous, conservative high court, which banned drop boxes in a highly politicized decision after pressure from opponents of voting rights. Essentially, the 4-3 ruling means that freestanding, mailbox-like drop boxes — which Wisconsin used effectively, safely, and securely in previous elections — can again be used to collect absentee ballots this fall. Wisconsin's elected officials are thrilled and ready to comply: “ Allowing eligible voters an accessible and secure way to cast a ballot just makes sense ,” Madison Mayor Satya Rhodes-Conway said. She added that “ Madison is ready to follow the law and promote democracy .” Team: This decision shows how we can win in our fight to defend access to the ballot and increase voter participation across this country. Pitch in $25 or whatever you can today to help defend the use of mail-in ballots, drop boxes, and so many more ways to vote nationwide >> [] If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: GIVE $15 NOW ➜ [] GIVE $25 NOW ➜ [] GIVE $50 NOW ➜ [] GIVE $100 NOW ➜ [] GIVE $250 NOW ➜ [] Other Amount [] [] [] [] [] [] Paid for by Integrity First Voter Action Project, www.voteractionproject.org, and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. name: Wes Moore
subject: The Democratic National Convention
body:
Friend,

I’m headed to Chicago to attend the 2024 Democratic National Convention.

But I bet you didn’t know I’ve attended the convention before:

https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wes-em-20240818-1?refcode=em20240818-1 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wes-em-20240818-1?refcode=em20240818-1]

Back in 2008, when I was a commanding officer, I attended and spoke at the Democratic National Convention in Denver in support of Barack Obama.

What I said then about the 2008 election still rings true to this year’s election: This election is not about history, it’s about seizing history and forging a proper course for our country.

We’ve seen the consequences of a Donald Trump presidency and the mockery he has made of our democracy.

We cannot allow a Trump presidency to happen again. We need a commander-in-chief who will protect our freedoms and democracy and bring forth the progress we need to realize the full potential of this country.

When I took my oath of office to defend and protect the United States, I didn’t swear to protect a select few — I swore to protect ALL Americans. If we elect Kamala Harris as our next President, I know she will work to uplift all of our families and neighbors because she will put country over party. It’s how we move our country forward, and it’s how we move Maryland forward.

I am eager to support Kamala Harris and Tim Walz at the 2024 Democratic National Convention. Before I head to Chicago, please make a contribution to support the work I’m doing in Maryland to move progress forward and lead the way for the rest of the country to follow. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wes-em-20240818-1?refcode=em20240818-1]

Contribute » [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wes-em-20240818-1?refcode=em20240818-1]

More soon.

Elevate,
Wes

---

name: Mandela Barnes
subject: An hour drive north from the DNC
disclaimer_text: Paid for by The Long Run PAC, P
body:
Tomorrow morning the Democratic National Convention kicks off in Chicago, and I’ll be there to take part in this important moment for our party and our democracy.
#
Hey friend, it’s Mandela. I wanted to send you a quick note while I get ready for tomorrow. It’s going to be a big day.
That’s because tomorrow morning the Democratic National Convention kicks off in Chicago, and I’ll be there to take part in this important moment for our party and our democracy.
The convention will cement the Democratic presidential ticket and the policy platform that we’re committed to fighting for. We’ll hear from Kamala Harris, Tim Walz, and dozens of rising changemakers from around the country.
But if you drive just over an hour north from the DNC in Chicago, you’ll cross the border into my beautiful state — Wisconsin.
Now, I’ve sent you a few emails recently highlighting how pivotal Wisconsin will be in November. That’s because it can’t be stressed enough that Wisconsin **_will**_ decide who wins the presidency — and we will help decide who controls the Senate come January, too.
That’s why while I’m in Chicago, The Long Run is going to continue to support pro-democracy candidates up and down the ballot who can build our momentum and turn out the voters we need to win in Wisconsin.
So, with less than 80 days now until election day, I’m asking you:
[**Make a contribution of $5 or whatever you can afford to help us deliver Wisconsin for the Harris-Walz ticket and defend our democracy from the attacks of the MAGA far-right:**](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/1212?c0=longrunpac-em-aug24.3TlJ8p&refcode=em240818-1-c&t=1&akid=5372%2E196590%2EZ_h2yl)

name: Donald Trump Jr.
subject: Help send America First fighters to Congress to work with my dad
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRSC
body:
Fellow American, stand with my father and me to support America First fighters locked in competitive battles to FLIP the US Senate. | [](http://links.teamnrsc.co/u/click?_t=aff6d619248e4524b6f468bb9c83f15c&_m=d8f6fd13b55b469fbc7d13769d4a6312&_e=Rj3i9pV1BOSOhVOnZIm07Wq3aJdv5PUsMTr7YCwVQ9emeVjxoMFenH2oxQHgEXVd2BzD2fBC_I5bH6kMCZ4ZLruh826RvwmzIyFdNoYrDjlvp6V0rsxL1DGBLeeCvPa3i8myOFXVNM1qqHZF1RGJMcNMD42E1NpFecB0-HwpfSxvlcxxeENt7YBzJ5cTIBvbY3D2n4jSKicXLf-SD9N79pbhnyhLwGbMdRjmFrFAOlNOkZhEt9u4kZK5W89usitNPHmG_qjftyS5mQ2uJVCz1hb2OR-cWTxK7h4zrLYln1vVHlWQDVYMGFaKcCik_i2NZQeOU94E1YD_5-7R94G78g_peQNWZR_fGICPJ6utJasnYWVTrkedmkCTEjaDxKiyVF1PpmwZPyl07nFYvjB3x5iq5O5B3O3rBXeDNy577EXUgPFKzSvmoxYPQbZ1Ph6ipMXZj__vhsQZTWrzbtG8AWN-Sr5My3Tx2d34FSa9jqB3mOwqlpzArmBB9NSMkPKp)
Fellow American, 2024 is a battle for the soul of our troubled nation.

On the one side stands the rabid communists and gender theorists who seek to reduce our rights, increase our taxes, and chip away at the very liberty that enables the pursuit of the American Dream.

The other choice is my father and the America First fighters campaigning for the U.S. Senate. We've seen what Democrat leadership has to offer America and are sick and tired of all the lies, gaslighting, and manipulation from Democrats.

Fellow Patriot, There’s no way around it: **Tim Kaine is absolutely TERRIFIED.**** ** He’s been sending out email after email twisting my words and ranting about the fact that someone dared to challenge him. Tim Kaine knows we have a real chance in Virginia, and right now he’s shaking in his boots. Virginia is sick of the Tim Kaine agenda:
* Sending money to countries who hate us and take advantage of us.
* Letting criminals run free with the soft-on-crime Biden Administration.
* Leaving our border WIDE OPEN.
* Raking in big dollars from special interests while everyday Virginians suffer under inflation.

Tim Kaine is watching from his ivory tower as our Commonwealth and our country burn. While playing his harmonica, and he couldn’t care less. You won’t see me in an ivory tower blowing anything. I’ve served in combat all over the world, when I’m in the United States Senate, I’ll fight every day for what hardworking Americans need! **This is our chance to TAKE BACK Virginia and TAKE BACK our Senate majority. subject: United States Marine Corps

body:
I want to tell you what being a veteran means to me. From the yellow footprints at recruit training to the desert of Iraq, I hope this message finds you well.
| | | | [](http://links.justandfreegop.com/u/click?_t=8ca5ef3d31cc43bcb1fbe6968d953911&_m=43ca7035881242a19b9058ce6bc2b647&_e=QcB0UAWZBqOR-tLqCO9c5OyqmtZBcMDDho6_tf5WRaV036vWAkVTDObCWqYTgtfDTpgWTJozymt5g2QwwlVRVLWS2cOJ86rL6P2sZzycuR6SkDnYGYbYREYuCRc8k2575CqhvnUTykJcrMFRX1A2341Hw65kj5Ivh7zqd2CPTv0deyhsDhhdafSgvE8yxC6PBP2CxG4EAns8ma2RSEHNyEVstWhDE8n0HQue9r3qthqF84ziYb8ms1Ls8ReSsBk-W--f5jQ96Xc8g95WhiTPkal8UQWnyc_Tp4FDlzTt6EnZ2Swyav4dwv-rmJHguU1zRRY7192EIQDlNsbFpscH_xIhWb0x_WRnC7NtR7sPYSSO43l19RfBnjoyknnG9ljL_UYgFL-HkC9Sn6Oy5jAcabo78aczQjGCfVxkxWo68a4wQoDEUwPnNay23BiZd5xol74hnCp3lCp9OyVyTGjKx-gZa4T0oHSdWHOlTcVizbSwODiip8wYOwUxwJcW9kkm)

Friend,
I want to take a moment to tell you about my path to becoming a United States Marine, and what being a veteran means to me.
I grew up in the small town of Middletown, Ohio.
Middletown was once an industrial powerhouse, but thanks to the unfair trade deals signed by our “leaders” in DC, the people of Middletown were left behind.
**_Like most of the enlisted Marines I served with, I joined the military to serve my country. It was also a way for a kid from a poor family to achieve the American Dream._**
When I got off the bus and stepped on the yellow footprints at Marine Corps Recruit Training, I honestly didn’t know what I was getting into.
But when my Drill Instructor handed me my Eagle, Globe, and Anchor and I earned the title of United States Marine, it was one of the proudest moments of my life.

[](http://links.justandfreegop.com/u/click?_t=8ca5ef3d31cc43bcb1fbe6968d953911&_m=43ca7035881242a19b9058ce6bc2b647&_e=QcB0UAWZBqOR-tLqCO9c5OyqmtZBcMDDho6_tf5WRaV036vWAkVTDObCWqYTgtfDTpgWTJozymt5g2QwwlVRVLWS2cOJ86rL6P2sZzycuR6SkDnYGYbYREYuCRc8k2575CqhvnUTykJcrMFRX1A2341Hw65kj5Ivh7zqd2CPTv0deyhsDhhdafSgvE8yxC6PBP2CxG4EAns8ma2RSEHNyEVstWhDE8n0HQue9r3qthqF84ziYb8ms1Ls8ReSsBk-W--f5jQ96Xc8g95WhiTPkal8UQWnyc_Tp4FDlzTt6EnZ2Swyav4dwv-rmJHguU1zRRY7192EIQDlNsbFpscH_xIhWb0x_WRnC7NtR7sPYST3CKWngnJW7ZQn4S10VvdqPpyfpuuPbT8mP65Pcj5Cg9AlvRTSko1WYmFD_6QAhGsqPOiw-DQF12mN6KUJCZSEor_x3oxXwN9SIhjZfVS0vZpyuFqPDOZoIVYxuTl8E4-b0Fnys5WjDONa530ndsOV)
Compared to others I served with, I think my time in the Corps was rather unremarkable.
I deployed to Iraq, did my duty, and I’m proud of my service. But I was lucky. There were some scary moments, but it wasn’t like you’d see in the movies.
My time in the Corps was nothing compared to the sacrifices made by generations of Marines that came before me - and a lot in my own generation.
We ask so much of our men and women deployed around the globe. And they do it with honor and humility.
**_That’s what keeps me going every single day. Our veterans and servicemen, young and old, need to know we have their backs._**
President Trump was the best Commander-in-Chief of my lifetime, and if we’re going to get him back in the White House, it will all come down to your support.
**_[Kamala Harris is raising millions, so today, I’m humbly asking you to chip in just $5 to get President Trump back in the White House.>>](http://links.justandfreegop.com/u/click?_t=8ca5ef3d31cc43bcb1fbe6968d953911&_m=43ca7035881242a19b9058ce6bc2b647&_e=QcB0UAWZBqOR-tLqCO9c5OyqmtZBcMDDho6_tf5WRaV036vWAkVTDObCWqYTgtfDTpgWTJozymt5g2QwwlVRVLWS2cOJ86rL6P2sZzycuR6SkDnYGYbYREYuCRc8k2575CqhvnUTykJcrMFRX1A2341Hw65kj5Ivh7zqd2CPTv0deyhsDhhdafSgvE8yxC6PBP2CxG4EAns8ma2RSEHNyEVstWhDE8n0HQue9r3qthqF84ziYb8ms1Ls8ReSsBk-W--f5jQ96Xc8g95WhiTPkal8UQWnyc_Tp4FDlzTt6EnZ2Swyav4dwv-rmJHguU1zRRY7192EIQDlNsbFpscH_xIhWb0x_WRnC7NtR7sPYSQCxeT4oo6ovHQXkJjFP3973Zx_60kgOmgh1hOhiFA65bkvUuNaAgK_8lXy8bJOSTGKWVaQQ3SusJsdtkELNFXLljbCaOHqP_xLKjsclC5NKqyCJuQjBFZ6LvmUS4U1pDDQvXYg2tt7hkg9y3sfw7sS)_**

My time as a Marine taught me that every man has to do his part.
I won’t run from the biggest fights we face as a nation.
If you give me this opportunity, you have my word that President Trump & I will fight tooth and nail to put you and your family FIRST.

clean_body: I want to tell you what being a veteran means to me. From the yellow footprints at recruit training to the desert of Iraq, I hope this message finds you well. | | | | | Friend, I want to take a moment to tell you about my path to becoming a United States Marine, and what being a veteran means to me. I grew up in the small town of Middletown, Ohio. Middletown was once an industrial powerhouse, but thanks to the unfair trade deals signed by our “leaders” in DC, the people of Middletown were left behind. Like most of the enlisted Marines I served with, I joined the military to serve my country. It was also a way for a kid from a poor family to achieve the American Dream. When I got off the bus and stepped on the yellow footprints at Marine Corps Recruit Training, I honestly didn’t know what I was getting into. But when my Drill Instructor handed me my Eagle, Globe, and Anchor and I earned the title of United States Marine, it was one of the proudest moments of my life. Compared to others I served with, I think my time in the Corps was rather unremarkable. I deployed to Iraq, did my duty, and I’m proud of my service. But I was lucky. There were some scary moments, but it wasn’t like you’d see in the movies. My time in the Corps was nothing compared to the sacrifices made by generations of Marines that came before me - and a lot in my own generation. We ask so much of our men and women deployed around the globe. And they do it with honor and humility. That’s what keeps me going every single day. Our veterans and servicemen, young and old, need to know we have their backs. President Trump was the best Commander-in-Chief of my lifetime, and if we’re going to get him back in the White House, it will all come down to your support. My time as a Marine taught me that every man has to do his part. I won’t run from the biggest fights we face as a nation. If you give me this opportunity, you have my word that President Trump & I will fight tooth and nail to put you and your family FIRST. Thank you and may God bless you, JD Vance Future Vice President of the United States PS: If you can’t afford to donate because Kamala Harris has wrecked our economy, please save your donation for another time. I only ask that you please say a prayer for everyone currently serving in harm’s way. | | | | | | | Contributions to Trump National Committee JFC Inc. are not deductible for federal income tax purposes. clean_body: Signs Democrat donors are pushing into Texas... Signs Democrat donors are pushing into Texas... | | | | | Patriot, The Democrat coup has been completed and the left-wing billionaires are ALL IN again. The Far-Left Harris-Walz campaign is raising money hand over fist , and like Chuck Schumer, they want to keep the United States Senate in Democrat hands by taking me out this fall. And now we're starting to see Democrats' literature, ads, signs, and boots on the ground here in Texas. Have you seen these signs in your area, or their ads online or TV? As you know, I am locked in a tight race against Colin Allred and the Democrat campaign machine. But too many Republicans are sleeping on my Senate race - this is going to be extremely close, and we need to get the word out to everyone in Texas and all grassroots conservatives in America that I am under attack and calling for urgent support! And make no mistake:if we end up with a Harris-Walz administration in the White House and a Democrat-controlled United States Senate, they will gleefully transform our country into a third-world hellscape of corruption, crime, and chaos ! We need to rally like never before to KEEP TEXAS, TEXAS & SAVE AMERICA! ** Texas is the ultimate prize for the Democrats - it will be game over if they win here - and that's why they're trying their best to keep my race out-of-sight and out-of-mind... Don't let them get away with it. Help me turn my campaign into high gear right now- I need YOUR help! For Liberty, Ted Cruz | | | Paid for by Ted Cruz for Senate** | | 815 A Brazos, PMB 550, Austin, TX 78701 | | | | _

name: Team Sherrod Brown
subject: Bernie Moreno and Donald Trump are cut from the same cloth
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY FRIENDS OF SHERROD BROWN
body:
Trump-backed, greedy, selfish businessmen who cheat their employees shouldn't be in the Senate
| | |
---
Friend, did you know that Sherrod's opponent Bernie Moreno was found guilty of _stealing his employees' wages and shredding the evidence_? A jury forced Moreno to pay $400,000 in back pay and damages last year!
**It's just one reason why Donald Trump – a man notorious for shady business practices – handpicked Moreno.** They're both entitled rich guys who don't give a damn about the people who make this country work.
Ohioans deserve a senator who stands up for working families and will fight back against greedy bosses like Bernie Moreno. That's why Sherrod is running for reelection, friend.
Unlike his self-funding MAGA opponent, Sherrod is fighting every day in the Senate for the Dignity of Work – the belief that hard work should pay off for everyone, not just a lucky few. Whether you punch a clock or swipe a badgebadge, earn a salary or make tips, are raising children or are caring for an aging parent, Sherrod will fight for you.
**But Sherrod can't win this race alone – not when national Republicans are outspending us to flood the airwaves with nasty attack ads. We're fighting back by launching TV ads of our own, organizing on-the-ground efforts, and more – but we need a surge of grassroots support to keep it up.**
**_[So please: Will you chip in $5, $25, or more before midnight to help us defeat Bernie Moreno, keep the Senate blue, and continue our fight for the Dignity of Work?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/91075045/492633511/-1893289703?amounts=250,100,50,25,5&refcode=jtk2527-fr-nd&recurring=1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzY0NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0ZDBlM2VkNi1hYjVkLWVmMTEtOTkxYS02MDQ1YmRkYmZjNGIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=O2s352XVedNQ5oc77JsI3DxUXLV2JI5ztyaofaAsavw=)_**

name: Tamie Wilson
subject: Running To Win
body:
https://www.tamiewilson.com/ [https://www.tamiewilson.com/]
Friends,
We’re making headlines again!
And it’s not just because we’re running a solid campaign — it’s because people are starting to realize we have the momentum to win.
As the Columbus Free Press highlighted, this campaign isn’t just another race; it’s a movement to reclaim the 4th District from nearly two decades of Jim Jordan’s ineffectiveness and extremism.
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tamie-wilson-for-us-c2g?refcode=20240818_running2win_image1 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tamie-wilson-for-us-c2g?refcode=20240818_running2win_image1]
I’m running to win, and I’m not just fighting for a seat in Congress; I’m fighting for the future of our country.
But the stakes are much higher than just one seat.
Without a strong Democratic majority in Congress, President Harris’s ability to pass legislation that will truly improve the lives of Americans is at risk.
That’s why every House race, especially ours, is so important. The path to the White House and a Democratic majority runs through Ohio – Contribute today to be a part of history! [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tamie-wilson-for-us-c2g?refcode=20240818_running2win_link1]
We’ve seen what strong leadership can do—just look at what Governor Walz accomplished in Minnesota with his legislative majority.
>From expanding healthcare access and universal school lunch programs to enacting historic protections for workers, Walz showed us that real change is possible when the right people are in office.
We can make that happen for all of America, but only if we flip districts like the 4th.
Our campaign has the energy to do it. We’ve raised over $1.1 million, and we’re closing the gap on Jordan.
Democratic leaders, the media, and voters across the country are starting to understand that Ohio is back in play, and with your support, we can send Jim Jordan home for good.
Jim Jordan has failed his constituents time and time again.
He’s voted against the CHIPS Act, denying Ohio thousands of jobs, and he’s turned his back on veterans, women, and working families.
This is a man who has been in office for 17 years, been paid $3 Million Dollars, but he hasn’t ever passed a single bill.
If you showed up to work and didn’t do anything - you’d be fired, and that’s what we have to do to Jim Jordan.
Meanwhile, I’m out here meeting with voters, listening to their concerns, and fighting to bring real change to our district.
If you believe in a future where we can pass meaningful legislation, protect our rights, and improve our communities, I need your support.
Contribute today to help us finish the job and deliver a strong Democratic majority to Congress. Together, we can win this race and take back the House! [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tamie-wilson-for-us-c2g?refcode=20240818_running2win_link2]
Working for US,
Tamie Wilson
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tamie-wilson-for-us-c2g?refcode=20240818_running2win_image2 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tamie-wilson-for-us-c2g?refcode=20240818_running2win_image2]
Donate to Tamie Today [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tamie-wilson-for-us-c2g?refcode=20240818_running2win_button]
Tamie Wilson is the Democratic nominee ready to unseat ULTRA MAGA extremist Jim Jordan in OH-04. A single mom and survivor who knows what it’s like to endure and overcome challenges, Tamie's fighting for jobs, healthcare, and positive change for everyday Americans. Your donations will help Tamie turn out every voter we need to flip this seat and send Jordan packing.
DONATE >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tamie-wilson-for-us-c2g?refcode=20240818_running2win_footer]
You can follow Tamie's campaign by on Social Media using the links below:
https://www.facebook.com/TamieUSCongress/ [https://www.facebook.com/TamieUSCongress/] https://x.com/tamieuscongress [https://x.com/tamieuscongress] https://www.instagram.com/tamieuscongress/ [https://www.instagram.com/tamieuscongress/] https://www.tiktok.com/@tamieforohio?_t=8hxb9Pbg4Uw&_r=1 [https://www.tiktok.com/@tamieforohio?_t=8hxb9Pbg4Uw&_r=1] https://www.linkedin.com/in/tamie-wilson-4852b3119/ [https://www.linkedin.com/in/tamie-wilson-4852b3119/] https://www.tamiewilson.com/ [https://www.tamiewilson.com/]
©2024 Tamie Wilson for US, all rights reserved
To contribute via check, please address to:
Tamie Wilson For US
273 Saratoga St
Delaware, OH 43015
United States
www.tamiewilson.com [https://www.tamiewilson.com/]

name: Ty Pinkins
subject: I'm here at the DNC
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ty Pinkins for Congress
body:
I’m ready to confirm VP Harris and Governor Walz as our nominees

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/91075690/492635778/1023996456?refcode=RE_EM_FR_240818_logo&amount=50&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNjEvMS8xMTA5NDgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZmIxOTBkODgtYWU1ZC1lZjExLTk5MWEtNjA0NWJkZGJmYzRiIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=eXhvN5LTJLcZzqdID_HY9Pg1BUmbrDVLaF6YL5WjnRk=)
Peter,

It’s an exciting day! Along with the rest of our Mississippi delegation, I’m here in Chicago for the Democratic National Convention.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/91075691/492635779/1023996456?refcode=RE_EM_FR_240818_G&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNjEvMS8xMTA5NDgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZmIxOTBkODgtYWU1ZC1lZjExLTk5MWEtNjA0NWJkZGJmYzRiIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=eXhvN5LTJLcZzqdID_HY9Pg1BUmbrDVLaF6YL5WjnRk=)
I’m looking forward to officially confirming Vice President Harris and Governor Walz as our nominees. We have a major opportunity in this year’s election to choose progress and unity instead of turning back the clock on our democracy.

As we visit communities across Mississippi, we’re uplifting campaigns up and down the ballot. Your support is what makes it possible to keep putting gas in our campaign car and ensuring our volunteers have the materials they need.

While I may be in Chicago, the rest of our team is still working hard back home. [Will you chip in $10, $20.24, or any other amount to keep our campaign for the U.S. Senate going strong?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/91075692/492635780/1023996456?refcode=RE_EM_FR_240818_l1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNjEvMS8xMTA5NDgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZmIxOTBkODgtYWU1ZC1lZjExLTk5MWEtNjA0NWJkZGJmYzRiIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=eXhvN5LTJLcZzqdID_HY9Pg1BUmbrDVLaF6YL5WjnRk=)
[DONATE »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/91075693/492635781/1023996456?refcode=RE_EM_FR_240818_b1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNjEvMS8xMTA5NDgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZmIxOTBkODgtYWU1ZC1lZjExLTk5MWEtNjA0NWJkZGJmYzRiIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=eXhvN5LTJLcZzqdID_HY9Pg1BUmbrDVLaF6YL5WjnRk=)
When I say no part of this campaign would be possible without your support, I mean it. I’m deeply grateful to have you standing with us!

Stay tuned for more updates from Chicago, and thank you again!

– _Ty_

* * *
| The son of a tractor driver, Ty doesn’t come from a wealthy family. He was born and raised in the small town of Rolling Fork, and is a proud son of the Mississippi Delta.

clean_body: I’m ready to confirm VP Harris and Governor Walz as our nominees = Peter, It’s an exciting day! Along with the rest of our Mississippi delegation, I’m here in Chicago for the Democratic National Convention. = I’m looking forward to officially confirming Vice President Harris and Governor Walz as our nominees. We have a major opportunity in this year’s election to choose progress and unity instead of turning back the clock on our democracy. As we visit communities across Mississippi, we’re uplifting campaigns up and down the ballot. Your support is what makes it possible to keep putting gas in our campaign car and ensuring our volunteers have the materials they need. While I may be in Chicago, the rest of our team is still working hard back home. = = When I say no part of this campaign would be possible without your support, I mean it. I’m deeply grateful to have you standing with us! Stay tuned for more updates from Chicago, and thank you again! – Ty * | The son of a tractor driver, Ty doesn’t come from a wealthy family. Dear Peter,
[The Democratic Party is trying to silence your voice and restrict your choice in our democracy. ](https://www.kennedy24.com/ny_ruling_details_donate_em?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=ny_ruling_video_8_18_24_nd1&n=3)
[They are weaponizing the courts to take away your right to vote for the candidate you like best and choose the kind of America you want to live in. ](https://www.kennedy24.com/ny_ruling_details_donate_em?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=ny_ruling_video_8_18_24_nd1&n=4)
**They don’t believe in democracy or trust the voters anymore.** They think they are entitled to choose who you are allowed to vote for. They think they should be the judge of what is best for you and your family.
That says something about the DNC’s contempt for democracy. Instead of fighting for voters’ rights, the DNC has a multi-million dollar army of lawyers devoted to reducing your choices at the ballot box.
**Are you going to stand by and let that happen?**
[ I Stand with Bobby ](https://www.kennedy24.com/ny_ruling_details_donate_em?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=ny_ruling_video_8_18_24_nd1&n=5)

[](http://links.justandfreegop.com/u/click?_t=8ca5ef3d31cc43bcb1fbe6968d953911&_m=2cf00392ef5046aeaf8c6ac3b6b70bd8&_e=YkbUeznBOpyU6HcxTIROVHfrRR3wwTC6CciDBIwIfdmuJ-5XiY3uuZA-NAaZxa8zvawyCtRrv91D2JXghSWiaJsmasTlKxxjJ_pWAGSPUVysAIlXNLnTH_Qhu1DH_i653eOUO_z7FgTN5Xu6ReR_Uyx_fXMG8ipzy4hqI3fJbDtGgWKn-qR9w8HBWpe6kQdZMbNFyciSqxtITIGgQRliPDzWxray0RK9tsl_D5y1kLRy2etfrlQ6TtCF2fpEe4u0BXdKZGjnkQABghnRT_2ep7V8EzZJJmMtWViu86JGomiB_5fQa4181b3cZ_DLzbV_iA_h4zSiIZNJOjNNKvua1c-XRBuyzB0FMgTErvD0vDzMK5ODwo6D3SA-MOQNAHnf54H_7bfo02zGURdWjyrxz73Pwv7GCBxwUFAvbaP2-OS-iELadeSFFlUEYZyzH0iX)

I first met Sam Brown in the burn unit. He'd just returned from Afghanistan where he and his soldiers were ambushed by the Taliban. He was injured by a roadside bomb and had a long road to recovery. I was assigned as his dietitian in rehab and was very impressed by him. Here was a young man terribly injured while serving his country, but his heart was full of faith. He fought with every fiber of his being to recover so he could return to serve with his men in Afghanistan. And even when it became clear that he would never be permitted to return to the line of duty on account of his injuries, he didn't skip a beat. Sam had to relearn everything. He had prepared for his entire life to spend his career fighting for his country in the military. After his life plans were dashed in just 60 seconds, he re-focused his vision on serving others in a new way. Before we were married, and before we were even dating, Sam and I became friends. I shared with him some of the struggles I had faced, and he was honest with me. He was concerned for my Salvation – and for that matter so was I. He challenged me to reconnect with God and start going to church again. As he and I grew closer, he helped me rediscover my faith. Now here we are 15 years later. We have 3 kids, I'm a Bible-believing momma, and Sam is running for Senate to keep serving our nation and restore hope, leadership, and accountability. I'm endlessly grateful that God put him in my life. Sam is a warrior, a hero, a leader. _**[I'm backing this Purple Heart veteran all the way and I hope you will too.](http://links.justandfreegop.com/u/click?_t=8ca5ef3d31cc43bcb1fbe6968d953911&_m=2cf00392ef5046aeaf8c6ac3b6b70bd8&_e=YkbUeznBOpyU6HcxTIROVHfrRR3wwTC6CciDBIwIfdmuJ-5XiY3uuZA-NAaZxa8zvawyCtRrv91D2JXghSWiaJsmasTlKxxjJ_pWAGSPUVysAIlXNLnTH_Qhu1DH_i653eOUO_z7FgTN5Xu6ReR_Uyx_fXMG8ipzy4hqI3fJbDtGgWKn-qR9w8HBWpe6kQdZMbNFyciSqxtITIGgQRliPDzWxray0RK9tsl_D5y1kLRy2etfrlQ6TtCF2fpEe4u0BXdKZGjnkQABghnRT_2ep7V8EzZJJmMtWViu86JGomj6qO8Cq6gluK5JhEhf1W3ibqIxjM7jFz2PZ5l03RXDitW_gY4_2Qng6klHhn3EgcoI1zg2rlEGxe8i24T8SLxqSy5ZSDicNLM7HlVi8phAjj5npWcCX3zo7j2WU2XHPKDJZnXsZuqAm8Dlb3NUxH5i)**_
---
[](http://links.justandfreegop.com/u/click?_t=8ca5ef3d31cc43bcb1fbe6968d953911&_m=2cf00392ef5046aeaf8c6ac3b6b70bd8&_e=YkbUeznBOpyU6HcxTIROVHfrRR3wwTC6CciDBIwIfdmuJ-5XiY3uuZA-NAaZxa8zvawyCtRrv91D2JXghSWiaJsmasTlKxxjJ_pWAGSPUVysAIlXNLnTH_Qhu1DH_i653eOUO_z7FgTN5Xu6ReR_Uyx_fXMG8ipzy4hqI3fJbDtGgWKn-qR9w8HBWpe6kQdZMbNFyciSqxtITIGgQRliPDzWxray0RK9tsl_D5y1kLRy2etfrlQ6TtCF2fpEe4u0BXdKZGjnkQABghnRT_2ep7V8EzZJJmMtWViu86JGomguiwCfmz-KraNrcL40fU0EDQzG25nzxsMc8ZmR-y4rRQ76QPRyrVglK7MiFbj6_axfXPlpvYOq5N7CT1uI7iKYG6oMIYfHl3Hv2al3qk6YLCXVwbXvi0870bK3Hj04NyPiYmtaQU_cZnkWUaaj1Uv_)

Thank you for your consideration, Captain Amy BrownU.S. Army, ret. **P.S. –** If you feel so led, Sam could use your financial support. He's closer than ever to winning his Toss-Up race and flipping the Senate majority. Like many of you, we live on a fixed income. We have 3 kids, I'm a Bible-believing momma, and Sam is running for Senate to keep serving our nation and restore hope, leadership, and accountability. I'm endlessly grateful that God put him in my life. Sam is a warrior, a hero, a leader. Thank you for your consideration, Captain Amy BrownU.S. Army, ret. P.S. – If you feel so led, Sam could use your financial support. He's closer than ever to winning his Toss-Up race and flipping the Senate majority. Like many of you, we live on a fixed income. But campaign expenses are piling up and we have to dig deeper to go all the way. | | Sam Brown is a retired member of the U.S. Army. Use of military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement of the United States Army or the Department of Defense. Paid for by Sam Brown for Nevada.

The NRCC _knows_ that they’re in serious danger of losing their narrow House majority — but they think they can throw money into Kansas to save it.
But I refuse to be the reason that National Republicans end up with enough votes in Congress to ban abortion, block IVF access, and cut Social Security and Medicare.
So I promise you this: I’m going to buckle down these final 79 days between now and Nov. 5 to make sure we do everything we can to hold this battleground House district.
[_**If you’re with me, I hope you’ll pitch in $20 today to help me stop the NRCC from flipping this seat.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/91076175/492637357/-1743609016?refcode=email_081824_NRCC&amounts=10,20,50,75,100,250,500&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NTc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiODIzMzgwNy1iMDVkLWVmMTEtOTkxYS02MDQ1YmRkYmZjNGIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=p9ybRA_M74dRtVhLio4R6xLyQexz9nbv-PGjZBiQgLM=)

**It's a gerrymandered state, where Republicans rely on voter suppression to maintain their chokehold on state politics.**

Over these past few months, I've spent just about every spare minute meeting even more voters as I travel up and down our beautiful state — **and trust me, the majority of Florida voters don't support Rick Scott's far-right agenda.**
They DON'T believe in stripping people of their reproductive rights.
They __ DON'T want to see their taxes go up while the top 1% gets a tax cut. They DON'T _ _ want to lose their Medicare and Social Security benefits.
And they DON'T want leaders who sow division and scapegoat others to stay in power.
But the Florida GOP has spent _years_ gerrymandering our state to ensure that they hold on to power in Tallahassee, while totally ignoring what the majority of Floridians actually want. _They convince us that our blue votes don't matter, to keep poll turnout low and voter disillusionment high._
**And then, the extremists who've gerrymandered their way into office pass more voter suppression bills, making it even harder for voters to cast their ballots with each election year.**
_Why?_
**Because Florida is NOT a red state. Now, friend, I need your help to prove it.**

Jon told me that his next fundraising deadline is hours away, but he’s falling behind. WTF? He NEEDS a surge in grassroots donations RIGHT NOW to keep up with Mitch McConnell and his lame opponent.** = ___If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation between Letitia James and Jon Tester will go through immediately : | | | = | | = | | = | | = Why are you still reading this? Did you donate? —James Carville | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. James for NY 2026 PO Box 20656 Brooklyn, NY 11202 United States | | Paid for by James for NY 2026

body:
The New York Sun told you the truth.
The New York Sun told you the truth.

| | | [](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=bbf6ef7ccb1545f4add2c3bdc1a70ab0&_e=WAe69V0VVDDcet_Gs-yeygFKutCpia1Hs_JfyC-PC0yutkUK-qbGH3WimEtOtHRWEADsXm-Br6Ay_c09U-aCgvEqICTo58IhnMH66tUCDUA6tsqkRGIJ69fUoHxEjmu3DZ4UQ_ukuZJ4C8uiGI0xuLxYe9eHr4OaHe-jqobdi3XGhZXUEQ4jRfCx4aaJLKfkBvsA_onnFSZbIloG--FaNuoaO_JbDq6YvdxlkgI16infCoTMKj3PY3qfnZwWlGXWk56RuCkWYlvFooYTMWToStwAnnWk5kLdMDkYlhDhtIQ11uxuJesY3d_xc40GctI-fE4NirMpQPXN3KmMZCYIIuwqgCpul2qp3wTk5_rSYxRw1ZWK4RdeWI8pLiHB2wWNtCoFsw1SG3LN-kDf6uto3S4jfZjl3tK_rBjv5D7k1MobdXi78BgGMiCJ7MKF8hWp)
---
|
---
| | FROM THE DESK OF THE PUBLISHER
---
| | Dear Peter,How bad is the New York Times? Well, how better to illustrate than to contrast the Times with The New York Sun?

**The screenshot on the left, from May 2023, shows how the Times covered the story of Biden’s age and cognitive decline. The Times would have you believe there was nothing at all to be concerned about. The Sun, as you can see below, wants you to know the truth. Nothing more. Nothing less.**
---
| | [](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=bbf6ef7ccb1545f4add2c3bdc1a70ab0&_e=WAe69V0VVDDcet_Gs-yeygFKutCpia1Hs_JfyC-PC0yutkUK-qbGH3WimEtOtHRWEADsXm-Br6Ay_c09U-aCgvEqICTo58IhnMH66tUCDUA6tsqkRGIJ69fUoHxEjmu3DZ4UQ_ukuZJ4C8uiGI0xuLxYe9eHr4OaHe-jqobdi3XGhZXUEQ4jRfCx4aaJLKfkBvsA_onnFSZbIloG--FaNuoaO_JbDq6YvdxlkgI16infCoTMKj3PY3qfnZwWlGXWk56RuCkWYlvFooYTMWToStwAnnWk5kLdMDkYlhDhtIQKZJ4hZknM6UZeucFhjVjfZoJJLr4NOVcWdx65j3ALZ6tRUbiFgT0UafPJcuq4gdZ8VTbLenaSOihvBZXEVQrj5E8d8GCQahlXx4hCFB8RCftB9aSu1Ck6429EuaVSetT0SpEdTzeLg3cihDwh0lXW)

name: Anthony D'Esposito
subject: Let’s Keep Up the Pressure!
body:
Peter, The president of Columbia University is stepping down following months of anti-Israel, anti-Semitic protests on campus. This victory is a direct result of people like you standing with me as I called out the radical voices spreading hate across our institutions. Help us keep up the pressure. [https://winred.despositoforcongress.com/d-esposito-for-new-york/email?utm_source=email&utm_medium=appeal&utm_content=link&utm_campaign=Lets+Keep+Up+The+Pressure+Email] DONATE NOW → [https://winred.despositoforcongress.com/d-esposito-for-new-york/email?utm_source=email&utm_medium=appeal&utm_content=first+button&utm_campaign=Lets+Keep+Up+The+Pressure+Email] ANY AMOUNT → [https://winred.despositoforcongress.com/d-esposito-for-new-york/email?utm_source=email&utm_medium=appeal&utm_content=other+button&utm_campaign=Lets+Keep+Up+The+Pressure+Email]

As a retired NYPD detective and now your representative, I’ve never been afraid to speak the truth – even when the far-left tried to silence us. We took on the anti-Semites infesting our colleges, and the pressure is working. But our fight is far from over.

The radical left is furious. They’ve made me the #2 target in the nation, throwing millions of dollars into defeating us because they know that when I speak out, I won’t back down.

HELP US FIGHT BACK → [https://winred.despositoforcongress.com/d-esposito-for-new-york/email?amount=250&utm_source=email&utm_medium=appeal&utm_content=amount+button&utm_campaign=Lets+Keep+Up+The+Pressure+Email]

Now more than ever, I need your support to keep this momentum going. We’ve proven that when we stand together, we can make real change. Let’s keep pushing back against these dangerous ideologies and protect the values we hold dear.

Can I count on you to chip in? Every dollar helps us fight the dark money flooding this district. [https://winred.despositoforcongress.com/d-esposito-for-new-york/email?utm_source=email&utm_medium=appeal&utm_content=link&utm_campaign=Lets+Keep+Up+The+Pressure+Email]

name: The Democratic National Committee
subject: How we'll use your donation to elect Democrats:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Democratic National Committee, www
body:
We're reaching out to ask, humbly, if you can make a donation to the Democratic National Committee today.
---
Derek -- We're reaching out to ask, humbly, if you can make a donation to the Democratic National Committee today. But before we do, you deserve to know how we'll put that donation to work to elect Democrats this November. First, it's important to note that every dollar we have raised so far has been allocated. Like any organization, we have plans and budgets we need to reach in order to win. As money comes in, we allocate those resources. So not only do we have budget gaps to fill, but if we come up short of our goals it means there are expenditures we have to cut. That would hurt our chances of electing Kamala Harris, Tim Walz, and Democrats everywhere. Back to how we spend the money. The DNC is the organization best positioned to move money where it needs to go, when it's needed most. We make powerful investments in grassroots organizing and data and technology infrastructure. We make sure candidates and state parties across the country have the resources they need to compete and win. The more we raise, the more we can do. But a big part of how much is dependent on the response to emails like this. So now that we have explained this, we're hoping you'll join thousands of Democrats making their first or oftentimes next donation to the DNC. Use this link: [**Can Democrats running for office everywhere count on you to contribute $3 directly to the Democratic National Committee today? We will spend the money we raise electing Democrats this November.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-august-elect-dems-2024?amount=3&refcode=em_20240818_909_fr&refcode2=909_22930333_m7aDQz&akid=909%2E22930333%2Em7aDQz) _If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly._ | | | **[Donate $3](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-august-elect-dems-2024?express_lane=true&amount=3&refcode=em_20240818_909_fr&refcode2=909_22930333_m7aDQz&akid=909%2E22930333%2Em7aDQz)**

name: Jill Stein for President
subject: We have a winner
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jill Stein for President 2024
body:
The Green Party presidential nomination goes to...

| | | [ ](https://www.jillstein2024.com/?e=e813143e1dc0d3b0ffcb007ffe357333&utm_source=jillsteinforpresident&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=0818_jill_wins_nomination&n=1)
---
Peter, It's official: Jill Stein has won the Green Party 2024 presidential nomination! Jill and her VP running mate Butch Ware have been nominated by an overwhelming vote at the Green Party national convention by delegates representing Greens across the country. [Will you help us celebrate this historic moment for grassroots democracy by pitching in to help Jill and Butch get on the ballot in the remaining states across the country?](https://www.jillstein2024.com/ba?e=e813143e1dc0d3b0ffcb007ffe357333&utm_source=jillsteinforpresident&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=0818_jill_wins_nomination&n=2)
---
| [](https://www.jillstein2024.com/ba?e=e813143e1dc0d3b0ffcb007ffe357333&utm_source=jillsteinforpresident&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=0818_jill_wins_nomination&n=3 "PUT JILL AND BUTCH ON THE BALLOT") [PUT JILL AND BUTCH ON THE BALLOT](https://www.jillstein2024.com/ba?e=e813143e1dc0d3b0ffcb007ffe357333&utm_source=jillsteinforpresident&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=0818_jill_wins_nomination&n=3)
---
[ ](https://www.jillstein2024.com/ba?e=e813143e1dc0d3b0ffcb007ffe357333&utm_source=jillsteinforpresident&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=0818_jill_wins_nomination&n=4)
---
Watch Jill's powerful short speech to the convention just before state parties and caucuses announced their votes:
---
| [](https://www.jillstein2024.com/r?u=5KRjyNdFqTjg6bT5b005ZepvijuXP5H-_D7A0-VZAO0oq74YtI_5OsgDxY0ZtIxK&e=e813143e1dc0d3b0ffcb007ffe357333&utm_source=jillsteinforpresident&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=0818_jill_wins_nomination&n=5 "WATCH JILL'S SPEECH") [WATCH JILL'S SPEECH](https://www.jillstein2024.com/r?u=5KRjyNdFqTjg6bT5b005ZepvijuXP5H-_D7A0-VZAO0oq74YtI_5OsgDxY0ZtIxK&e=e813143e1dc0d3b0ffcb007ffe357333&utm_source=jillsteinforpresident&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=0818_jill_wins_nomination&n=5)
---
Stein/Ware is the only pro-worker, anti-genocide, climate emergency campaign already on the ballot for the majority of voters. Our job now is to get every single vote we can for this powerhouse ticket - and that starts with getting Jill and Butch on the ballot in the final states where we are still petitioning. **Please donate whatever you can now to power our critical final ballot access push for Jill and Butch across the country!**
---
| [](https://www.jillstein2024.com/ba?e=e813143e1dc0d3b0ffcb007ffe357333&utm_source=jillsteinforpresident&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=0818_jill_wins_nomination&n=6 "PUT JILL AND BUTCH ON THE BALLOT") [PUT JILL AND BUTCH ON THE BALLOT](https://www.jillstein2024.com/ba?e=e813143e1dc0d3b0ffcb007ffe357333&utm_source=jillsteinforpresident&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=0818_jill_wins_nomination&n=6)
---
As Jill quoted the words of Frederick Douglass, power concedes nothing without a demand - it never has, and it never will. We must be that demand. It's time to stand up and make that demand! In solidarity and gratitude, Jill Stein 2024
---
* * *
---
Paid for by Jill Stein for President 2024
---

Please, consider making a . Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a. to request fewer emails. name: Elissa Slotkin
subject: The return of Betsy Devos...
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ELISSA SLOTKIN FOR MICHIGAN
body:
# [](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/188?t=1&akid=1790%2E135344%2Etxlk9P)

Friend -
If you were waiting for the perfect time to make your first donation to my campaign for Senate, not only is today the perfect day but there's also a very good reason as well.
Betsy DeVos.
If you're already familiar with her significant support for my opponent and are ready to chip in, please use this link to give:
**[https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/beat-devos](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/9?c0=ebs-em-aug24._YMjeK&refcode=em240818-3-900&t=2&akid=1790%2E135344%2Etxlk9P)**
Otherwise, let me go a little deeper ... including a very recent revelation about her designs on a role in a second Trump administration.
As Michiganders know, for decades the DeVos family’s #1 issue has been weakening Michigan's, and the country's, public education system. Betsy DeVos used Michigan as her petri dish before becoming Trump’s Secretary of Education, and one of his longest serving cabinet secretaries.
Much like our Republican opponent, Mike Rogers, she condemned Donald Trump after January 6, 2021. In Betsy DeVos’ case, she “resigned in protest” as Education Secretary, blaming his rhetoric on the insurrection -- just 13 days before the end of Trump’s term.
And like my current opponent who turned around and worked hard for Trump's endorsement, Betsy DeVos is now back -- and willing to serve in a second Trump administration.
[](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/9?c0=ebs-em-aug24._YMjeK&refcode=em240818-3-900&t=3&akid=1790%2E135344%2Etxlk9P)
So what does that mean?
As if there weren't already a million reasons to defeat Donald Trump, there's now one more: keeping Betsy DeVos out of any role of prominence in Washington, D.C.
And there is no doing that without winning in Michigan.
The DeVos family has been some of the top supporters to opponents of mine in the past, and they've doubled down on this Senate race.
Mike Rogers' first FEC report in this race was filled with donations from a bunch of members of the DeVos family -- contributions totaling $46,200 all made on one single day. And just last week, Betsy DeVos herself was campaigning with Mike Rogers at a roundtable just a day before the primary election.
They are certainly not done with their support of my opponent.
On a positive note, the response to emails about the DeVos donations has raised far more than the DeVos family has contributed. But we have to keep going, because their family's unlimited wealth can impact this race in many more ways.
So in light of this news about Betsy DeVos' potential return to Washington, D.C. and her role in campaigning for my opponent, I am asking:
[**Can you contribute $3 directly to my campaign for U.S. Senate in Michigan? I will put your donation made today in Betsy’s name right to work persuading the voters we need to win in Michigan this fall.**](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/9?c0=ebs-em-aug24._YMjeK&refcode=em240818-3-900&t=4&akid=1790%2E135344%2Etxlk9P)
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly:_
| | **[Donate $3](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/127?c0=ebs-em-aug24.Hajq9M&amount=3&refcode=em240818-3-900&t=23&akid=1790%2E135344%2Etxlk9P)**
---
****
| **[Donate $25](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/129?c0=ebs-em-aug24.t1985h&refcode=em240818-3-900&t=24&akid=1790%2E135344%2Etxlk9P)**
---
****
| | **[Donate $50](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/122?c0=ebs-em-aug24.zbPtHZ&refcode=em240818-3-900&t=25&akid=1790%2E135344%2Etxlk9P)**
---
****
| **[Donate $100](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/123?c0=ebs-em-aug24.5Ft8Et&refcode=em240818-3-900&t=26&akid=1790%2E135344%2Etxlk9P)**
---
****
| | **[Donate $250](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/124?c0=ebs-em-aug24.veBIyE&refcode=em240818-3-900&t=27&akid=1790%2E135344%2Etxlk9P)**
---
****
| **[Other Amount](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/127?c0=ebs-em-aug24.Hajq9M&refcode=em240818-3-900&t=28&akid=1790%2E135344%2Etxlk9P)**
---
****
Thank you,
Elissa

PAID FOR BY ELISSA SLOTKIN FOR MICHIGAN
P.O. Box 4145
East Lansing, MI 48826
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a very important way we communicate with supporters like you, but if you want to, you can [ unsubscribe here](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=29&akid=1790%2E135344%2Etxlk9P).

[ Sign up here to receive fewer emails.](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/signup/users-fewer-emails/?t=30&akid=1790%2E135344%2Etxlk9P)

Elissa Slotkin served in the Central Intelligence Agency and the Department of Defense. Use of her job titles and photographs during service do not imply endorsement by the Central Intelligence Agency OR the Department of Defense.

Peter, _Ever wish that the Florida Blueprint could be replicated across all 50 states?_

We do, and so does Governor Ron DeSantis. That's why he's started a new group -- RON PAC -- and he wants YOU to be a founding member.

---
[](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=2d3c6fc7ef4a40e8b5bcaebde28e99a8&_e=FLz26wrort4SyJFLFCIS5BJJcW0EUxjQPqg8wFKC7-ZIdq02ZfuApoXP8sL2si6mcsdD4wURcrIzh8tTF43KamTGWdPpjLXhNxDk2R40tgYIlpDz8LkqF_1VmCsWP94dtrOFKEK75sny6BzelxaOeUL5A_PGiE0lGWas1TLCXtgJiQesV3nQATa-4L34-o8B7xpNwfECd6U8d4MTUFVufqRJcYClE-xMhnBkSAAkA5Tfr3qkEfPZglhPvbrMrDGAMfa4AobfP05ErlQru_jRrvWPsDhetDOFoohs_6tvJFWRxELwnCH9sG4geNu1YX9Jv_Zg0bsbcUR_Xlq97PhGKQ5Cjt28MPZc48MYcBEnk_SGh6-jwv7EzPnl43dT_6BXuaY_BFG7mK3HwYKn-KFuIQ%3D%3D)

For years, politicians have made promises they haven't kept, letting the American dream slip away. It's time for energetic, conservative leadership that delivers on its word. That kind of leadership worked in Florida. Now it's time to deliver it across the country. We plan to identify key races across America where we can elevate & elect the leaders we need to get our nation back on track. name: Sara Jacobs
subject: Here’s exactly why political campaigns ask you to make online donations
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Sara Jacobs for Congress
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sjj-em [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sjj-em]
OK, here’s a question that gets asked a lot, and it’s a completely fair one: What difference will $5 *actually* make to your campaign?
Well, it can make a pretty big one.
The most successful movements in our history have been people-powered – like-minded folks coming together to move the needle on things that seem really big, even untouchable.
The reason these people-powered movements work is that collective action is greater than the sum of its parts.
If one person reading this gives $5, that helps.
If 10 people reading this each give $5, that helps even more.
But if everyone who’s reading this email and cares about delivering Democratic victories in November decides to give $5, there is no limit to what we can accomplish.
(If you want to give $5 right now, you can donate here.) [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sjj-em]
Campaigns are expensive — because at their core, they are large-scale efforts to convince people to do things they might not otherwise do. Register to vote. Learn something new about a candidate. Mail back a ballot. Volunteer in your neighborhood.
Reaching and convincing enough people takes pretty serious money, especially when we’re in a time crunch (less than three months to go!).
But we can get there if we work together.
So how about it – will you join your fellow Democrats and donate $5 today? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sjj-em]
If you’ve saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:
DONATE $5 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sjj-em?express_lane=true&amount=5]
OTHER [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sjj-em]
Thank you for your support! I’m feeling really optimistic about the work ahead, and I’m so grateful to have you on this team.
-Sara
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sjj-em [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sjj-em]
Congresswoman Sara Jacobs
California’s 51st District
CONTRIBUTE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sjj-em]
If you can’t give much right now, I want you to know that even $1 or $5 makes a difference. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sjj-em] And if you can’t give at all, I understand. I appreciate you taking the time to read these emails and stay connected with my campaign – regardless of whether or not you’re able to chip in financially. Thank you!
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sjj-em [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sjj-em]
Paid for by Sara Jacobs for Congress
Sara Jacobs for Congress
PO Box 120085
San Diego, CA 92112
United States

CONTRIBUTE TODAY [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sjj-em]

Hi there, friend, it's Debbie. I have an important update for you: **There are just 2 days until the Florida Primary.**
It's because of people like you that I'm here today, running in a battleground race that could determine the fate of our Senate majority and the next Senate majority leader. **Thank you, friend.**
**With everything from abortion rights to Social Security and Medicare on the line, November 5th could be the end of our democracy as we know it. That’s why it’s critical for us to do everything we can to defend our Senate majority from far-right extremists like Rick Scott, JD Vance, and Donald Trump. **
[**Please, friend: Will you chip in $5 right now to split between me and Kirsten Gillibrand to help me reach my $3 million Pre-Primary goal before midnight tonight to help me protect our Senate and democracy from right-wing extremism?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/91077343/492641678/-1568314327?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk5306-bu-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMDZkZTk4MC1iYTVkLWVmMTEtOTkxYS02MDQ1YmRkYmZjNGIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=GLUHtjnhh8cHBBup8L_7A1gJ4ICn8YaojYJ6ggzN3eI=)

It’s no secret that if Trump, Vance, and Scott win in November, they'll work closely to push forward their dangerous agenda. They'll roll back voting rights and reproductive freedom — even more so than they already have — cut critical government programs like Social Security and Medicare, and end the Affordable Care Act.
I’ve spent my life serving Floridians because I listen to and care about our communities. I've helped **protect the Everglades** , worked at the state and national level to **expand health care access** , and**fought to defend reproductive rights. I won’t let Rick Scott continue to scheme and lie just to advance his self-serving agenda and the interests of his ultra-wealthy friends. **
**Our race in Florida could determine both control of the Senate and the next Senate majority leader, which means it’s more important than ever to protect our Democratic Senate majority. And that starts by defeating Rick Scott and flipping Florida blue. **
**[Unlike my opponent, friend, I’m running a true grassroots movement powered by on-the-ground supporters like you. With only 2 days left, can I count on you to chip in $5 or more before midnight tonight to help me reach my $3 million goal, defeat Rick Scott, and save our Senate majority?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/91077345/492641680/-1736033032?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk5306-bu-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMDZkZTk4MC1iYTVkLWVmMTEtOTkxYS02MDQ1YmRkYmZjNGIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=GLUHtjnhh8cHBBup8L_7A1gJ4ICn8YaojYJ6ggzN3eI=)**

As long as we aren’t outspent, we have the winning message:

Adam is a former Assistant United States Attorney, Intelligence Committee chairman, lead impeachment manager in Donald Trump’s first Senate trial, and a member of the January 6 Committee that investigated him.

He knows how to prosecute the case against the corrupt, authoritarian ex-president and beat the guy pledging to support him for a third time.

Vice President Kamala Harris is a former elected District Attorney, Attorney General, and United States Senator, who cross-examined Trump’s Supreme Court nominees on the Senate Judiciary Committee and brought con men like Trump who held themselves above the law to justice.

She knows how to prosecute the case against Donald Trump too.

With your $10 of support, we’re going to defeat the Trump-Vance Project 2025 agenda and elect Kamala Harris as president with the blue majorities she will need with Adam in the Senate to get things done.

[**Rush a split donation of $10 or any amount between NewDems and my campaign before midnight to meet our 2,500 grassroots donation goal. Closing this fundraising gap has become even more urgent as national Republicans commit over $6 million to win California House races and Vice President Harris expands the number of states Democrats are contesting. Each newly competitive state or district puts a strain on our limited resources for Adam to help when we’ve been outraised by $1.2 million with under 90 days to go. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation between Adam Schiff and NewDems will go through immediately: | = = = = = As long as we aren’t outspent, we have the winning message: Adam is a former Assistant United States Attorney, Intelligence Committee chairman, lead impeachment manager in Donald Trump’s first Senate trial, and a member of the January 6 Committee that investigated him. He knows how to prosecute the case against the corrupt, authoritarian ex-president and beat the guy pledging to support him for a third time. Vice President Kamala Harris is a former elected District Attorney, Attorney General, and United States Senator, who cross-examined Trump’s Supreme Court nominees on the Senate Judiciary Committee and brought con men like Trump who held themselves above the law to justice. She knows how to prosecute the case against Donald Trump too. With your $10 of support, we’re going to defeat the Trump-Vance Project 2025 agenda and elect Kamala Harris as president with the blue majorities she will need with Adam in the Senate to get things done. = This is an unprecedented moment in the history of American presidential campaigns, and it is a call to action for each and every one of us to do our part and make history. Thanks for helping Adam and the rest of our team meet the urgency that this historic moment calls for.
